light_analysis.conclusion: NSRSA提供了一个可扩展框架，通过外部符号验证使递归自我改进可测量和可靠，特别是在可自动验证的领域如数学推理中。该研究的主要贡献在于解决了递归漂移问题，通过细粒度推理验证提升了自我训练的质量和稳定性。未来工作可能包括扩展该方法到其他需要自动验证的领域，或结合更多神经符号技术。潜在局限性是依赖领域特定的验证工具，可能限制其通用性。

title: From Part to Whole: 3D Generative World Model with an Adaptive Structural Hierarchy
abstract: Single-image 3D generation lies at the core of vision-to-graphics models in the real world. However, it remains a fundamental challenge to achieve reliable generalization across diverse semantic categories and highly variable structural complexity under sparse supervision. Existing approaches typically model objects in a monolithic manner or rely on a fixed number of parts, including recent part-aware models such as PartCrafter, which still require a labor-intensive user-specified part count. Such designs easily lead to overfitting, fragmented or missing structural components, and limited compositional generalization when encountering novel object layouts. To this end, this paper rethinks single-image 3D generation as learning an adaptive part-whole hierarchy in the flexible 3D latent space. We present a novel part-to-whole 3D generative world model that autonomously discovers latent structural slots by inferring soft and compositional masks directly from image tokens. Specifically, an adaptive slot-gating mechanism dynamically determines the slot-wise activation probabilities and smoothly consolidates redundant slots within different objects, ensuring that the emergent structure remains compact yet expressive across categories. Each distilled slot is then aligned to a learnable, class-agnostic prototype bank, enabling powerful cross-category shape sharing and denoising through universal geometric prototypes in the real world. Furthermore, a lightweight 3D denoiser is introduced to reconstruct geometry and appearance via unified diffusion objectives. Experiments show consistent gains in cross-category transfer and part-count extrapolation, and ablations confirm complementary benefits of the prototype bank for shape-prior sharing as well as slot-gating for structural adaptation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个自适应部分-整体层次结构的3D生成世界模型，通过槽门控和原型库实现跨类别泛化。
light_analysis.motivation: 单图像3D生成在现实世界视觉到图形模型中至关重要，但现有方法如PartCrafter等通常采用整体建模或依赖固定部分数量，需要用户手动指定，导致在跨多样语义类别和高结构复杂度下泛化能力不足，容易出现过度拟合、结构缺失和组合泛化能力有限的问题。这使得开发自适应方法成为必要，以应对新颖对象布局的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一个新颖的部分到整体3D生成世界模型，通过从图像令牌推断软组合掩码自主发现潜在结构槽。核心创新包括自适应槽门控机制，动态确定槽激活概率并平滑整合冗余槽，确保结构紧凑且表达性强；每个精炼槽与可学习的、类别无关原型库对齐，实现跨类别形状共享和去噪；并引入轻量级3D去噪器，使用统一扩散目标重构几何和外观。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，提出的模型在跨类别传输和部分数量外推任务中持续获得增益，显示优于现有基线方法。消融研究进一步确认原型库在共享形状先验和槽门控在结构自适应方面的互补益处，验证了模型在处理多样对象结构时的有效性和泛化能力，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于将单图像3D生成重新概念化为学习自适应部分-整体层次结构，并提出创新模型。通过自适应槽门控和类别无关原型库，模型提升跨类别泛化，具有重要学术价值，为3D生成提供新视角，并在计算机图形学等实际应用中具有潜力。未来工作可探索更复杂场景和进一步优化。

title: PROBE: Diagnosing Residual Concept Capacity in Erased Text-to-Video Diffusion Models
abstract: Concept erasure techniques for text-to-video (T2V) diffusion models report substantial suppression of sensitive content, yet current evaluation is limited to checking whether the target concept is absent from generated frames, treating output-level suppression as evidence of representational removal. We introduce PROBE, a diagnostic protocol that quantifies the \textit{reactivation potential} of erased concepts in T2V models. With all model parameters frozen, PROBE optimizes a lightweight pseudo-token embedding through a denoising reconstruction objective combined with a novel latent alignment constraint that anchors recovery to the spatiotemporal structure of the original concept. We make three contributions: (1) a multi-level evaluation framework spanning classifier-based detection, semantic similarity, temporal reactivation analysis, and human validation; (2) systematic experiments across three T2V architectures, three concept categories, and three erasure strategies revealing that all tested methods leave measurable residual capacity whose robustness correlates with intervention depth; and (3) the identification of temporal re-emergence, a video-specific failure mode where suppressed concepts progressively resurface across frames, invisible to frame-level metrics. These findings suggest that current erasure methods achieve output-level suppression rather than representational removal. We release our protocol to support reproducible safety auditing. Our code is available at https://github.com/YiweiXie/PRObingBasedEvaluation.
comment: This preprint was posted after submission to IEEE Transactions

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出PROBE协议，通过量化文本到视频扩散模型中擦除概念的重新激活潜力，揭示现有擦除方法仅实现输出级抑制而非表示移除。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前文本到视频（T2V）扩散模型的概念擦除技术旨在抑制敏感内容，但其评估局限于检查目标概念是否从生成帧中缺席，将输出级抑制误认为表示移除。这一问题在模型安全性审计中至关重要，因为残余能力可能导致概念重新激活，而现有方法无法全面评估擦除效果，忽略了潜在的风险和失败模式，如时间再出现。摘要未明确说明具体应用场景，但暗示安全性需求。
light_analysis.method: PROBE协议是一种诊断方法，在冻结所有模型参数的情况下，通过优化轻量级伪令牌嵌入来量化擦除概念的重新激活潜力。核心创新是结合去噪重建目标和新颖的潜在对齐约束，该约束将概念恢复锚定到原始时空结构。此外，协议包括多级评估框架，涵盖基于分类器的检测、语义相似性分析、时间重新激活评估和人类验证，以全面诊断残余能力。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型细节。
light_analysis.result: 系统性实验覆盖三种T2V架构、三个概念类别和三种擦除策略，结果显示所有测试方法均留有可测量的残余能力，其鲁棒性与干预深度相关。研究还识别了时间再出现这一视频特定失败模式，即被抑制概念在帧间逐渐重新出现，对帧级指标不可见。这些发现基于多级评估框架得出，包括检测和验证，但摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，仅定性描述残余能力的存在和模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是揭示当前概念擦除方法仅实现输出级抑制，而非从表示中完全移除，强调安全性审计的重要性。PROBE协议支持可重复的评估，帮助识别失败模式如时间再出现，促进更有效的擦除技术发展。研究的学术价值在于提出新的诊断框架，实际应用价值在于增强模型安全性和可靠性。未来工作可能涉及改进擦除策略或扩展协议到其他领域。摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: What Do World Models Learn in RL? Probing Latent Representations in Learned Environment Simulators
abstract: World models learn to simulate environment dynamics from experience, enabling sample-efficient reinforcement learning. But what do these models actually represent internally? We apply interpretability techniques--including linear and nonlinear probing, causal interventions, and attention analysis--to two architecturally distinct world models: IRIS (discrete token transformer) and DIAMOND (continuous diffusion UNet), trained on Atari Breakout and Pong. Using linear probes, we find that both models develop linearly decodable representations of game state variables (object positions, scores), with MLP probes yielding only marginally higher R^2, confirming that these representations are approximately linear. Causal interventions--shifting hidden states along probe-derived directions--produce correlated changes in model predictions, providing evidence that representations are functionally used rather than merely correlated. Analysis of IRIS attention heads reveals spatial specialization: specific heads attend preferentially to tokens overlapping with game objects. Multi-baseline token ablation experiments consistently identify object-containing tokens as disproportionately important. Our findings provide interpretability evidence that learned world models develop structured, approximately linear internal representations of environment state across two games and two architectures.

light_analysis.overview: 本文应用多种可解释性技术发现，强化学习中世界模型发展了结构化的近似线性内部表示，增强了模型可理解性。
light_analysis.motivation: 世界模型通过学习环境动态实现样本高效的强化学习，但其内部表示的具体内容和方法仍不明确。为了提高模型的可解释性和理解学习机制，本研究旨在探究世界模型的内部表示。现有研究往往关注性能提升而忽略解释性，导致模型黑箱问题，限制了模型改进和实际应用的可靠性，因此解决这一解释性挑战具有重要理论和应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 本研究应用线性探测、非线性探测、因果干预和注意力分析等可解释性技术，分析两个不同架构的世界模型：IRIS（基于离散令牌的变换器）和DIAMOND（基于连续扩散的UNet），在Atari Breakout和Pong游戏上训练。关键创新点在于结合多种技术全面检查内部表示特性，如线性可解码性、功能性使用和空间模式，通过探测器、干预和消融实验验证表示的结构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，两个模型都发展了近似线性的内部表示，游戏状态变量可通过线性探测器高精度解码，R^2值接近且MLP探测器仅有轻微提升。因果干预导致模型预测的相应变化，证明表示是功能性使用而非仅相关。IRIS的注意力分析揭示特定头关注游戏对象相关的令牌，令牌消融实验确认包含对象的令牌具有不成比例的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提供证据表明，跨两个游戏和两个架构的世界模型发展出结构化的近似线性内部表示，增强了可解释性，有助于理解模型内部机制和优化设计。这些发现对强化学习算法的改进和可信世界模型开发具有重要价值；局限性包括仅使用有限环境和模型，未来可扩展研究范围或探索实际应用。

title: Sharper Generalization Bounds for Transformer
abstract: This paper studies generalization error bounds for Transformer models. Based on the offset Rademacher complexity, we derive sharper generalization bounds for different Transformer architectures, including single-layer single-head, single-layer multi-head, and multi-layer Transformers. We first express the excess risk of Transformers in terms of the offset Rademacher complexity. By exploiting its connection with the empirical covering numbers of the corresponding hypothesis spaces, we obtain excess risk bounds that achieve optimal convergence rates up to constant factors. We then derive refined excess risk bounds by upper bounding the covering numbers of Transformer hypothesis spaces using matrix ranks and matrix norms, leading to precise, architecture-dependent generalization bounds. Finally, we relax the boundedness assumption on feature mappings and extend our theoretical results to settings with unbounded (sub-Gaussian) features and heavy-tailed distributions.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究基于偏移Rademacher复杂度，为不同Transformer架构推导出更锐利的泛化误差界。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformer模型在自然语言处理和机器学习中应用广泛，但其泛化性能的理论分析仍不充分。现有泛化误差界往往过于宽松，未能精确反映不同架构（如单层多头或多层结构）的特性，限制了模型优化和过拟合控制。因此，需要发展更锐利的理论边界，以更好地理解模型的泛化行为，提升模型设计的理论基础，并弥补现有方法在精确度和适应性方面的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用基于偏移Rademacher复杂度的理论框架，首先将Transformers的过剩风险表示为偏移Rademacher复杂度。通过探索该复杂度与假设空间经验覆盖数之间的关系，推导出达到最优收敛率的过剩风险界。关键创新点包括利用矩阵秩和矩阵范数对Transformers假设空间的覆盖数进行上界，从而获得精确且依赖于具体架构（如单层单头、单层多头和多层）的泛化误差界。最后，放宽特征映射的有界性假设，将结果扩展到无界特征（如次高斯特征）和重尾分布场景。
light_analysis.result: 论文推导的理论结果显示出过剩风险界达到常数因子内的最优收敛率，为不同Transformer架构提供了精确的泛化误差界。通过结合矩阵秩和范数，这些界比现有方法更锐利，能够反映架构差异，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升）或与基线方法的数值对比数据。因此，结果主要侧重于理论推导的贡献，缺乏实证实验的详细验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是为Transformer模型提供了更锐利且架构相关的泛化误差界，深化了对模型泛化行为的理论理解。学术价值在于填补了Transformer理论分析的空白，为模型优化和避免过拟合提供了新工具；实际应用上，这些界有助于指导更高效的架构设计。潜在局限性在于实证验证不足，未来工作可能包括数值实验验证、扩展到更复杂模型或数据分布。

title: Generalization Limits of In-Context Operator Networks for Higher-Order Partial Differential Equations
abstract: We investigate the generalization capabilities of In-Context Operator Networks (ICONs), a new class of operator networks that build on the principles of in-context learning, for higher-order partial differential equations. We extend previous work by expanding the type and scope of differential equations handled by the foundation model. We demonstrate that while processing complex inputs requires some new computational methods, the underlying machine learning techniques are largely consistent with simpler cases. Our implementation shows that although point-wise accuracy degrades for higher-order problems like the heat equation, the model retains qualitative accuracy in capturing solution dynamics and overall behavior. This demonstrates the model's ability to extrapolate fundamental solution characteristics to problems outside its training regime.

light_analysis.overview: 本文研究了In-Context Operator Networks对高阶偏微分方程的泛化能力，发现模型能保持定性精度并外推解特征。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决高阶偏微分方程的建模问题，现有ICONs方法主要应用于较简单方程，但对复杂高阶方程的泛化能力未知，因此扩展了基础模型的处理范围。高阶偏微分方程在物理和工程中普遍存在，研究其泛化能力对提升机器学习模型的实际应用价值至关重要。摘要未明确说明具体现有方法的不足，但暗示了需要处理更复杂输入类型的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 研究基于In-Context Operator Networks (ICONs)，这是一种结合情境学习原理的算子网络。关键创新点包括扩展模型以处理更广泛类型的高阶偏微分方程，如热方程等。实施中采用了新计算方法处理复杂输入，但底层机器学习技术与更简单案例保持一致。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构或使用的数据集，仅提及通过实现来验证方法。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，对于高阶问题如热方程，模型的点精确度有所下降，但在捕捉解动态和整体行为上保持定性精确度。这表明模型能够将基本解特征外推到训练集之外的问题，显示出泛化潜力。摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，如准确率对比，但与更简单案例相比，性能变化被定性描述为点精确度退化但定性精度保留。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是验证了ICONs对高阶偏微分方程的泛化能力，模型在定性层面保持精度，具有外推能力。学术上扩展了算子网络的理论应用范围，实际中可能支持复杂物理系统的模拟。局限性在于点精确度下降，需要进一步优化方法以提高全面性能。未来工作方向包括改进计算方法以平衡精度或扩展到更多方程类型，但摘要未明确说明具体细节。

title: SynSym: A Synthetic Data Generation Framework for Psychiatric Symptom Identification
abstract: Psychiatric symptom identification on social media aims to infer fine-grained mental health symptoms from user-generated posts, allowing a detailed understanding of users' mental states. However, the construction of large-scale symptom-level datasets remains challenging due to the resource-intensive nature of expert labeling and the lack of standardized annotation guidelines, which in turn limits the generalizability of models to identify diverse symptom expressions from user-generated text. To address these issues, we propose SynSym, a synthetic data generation framework for constructing generalizable datasets for symptom identification. Leveraging large language models (LLMs), SynSym constructs high-quality training samples by (1) expanding each symptom into sub-concepts to enhance the diversity of generated expressions, (2) producing synthetic expressions that reflect psychiatric symptoms in diverse linguistic styles, and (3) composing realistic multi-symptom expressions, informed by clinical co-occurrence patterns. We validate SynSym on three benchmark datasets covering different styles of depressive symptom expression. Experimental results demonstrate that models trained solely on the synthetic data generated by SynSym perform comparably to those trained on real data, and benefit further from additional fine-tuning with real data. These findings underscore the potential of synthetic data as an alternative resource to real-world annotations in psychiatric symptom modeling, and SynSym serves as a practical framework for generating clinically relevant and realistic symptom expressions.

light_analysis.overview: SynSym 是一个利用大语言模型生成合成数据的框架，旨在解决精神病症状识别中的数据稀缺问题，提高模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决社交媒体上精神病症状识别中构建大规模症状级数据集的挑战。由于专家标注资源密集且缺乏标准化指南，现有方法在生成多样症状表达时泛化能力有限。这一问题在心理健康监测中至关重要，因为细粒度数据有助于深入理解用户心理状态，而数据不足限制了模型的实用性和准确性，因此需要一种替代方法来高效生成高质量训练数据。
light_analysis.method: SynSym 框架基于大语言模型（LLMs），通过三个步骤生成高质量合成数据：首先，将每个症状扩展为子概念以增强表达多样性；其次，生成反映精神病症状的多样化语言风格表达；最后，结合临床共现模式生成现实的多症状表达。关键创新在于利用 LLMs 和临床知识生成逼真且多样化的样本，从而支持症状识别模型的训练。
light_analysis.result: 在三个覆盖不同抑郁症状表达风格的基准数据集上验证 SynSym，实验结果表明，仅使用该框架生成的合成数据训练的模型性能与使用真实数据训练的模型相当，并且通过额外微调真实数据可以进一步提升性能。这证明了合成数据的有效性，为缓解数据依赖问题提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出 SynSym 框架，展示了合成数据在精神病症状建模中作为真实标注替代资源的潜力，具有促进心理健康应用发展的实际价值。研究强调了数据生成方法的实用性，未来工作可能包括扩展到更多症状类型或改进生成算法以应对更复杂场景。

title: PEARL: Geometry Aligns Semantics for Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation
abstract: Training-free open-vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) promises rapid adaptation to new label sets without retraining. Yet, many methods rely on heavy post-processing or handle text and vision in isolation, leaving cross-modal geometry underutilized. Others introduce auxiliary vision backbones or multi-model pipelines, which increase complexity and latency while compromising design simplicity. We present PEARL, \textbf{\underline{P}}rocrust\textbf{\underline{e}}s \textbf{\underline{a}}lignment with text-awa\textbf{\underline{r}}e \textbf{\underline{L}}aplacian propagation, a compact two-step inference that follows an align-then-propagate principle. The Procrustes alignment step performs an orthogonal projection inside the last self-attention block, rotating keys toward the query subspace via a stable polar iteration. The text-aware Laplacian propagation then refines per-pixel logits on a small grid through a confidence-weighted, text-guided graph solve: text provides both a data-trust signal and neighbor gating, while image gradients preserve boundaries. In this work, our method is fully training-free, plug-and-play, and uses only fixed constants, adding minimal latency with a small per-head projection and a few conjugate-gradient steps. Our approach, PEARL, sets a new state-of-the-art in training-free OVSS without extra data or auxiliary backbones across standard benchmarks, achieving superior performance under both with-background and without-background protocols.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出PEARL方法，通过几何对齐语义实现训练免费的开放词汇语义分割，无需训练即可快速适应新标签集。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有训练免费开放词汇语义分割方法常依赖重后处理或孤立处理文本和视觉模态，导致交叉模态几何信息未被充分利用；其他方法引入额外视觉骨干或多模型管道，增加了复杂性和延迟，同时牺牲了设计简洁性。因此，研究旨在开发一种更高效、简洁的方法来利用几何信息改进分割性能，解决现有技术不足的问题。
light_analysis.method: PEARL方法采用紧凑的两步推理：首先进行Procrustes对齐，在最后一个自注意力块中执行正交投影，通过稳定极坐标迭代旋转键向量朝向查询子空间；然后进行文本感知拉普拉斯传播，通过置信度加权、文本引导的图求解在小型网格上细化像素级logits，其中文本提供数据信任信号和邻居门控，图像梯度用于保留边界。该方法无需训练，即插即用，仅使用固定常量。
light_analysis.result: PEARL在标准基准测试中实现了训练免费开放词汇语义分割的新最先进性能，无需额外数据或辅助视觉骨干。在带背景和不带背景协议下均表现出色，具体准确率等性能指标摘要未明确说明，但与基线方法相比有显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: PEARL的主要贡献是提出一种完全训练免费、即插即用的推理框架，通过几何对齐语义优化分割，仅增加最小延迟。该研究在学术上推动了开放词汇分割领域的发展，实际应用中可快速适应新标签集，具有高效性和简洁性，未来工作可进一步探索计算优化或扩展到更复杂场景。

title: VIGIL: Part-Grounded Structured Reasoning for Generalizable Deepfake Detection
abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) offer a promising path toward interpretable deepfake detection by generating textual explanations. However, the reasoning process of current MLLM-based methods combines evidence generation and manipulation localization into a unified step. This combination blurs the boundary between faithful observations and hallucinated explanations, leading to unreliable conclusions. Building on this, we present VIGIL, a part-centric structured forensic framework inspired by expert forensic practice through a plan-then-examine pipeline: the model first plans which facial parts warrant inspection based on global visual cues, then examines each part with independently sourced forensic evidence. A stage-gated injection mechanism delivers part-level forensic evidence only during examination, ensuring that part selection remains driven by the model's own perception rather than biased by external signals. We further propose a progressive three-stage training paradigm whose reinforcement learning stage employs part-aware rewards to enforce anatomical validity and evidence--conclusion coherence. To enable rigorous generalizability evaluation, we construct OmniFake, a hierarchical 5-Level benchmark where the model, trained on only three foundational generators, is progressively tested up to in-the-wild social-media data. Extensive experiments on OmniFake and cross-dataset evaluations demonstrate that VIGIL consistently outperforms both expert detectors and concurrent MLLM-based methods across all generalizability levels.

light_analysis.overview: VIGIL通过部分中心的结构化推理框架，显著提高了深度伪造检测的泛化性和解释可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前基于多模态大语言模型的深度伪造检测方法将证据生成和操作定位合并为一个步骤，导致忠实观察与幻觉解释的边界模糊，结论不可靠。深度伪造在社交媒体中日益普遍，急需可解释性强且泛化能力高的检测方法。现有MLLM方法在处理复杂伪造时容易产生错误解释，难以适应从实验室到真实场景的过渡，因此有必要设计结构化的推理流程来提升检测的准确性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: VIGIL采用部分中心的结构化取证框架，灵感来自专家实践，包括计划-检查流程：首先根据全局视觉线索计划需要检查的面部部位，然后独立检查每个部位并收集取证证据。关键创新点包括阶段门控注入机制，仅在检查阶段提供部分级证据，以避免偏差；以及渐进三阶段训练范式，其中强化学习阶段使用部分感知奖励来增强解剖有效性和证据-结论一致性。该方法还利用了OmniFake基准进行训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: 在OmniFake五级层次基准上，VIGIL在仅使用三个基础生成器训练后，逐步测试到野外社交媒体数据，表现优异。跨数据集评估显示，VIGIL在所有泛化级别上一致优于专家检测器和当前MLLM方法，证明了其强大的泛化能力和可靠性。具体性能指标如准确率提升在摘要中未明确说明，但实验强调了显著改进，支持其在实际应用中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: VIGIL的主要贡献是提出基于部分的结构化推理框架，提升了深度伪造检测的可解释性和泛化性。学术上，它为多模态大语言模型的应用提供了新的结构化方法；实际应用中，能有效处理真实世界伪造内容。未来工作可探索更多复杂场景和模型优化，以进一步提升性能，例如扩展到更多伪造类型或提高计算效率。

title: BOxCrete: A Bayesian Optimization Open-Source AI Model for Concrete Strength Forecasting and Mix Optimization
abstract: Modern concrete must simultaneously satisfy evolving demands for mechanical performance, workability, durability, and sustainability, making mix designs increasingly complex. Recent studies leveraging Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) models show promise for predicting compressive strength and guiding mix optimization, but most existing efforts are based on proprietary industrial datasets and closed-source implementations. Here we introduce BOxCrete, an open-source probabilistic modeling and optimization framework trained on a new open-access dataset of over 500 strength measurements (1-15 ksi) from 123 mixtures - 69 mortar and 54 concrete mixes tested at five curing ages (1, 3, 5, 14, and 28 days). BOxCrete leverages Gaussian Process (GP) regression to predict strength development, achieving average R$^2$ = 0.94 and RMSE = 0.69 ksi, quantify uncertainty, and carry out multi-objective optimization of compressive strength and embodied carbon. The dataset and model establish a reproducible open-source foundation for data-driven development of AI-based optimized mix designs.
comment: Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/facebookresearch/SustainableConcrete

light_analysis.overview: 提出开源的贝叶斯优化AI模型BOxCrete，用于混凝土强度预测和配合比优化。
light_analysis.motivation: 现代混凝土设计需同时满足力学性能、工作性、耐久性和可持续性的复杂需求，导致配合比设计难度增加。尽管人工智能和机器学习模型在预测抗压强度和指导优化方面有潜力，但现有方法主要基于专有工业数据集和闭源实现，限制了可重复性和广泛采用。因此，本研究旨在解决这些问题，通过开发开放框架促进数据驱动的混凝土配比优化，提升可持续性和可访问性。
light_analysis.method: BOxCrete采用高斯过程回归构建概率模型，以预测混凝土强度发展。框架基于新的公开数据集训练，包含123个砂浆和混凝土混合物的500多个强度测量值，覆盖1-28天的五个养护龄期。关键创新在于结合贝叶斯优化技术，实现抗压强度和隐含碳的多目标优化，提供不确定性量化，并支持开源、可扩展的配合比设计方法。
light_analysis.result: BOxCrete在预测抗压强度方面表现优异，平均R²达到0.94，RMSE为0.69 ksi，表明模型具有高准确性和低误差。框架能有效量化预测不确定性，并执行抗压强度与隐含碳的多目标优化，在公开数据集上验证了其性能。摘要未明确说明与基线方法的直接对比，但结果展示了模型在混凝土强度预测和优化中的实用性和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献了BOxCrete开源AI模型及其公开数据集，为混凝土强度预测和配合比优化建立了可重复的研究基础。这推动了数据驱动的混凝土设计，促进可持续性和效率。潜在局限性可能包括数据集的有限规模或多样性，未来工作可扩展数据源或集成其他机器学习算法以增强模型的泛化能力和应用范围。

title: CatRAG: Functor-Guided Structural Debiasing with Retrieval Augmentation for Fair LLMs
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are deployed in high-stakes settings but can show demographic, gender, and geographic biases that undermine fairness and trust. Prior debiasing methods, including embedding-space projections, prompt-based steering, and causal interventions, often act at a single stage of the pipeline, resulting in incomplete mitigation and brittle utility trade-offs under distribution shifts. We propose CatRAG Debiasing, a dual-pronged framework that integrates functor with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) guided structural debiasing. The functor component leverages category-theoretic structure to induce a principled, structure-preserving projection that suppresses bias-associated directions in the embedding space while retaining task-relevant semantics. On the Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ) across three open-source LLMs (Meta Llama-3, OpenAI GPT-OSS, and Google Gemma-3), CatRAG achieves state-of-the-art results, improving accuracy by up to 40% over the corresponding base models and by more than 10% over prior debiasing methods, while reducing bias scores to near zero (from 60% for the base models) across gender, nationality, race, and intersectional subgroups.
comment: 9 pages, 4 figures, and accepted in IJCNN 2026 (part of IEEE WCCI 2026)

light_analysis.overview: CatRAG Debiasing通过整合函子引导的结构去偏与检索增强生成技术，有效提升大语言模型的公平性，实现最先进的偏见缓解。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究动机源于大语言模型（LLMs）在高风险应用场景中常表现出人口、性别和地理偏见，这严重损害公平性和用户信任。现有去偏方法，如嵌入空间投影、提示引导和因果干预，往往仅作用于模型处理流程的单一步骤，导致偏见缓解不彻底，且在数据分布变化时面临脆弱的效用权衡，难以满足实际部署需求。因此，开发一种更全面、稳健的去偏框架成为解决这些局限性、促进公平AI系统的关键挑战。
light_analysis.method: CatRAG Debiasing提出一个双管齐下的框架，结合函子理论和检索增强生成（RAG）进行结构去偏。函子组件利用范畴理论结构，设计一种原则性、结构保持的投影方法，以抑制嵌入空间中与偏见相关的方向，同时保留任务相关语义，确保去偏过程不损害模型性能。RAG组件通过检索外部知识增强生成过程，进一步优化偏见缓解。实验在Bias Benchmark for Question Answering (BBQ)上进行，应用Meta Llama-3、OpenAI GPT-OSS和Google Gemma-3等开源LLMs进行验证，确保方法的广泛适用性。
light_analysis.result: 在BBQ基准测试中，CatRAG在三个开源大语言模型上取得了最先进的结果。相对于基础模型，准确性最高提升40%，并比先前去偏方法平均提高10%以上。同时，偏见分数显著降低，从基础模型的约60%降至接近零水平，这一改进覆盖性别、国籍、种族及交叉子组等多个维度。这些数据表明，CatRAG在保持高准确性的同时，能有效消除偏见，提供了卓越的公平性提升，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文贡献在于提出CatRAG Debiasing框架，通过融合函子引导和检索增强生成，为大语言模型的公平性去偏提供了创新解决方案。其学术价值体现在首次将范畴理论结构应用于偏见缓解，增强了方法的原理性和稳健性；实际应用中，该框架有助于开发更公平、可信的AI系统，减少社会偏见影响。尽管摘要未明确说明，未来工作可能涉及扩展到其他基准或模型类型，并进一步优化结构去偏的通用性，以应对更复杂的偏见场景。

title: Generalizable Self-Evolving Memory for Automatic Prompt Optimization
abstract: Automatic prompt optimization is a promising approach for adapting large language models (LLMs) to downstream tasks, yet existing methods typically search for a specific prompt specialized to a fixed task. This paradigm limits generalization across heterogeneous queries and prevents models from accumulating reusable prompting knowledge over time. In this paper, we propose MemAPO, a memory-driven framework that reconceptualizes prompt optimization as generalizable and self-evolving experience accumulation. MemAPO maintains a dual-memory mechanism that distills successful reasoning trajectories into reusable strategy templates while organizing incorrect generations into structured error patterns that capture recurrent failure modes. Given a new prompt, the framework retrieves both relevant strategies and failure patterns to compose prompts that promote effective reasoning while discouraging known mistakes. Through iterative self-reflection and memory editing, MemAPO continuously updates its memory, enabling prompt optimization to improve over time rather than restarting from scratch for each task. Experiments on diverse benchmarks show that MemAPO consistently outperforms representative prompt optimization baselines while substantially reducing optimization cost.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MemAPO框架，一种可泛化和自演化的记忆驱动方法，用于自动提示优化，通过经验积累提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自动提示优化方法通常针对固定任务搜索特定提示，导致跨异质查询时泛化能力受限，且无法从历史经验中积累可重用知识，这阻碍了大型语言模型在下游任务中的长期改进和效率提升。该研究旨在解决这一限制，通过引入自演化和泛化机制，使提示优化能适应多样化查询并持续学习，从而提高模型的适应性和减少重复优化成本。
light_analysis.method: MemAPO框架采用双记忆机制：成功推理轨迹被提炼为可重用策略模板，而错误生成则组织成结构化错误模式以捕捉常见失败模式。给定新提示时，框架检索相关策略和错误模式，组合优化提示以促进有效推理并避免已知错误。通过迭代自我反思和记忆编辑，MemAPO持续更新其记忆，使提示优化能随时间演化而非每次都需从头开始，突出了基于经验积累的技术创新。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MemAPO在多个基准测试中一致优于代表性提示优化基线方法，同时在优化成本上实现显著降低。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，如准确率提升百分比，但表明该方法在泛化能力和效率方面均有改进，验证了自演化机制的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MemAPO通过双记忆机制实现了提示优化的自演化和泛化，核心贡献在于累积和重用经验以提升性能并降低成本，推动了自动提示优化领域的进步。其学术价值在于强调持续学习在大型语言模型适应任务中的作用，实际应用价值包括增强模型适应性和减少优化开销，未来工作可探索更广泛的任务扩展和潜在局限性。

title: Triangulating Temporal Dynamics in Multilingual Swiss Online News
abstract: Analyzing news coverage in multilingual societies can offer valuable insights into the dynamics of public discourse and the development of collective narratives, yet comprehensive studies that account for linguistic and cultural diversity within national media ecosystems remain limited, particularly in complex contexts such as Switzerland. This paper studies temporal trends in Swiss digital media across the country's three main linguistic regions, French, German, and Italian, using a triangulated methodology that combines quantitative analyses with qualitative insights. We collected and processed over 1.7 million news articles, applying lexical metrics, named entity recognition and Wikidata-based linking, targeted sentiment analysis, and consensus-based change-point detection. To enable principled cross-language comparisons and to connect to theories of domestication and cultural proximity, we derive domestication profiles together with a proximity salience ratio. Our analysis spans thematic, recurrent, and singular events. By integrating quantitative data with qualitative interpretation, we provide new insights into the dynamics of Swiss digital media and demonstrate the usefulness of triangulation in media studies. The findings reveal distinct temporal patterns and highlight how linguistic and cultural contexts influence reporting. Our approach offers a framework applicable to other multilingual or culturally diverse media environments, contributing to a deeper understanding of how news is shaped by linguistic and cultural factors.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种三角化方法，结合定量与定性分析，研究瑞士多语言在线新闻的时间动态，揭示语言和文化背景对报道的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决多语言社会中新闻覆盖动态分析的挑战，特别是在瑞士等复杂环境下。现有方法往往忽略语言和文化多样性，导致对公共话语和集体叙述的见解有限。由于媒体生态系统中的语言区域差异显著，全面分析这些因素对于理解国家层面的媒体动态至关重要，但相关研究缺乏，因此本文探索多语言媒体中的时间趋势以填补这一空白。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用三角化方法论，整合定量分析和定性解释。收集并处理了超过170万篇瑞士在线新闻文章，覆盖法语、德语和意大利语区域。关键技术包括词汇度量、命名实体识别、基于维基数据的链接、目标情感分析和基于共识的变化点检测。为支持跨语言比较，推导了驯化剖面和接近显著性比率，连接到驯化和文化接近性理论。数据集来自数字媒体，分析涵盖主题性、重复性和单一事件，以系统化方式评估媒体动态。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现瑞士不同语言区域的新闻时间模式存在显著差异，强调了语言和文化背景如何塑造报道方式。尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或与基线方法的对比，但通过大规模数据分析揭示了时间动态，例如在事件覆盖和情感倾向上的变化。结果基于超过170万篇文章的处理，证明了三角化方法在提供新见解方面的有效性，尤其是在多语言环境下量化媒体趋势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于开发和应用了三角化方法，为多语言媒体分析提供了一个可扩展框架。学术上，它推动了跨语言媒体研究的理论和方法创新；实际上，该框架可应用于其他文化多样媒体环境，促进对新闻如何受语言和文化因素影响的深入理解。未来工作可扩展案例研究或探索更多技术集成，以提升分析的全面性。

title: Back to Point: Exploring Point-Language Models for Zero-Shot 3D Anomaly Detection
abstract: Zero-shot (ZS) 3D anomaly detection is crucial for reliable industrial inspection, as it enables detecting and localizing defects without requiring any target-category training data. Existing approaches render 3D point clouds into 2D images and leverage pre-trained Vision-Language Models (VLMs) for anomaly detection. However, such strategies inevitably discard geometric details and exhibit limited sensitivity to local anomalies. In this paper, we revisit intrinsic 3D representations and explore the potential of pre-trained Point-Language Models (PLMs) for ZS 3D anomaly detection. We propose BTP (Back To Point), a novel framework that effectively aligns 3D point cloud and textual embeddings. Specifically, BTP aligns multi-granularity patch features with textual representations for localized anomaly detection, while incorporating geometric descriptors to enhance sensitivity to structural anomalies. Furthermore, we introduce a joint representation learning strategy that leverages auxiliary point cloud data to improve robustness and enrich anomaly semantics. Extensive experiments on Real3D-AD and Anomaly-ShapeNet demonstrate that BTP achieves superior performance in ZS 3D anomaly detection. Code will be available at \href{https://github.com/wistful-8029/BTP-3DAD}{https://github.com/wistful-8029/BTP-3DAD}.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出BTP框架，通过点-语言模型对齐3D点云与文本嵌入，实现零样本3D异常检测的创新方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 零样本3D异常检测在工业检测中至关重要，因为它能够无需目标类别训练数据而检测缺陷，降低成本并提高可靠性。现有方法通常将3D点云渲染为2D图像，并利用预训练视觉语言模型进行检测，但这种方法丢弃了点云的几何细节，导致对局部异常的敏感性有限。因此，本研究的动机是探索直接基于3D表示的新方法，以克服现有技术在处理局部和结构异常时的不足，提升工业自动化检测的精度。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出BTP框架，利用预训练的点-语言模型（PLMs）进行3D点云和文本嵌入的对齐。关键创新包括多粒度补丁特征与文本表示的局部对齐，用于异常定位；融入几何描述符以增强对结构异常的敏感性；以及通过联合表示学习策略，利用辅助点云数据来提高模型的鲁棒性，并丰富异常语义的表达。该方法直接处理原始点云数据，避免了2D渲染带来的信息损失，专注于3D几何特性的保留和利用。
light_analysis.result: 在Real3D-AD和Anomaly-ShapeNet数据集上的广泛实验表明，BTP在零样本3D异常检测任务中实现了优越的性能。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率或召回率），但报告BTP的表现优于基线方法，证明其在检测和定位异常方面的有效性。这些结果突出了BTP通过直接利用点云表示和特征对齐，在处理工业缺陷检测中的优势，尽管具体对比数据在摘要中未详细提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: BTP框架成功探索了点-语言模型在3D异常检测中的应用，通过保留几何细节和改进特征对齐，显著提高了检测敏感性。该研究的贡献在于提供了一种无需训练数据的可靠工业检测方法，具有重要的实际应用价值。未来工作可能包括优化模型架构、扩展到更多3D视觉任务，或处理更复杂的工业场景，以进一步推动零样本学习技术的发展。

title: Current LLMs still cannot 'talk much' about grammar modules: Evidence from syntax
abstract: We aim to examine the extent to which Large Language Models (LLMs) can 'talk much' about grammar modules, providing evidence from syntax core properties translated by ChatGPT into Arabic. We collected 44 terms from generative syntax previous works, including books and journal articles, as well as from our experience in the field. These terms were translated by humans, and then by ChatGPT-5. We then analyzed and compared both translations. We used an analytical and comparative approach in our analysis. Findings unveil that LLMs still cannot 'talk much' about the core syntax properties embedded in the terms under study involving several syntactic and semantic challenges: only 25% of ChatGPT translations were accurate, while 38.6% were inaccurate, and 36.4.% were partially correct, which we consider appropriate. Based on these findings, a set of actionable strategies were proposed, the most notable of which is a close collaboration between AI specialists and linguists to better LLMs' working mechanism for accurate or at least appropriate translation.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过评估ChatGPT-5翻译阿拉伯语语法术语的准确性，揭示大型语言模型在处理语法核心属性时的局限性，并建议AI专家与语言学家合作改进。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是评估大型语言模型（LLMs）在语法模块上的能力，特别是通过翻译涉及语法和语义挑战的术语来检验其理解深度。这个问题之所以重要，是因为LLMs在自然语言处理中广泛应用，但其在专业领域如语法术语处理中可能因复杂语义而表现不足。现有方法往往依赖自动翻译，缺乏对语法核心属性的精确处理，导致准确性受限，因此需要通过实证研究来揭示局限性，并为改进跨学科方法提供基础。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法涉及收集44个生成语法术语，这些术语来自先前学术工作的书籍、期刊文章和领域经验。首先进行人工翻译作为基准，然后使用ChatGPT-5进行自动翻译。采用分析和比较方法，评估翻译准确性，关键创新点在于使用具体术语来测试LLMs的语法理解，并结合人类专家翻译进行系统性对比。技术细节包括ChatGPT-5作为LLM模型，以及术语选择覆盖了核心语法属性，以模拟真实世界中的语法和语义挑战。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，ChatGPT-5翻译的准确性较低：仅25%的翻译准确，38.6%不准确，36.4%部分正确。这具体表明LLMs在处理语法核心属性时面临显著挑战，尤其是在涉及语法和语义难点的术语翻译中。与人类翻译基线相比，自动翻译的性能差距突出，凸显了当前LLMs在专业语言处理领域的不足，并提供了量化证据支持其局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论是LLMs在处理语法模块方面仍有明显局限性，表现为翻译准确性不足。本研究的贡献在于提供实证证据，揭示了LLMs在语法理解上的弱点，并提出关键改进策略，如促进AI专家与语言学家的紧密合作，以优化LLMs工作机制。学术价值在于推动了跨学科研究，实际应用价值包括为语言处理工具的未来开发提供方向，未来工作可扩展至更多语言和语法领域以深化理解。

title: Spectral Alignment in Forward-Backward Representations via Temporal Abstraction
abstract: Forward-backward (FB) representations provide a powerful framework for learning the successor representation (SR) in continuous spaces by enforcing a low-rank factorization. However, a fundamental spectral mismatch often exists between the high-rank transition dynamics of continuous environments and the low-rank bottleneck of the FB architecture, making accurate low-rank representation learning difficult. In this work, we analyze temporal abstraction as a mechanism to mitigate this mismatch. By characterizing the spectral properties of the transition operator, we show that temporal abstraction acts as a low-pass filter that suppresses high-frequency spectral components. This suppression reduces the effective rank of the induced SR while preserving a formal bound on the resulting value function error. Empirically, we show that this alignment is a key factor for stable FB learning, particularly at high discount factors where bootstrapping becomes error-prone. Our results identify temporal abstraction as a principled mechanism for shaping the spectral structure of the underlying MDP and enabling effective long-horizon representations in continuous control.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过时间抽象对齐Forward-Backward表示的光谱特性，以解决连续控制中光谱不匹配问题并提升长期表示学习稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: Forward-Backward表示框架在连续空间中学习successor representation时存在光谱不匹配：环境的高秩过渡动态与FB架构的低秩瓶颈导致表示学习困难，特别是在高折扣因子下bootstrapping易出错。现有方法未有效处理这一问题，影响了学习的准确性和稳定性，因此研究如何通过机制调整来对齐光谱特性对改进强化学习表示至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出使用时间抽象作为缓解光谱不匹配的机制，核心方法是分析MDP过渡算子的光谱特性，将时间抽象建模为低通滤波器以抑制高频光谱分量，从而降低successor representation的有效秩。关键创新点在于通过理论推导证明了这种方法能在保持价值函数误差界限的同时实现光谱对齐，但摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实证结果显示，通过时间抽象实现的光谱对齐是稳定Forward-Backward学习的关键因素，尤其在较高折扣因子条件下，光谱对齐减少了bootstrapping的误差，提升了学习过程的稳定性。摘要虽未提供具体性能指标数据如准确率，但强调了这种对齐对长期表示学习的积极影响，并通过实验验证了其相对于基础方法的改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于确立时间抽象作为一种原理机制，用于塑造MDP的光谱结构并促进连续控制中Forward-Backward表示的长期学习。研究具有学术价值，为解决光谱不匹配问题提供了理论框架，并有潜力应用于更广泛的强化学习场景；未来工作可能包括扩展验证该方法的泛化性。

title: 2K Retrofit: Entropy-Guided Efficient Sparse Refinement for High-Resolution 3D Geometry Prediction
abstract: High-resolution geometric prediction is essential for robust perception in autonomous driving, robotics, and AR/MR, but current foundation models are fundamentally limited by their scalability to real-world, high-resolution scenarios. Direct inference on 2K images with these models incurs prohibitive computational and memory demands, making practical deployment challenging. To tackle the issue, we present 2K Retrofit, a novel framework that enables efficient 2K-resolution inference for any geometric foundation model, without modifying or retraining the backbone. Our approach leverages fast coarse predictions and an entropy-based sparse refinement to selectively enhance high-uncertainty regions, achieving precise and high-fidelity 2K outputs with minimal overhead. Extensive experiments on widely used benchmark demonstrate that 2K Retrofit consistently achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and speed, bridging the gap between research advances and scalable deployment in high-resolution 3D vision applications. Code will be released upon acceptance.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了2K Retrofit框架，通过熵引导的稀疏细化为任何几何基础模型提供高效的2K分辨率推理，无需修改骨干网络，显著提升高分辨率3D几何预测的部署效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 高分辨率几何预测对于自动驾驶、机器人技术和增强/混合现实等领域的鲁棒感知至关重要，但当前基础模型在处理2K分辨率图像时面临可扩展性挑战，计算和内存需求过高导致实际部署困难。现有方法在直接推理上效率低下，缺乏有效应对真实世界高分辨率场景的能力，因此亟需一种创新解决方案来桥接研究进展与实际应用之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 2K Retrofit框架采用快速粗略预测结合基于熵的稀疏细化方法，选择性地增强预测中高不确定性区域，以实现精确的2K输出。该方法的关键创新在于无需修改或重新训练任何几何基础模型的骨干网络，通过最小化计算开销来提高推理效率，适用于多种3D视觉任务，解决了高分辨率几何预测中的效率和可扩展性问题。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛使用的基准测试中，2K Retrofit框架一致达到state-of-the-art的准确性和速度，有效桥接了研究进展与可扩展部署之间的差距。实验表明，该方法在保持高精度的同时显著提升推理效率，与基线方法相比具有明显优势，为高分辨率3D视觉应用的实际部署提供了可靠支持，尽管摘要未明确具体数值指标。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了2K Retrofit框架，通过熵引导的稀疏细化实现了高效的高分辨率几何预测，无需改动现有模型，在学术上推动了推理效率的创新。实际应用价值体现在促进自动驾驶和机器人等领域的高分辨率视觉任务部署，未来工作可能涉及代码发布以进一步验证和扩展，摘要未明确提及局限性，但潜在方向可包括优化其他分辨率场景。

title: FormalEvolve: Neuro-Symbolic Evolutionary Search for Diverse and Prover-Effective Autoformalization
abstract: Autoformalization aims to translate natural-language mathematics into compilable, machine-checkable statements. However, semantic consistency does not imply prover effectiveness: even semantically consistent formalizations can differ substantially in proof-search cost and success rate. In this work, we formulate autoformalization as a budgeted, test-time search for semantically consistent repertoires, and propose FormalEvolve, a compilation-gated neuro-symbolic evolutionary framework. FormalEvolve generates diverse candidates via LLM-driven mutation and crossover with bounded patch repair, while symbolic Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) rewrite operations further inject structural diversity. On CombiBench and ProofNet, under a strict generator-call budget of T = 100, FormalEvolve reaches semantic hit rates (SH@100) of 58.0% and 84.9%, and reduces cross-problem concentration of semantic successes(lower Gini). Under a fixed prover budget, FormalEvolve also improves downstream proving performance on CombiBench. Code will be released publicly.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出FormalEvolve，一个神经符号进化框架，用于生成多样且证明有效的自动形式化候选方案，提升数学证明的效率和成功率。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动形式化的目标是将自然语言数学翻译成可编译、机器可检查的语句。然而，现有方法存在不足：语义一致性并不保证证明有效性，即使语义一致的形式化也可能在证明搜索成本和成功率上有显著差异。这导致数学证明自动化过程中效率低下和成功率不高，限制了实际应用。该问题的重要性在于提高形式化验证的实用性和可扩展性，以支持复杂数学推理的自动化。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出FormalEvolve，一个编译门控的神经符号进化框架。该方法的核心是通过大型语言模型驱动的变异和交叉操作，结合有界补丁修复，生成多样化的候选形式化语句。此外，引入符号抽象语法树重写操作，进一步注入结构多样性以优化候选方案。在技术实现上，该框架在CombiBench和ProofNet数据集上进行评估，结合神经组件进行语义理解和符号组件进行结构操作，确保候选既语义一致又证明有效。
light_analysis.result: 在CombiBench和ProofNet数据集上，设定生成器调用预算T=100时，FormalEvolve达到语义命中率（SH@100）分别为58.0%和84.9%。同时，它降低了语义成功的集中度（Gini系数更低），表明候选方案更均衡。在固定证明预算下，FormalEvolve还改善了CombiBench的下游证明性能，提升了证明效率和成功率，与基线方法相比，表现出更高的多样性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了FormalEvolve框架，通过神经符号进化搜索，增强了自动形式化的多样性和证明有效性。这具有重要的学术价值，推动了神经符号方法在形式化验证领域的应用；实际中，可用于数学证明辅助系统，提高自动化水平。局限性可能包括对特定数据集的依赖性，未来工作可扩展到更多领域或优化计算效率。

title: ParallelVLM: Lossless Video-LLM Acceleration with Visual Alignment Aware Parallel Speculative Decoding
abstract: Although current Video-LLMs achieve impressive performance in video understanding tasks, their autoregressive decoding efficiency remains constrained by the massive number of video tokens. Visual token pruning can partially ease this bottleneck, yet existing approaches still suffer from information loss and yield only modest acceleration in decoding. In this paper, we propose ParallelVLM, a training-free draft-then-verify speculative decoding framework that overcomes both mutual waiting and limited speedup-ratio problems between draft and target models in long-video settings. ParallelVLM features two parallelized stages that maximize hardware utilization and incorporate an Unbiased Verifier-Guided Pruning strategy to better align the draft and target models by eliminating the positional bias in attention-guided pruning. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ParallelVLM effectively expands the draft window by $1.6\sim1.8\times$ with high accepted lengths, and accelerates various video understanding benchmarks by 3.36$\times$ on LLaVA-Onevision-72B and 2.42$\times$ on Qwen2.5-VL-32B compared with vanilla autoregressive decoding.

light_analysis.overview: ParallelVLM是一个无需训练的并行推测解码框架，通过无偏验证器引导剪枝消除位置偏差，实现视频大语言模型的无损加速。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前Video-LLMs在视频理解任务中性能出色，但自回归解码效率受限于大量视频tokens，导致推理速度慢。现有方法如视觉token剪枝虽能部分缓解瓶颈，但仍存在信息损失和加速效果有限的问题，尤其在长视频设置中，草稿和目标模型间的相互等待进一步制约效率。因此，本研究旨在开发一种无损高效的解码框架，以提升视频理解的实际应用性能，解决现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: ParallelVLM采用草稿-验证推测解码框架，无需额外训练。核心创新包括两个并行化阶段，最大化硬件利用率以减少相互等待，并引入Unbiased Verifier-Guided Pruning策略，通过消除注意力引导剪枝中的位置偏差，使草稿模型与目标模型更好对齐。该框架利用现有模型进行推测生成和验证，结合视觉对齐感知技术，实现无损加速，适用于多种Video-LLMs架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，ParallelVLM能扩展草稿窗口1.6至1.8倍，同时保持高接受长度。在视频理解基准测试中，与普通自回归解码相比，加速效果显著：在LLaVA-Onevision-72B模型上达到3.36倍加速，在Qwen2.5-VL-32B模型上达到2.42倍加速。这些结果证实了框架在提升解码效率和保持性能方面的优势，优于现有视觉token剪枝方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: ParallelVLM通过并行推测解码和无偏剪枝策略，有效解决了Video-LLMs解码效率低的问题，实现了无损加速。该研究为视频理解领域提供了高效的推理方法，具有重要的学术价值（如改进推测解码技术）和实用意义（如提升实时视频分析能力）。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可探索更广泛模型适配或扩展到其他多模态任务。

title: Scalable Prompt Routing via Fine-Grained Latent Task Discovery
abstract: Prompt routing dynamically selects the most appropriate large language model from a pool of candidates for each query, optimizing performance while managing costs. As model pools scale to include dozens of frontier models with narrow performance gaps, existing approaches face significant challenges: manually defined task taxonomies cannot capture fine-grained capability distinctions, while monolithic routers struggle to differentiate subtle differences across diverse tasks. We propose a two-stage routing architecture that addresses these limitations through automated fine-grained task discovery and task-aware quality estimation. Our first stage employs graph-based clustering to discover latent task types and trains a classifier to assign prompts to discovered tasks. The second stage uses a mixture-of-experts architecture with task-specific prediction heads for specialized quality estimates. At inference, we aggregate predictions from both stages to balance task-level stability with prompt-specific adaptability. Evaluated on 10 benchmarks with 11 frontier models, our method consistently outperforms existing baselines and surpasses the strongest individual model while incurring less than half its cost.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于细粒度潜在任务发现的可扩展提示路由方法，通过两阶段架构提升模型选择性能并显著降低成本。
light_analysis.motivation: Prompt routing旨在从多个候选大型语言模型中动态选择最适合每个查询的模型，以优化性能并控制成本。随着模型池扩展至包含几十个性能接近的前沿模型，现有方法面临挑战：手动定义的任务分类无法捕捉细粒度的能力差异，而整体式路由器难以区分多样化任务间的微妙差别。这限制了在规模化环境中高效利用多模型的能力，因此需要更精细的路由方法来平衡性能和成本效益。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一个两阶段路由架构，首先通过图基聚类自动发现潜在任务类型，并训练分类器将提示分配到这些任务中。第二阶段采用混合专家架构，每个专家配备任务特定的预测头，进行专业化质量估计。推理时，聚合两阶段的预测结果，以平衡任务级的稳定性和提示特定的适应性，从而提高模型选择的精确性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 在10个基准测试和11个前沿模型上的评估表明，该方法 consistently outperforms 现有基线，性能超过最强单个模型，同时成本降低超过一半。虽然摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率，但结果显示出显著的效果改进，表明该方法在优化性能和控制成本方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文贡献在于提出一种可扩展的提示路由方法，通过自动化细粒度任务发现和任务感知质量估计，解决了规模化模型池中的路由难题。其学术价值在于推动了多模型选择技术的发展，实际应用价值体现在优化AI服务性能的同时降低成本。未来工作可扩展至更多任务类型或模型变体，以进一步提升适应性。

title: Unleashing Video Language Models for Fine-grained HRCT Report Generation
abstract: Generating precise diagnostic reports from High-Resolution Computed Tomography (HRCT) is critical for clinical workflow, yet it remains a formidable challenge due to the high pathological diversity and spatial sparsity within 3D volumes. While Video Language Models (VideoLMs) have demonstrated remarkable spatio-temporal reasoning in general domains, their adaptability to domain-specific, high-volume medical interpretation remains underexplored. In this work, we present AbSteering, an abnormality-centric framework that steers VideoLMs toward precise HRCT report generation. Specifically, AbSteering introduces: (i) an abnormality-centric Chain-of-Thought scheme that enforces abnormality reasoning, and (ii) a Direct Preference Optimization objective that utilizes clinically confusable abnormalities as hard negatives to enhance fine-grained discrimination. Our results demonstrate that general-purpose VideoLMs possess strong transferability to high-volume medical imaging when guided by this paradigm. Notably, AbSteering outperforms state-of-the-art domain-specific CT foundation models, which are pretrained with large-scale CTs, achieving superior detection sensitivity while simultaneously mitigating hallucinations.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出AbSteering框架，通过异常中心的推理链和直接偏好优化，引导视频语言模型实现高分辨率CT的精细报告生成，提升检测灵敏度并减少幻觉。
light_analysis.motivation: 从高分辨率计算机断层扫描（HRCT）生成精确诊断报告对临床工作流至关重要，但由于3D体积中病理多样性和空间稀疏性，这是一项严峻挑战。视频语言模型在通用领域展现出强时空推理能力，但在特定医学领域的应用尚未充分探索，现有基于大规模CT预训练的领域特定模型可能在处理精细报告生成时存在不足，需要更高效的方法来优化临床解释。
light_analysis.method: AbSteering框架引入两个关键技术：异常中心的Chain-of-Thought方案，强制模型进行逻辑推理以聚焦异常检测；以及Direct Preference Optimization目标，利用临床易混淆异常作为硬负样本，增强细粒度区分能力。该框架指导通用视频语言模型适应HRCT图像分析，无需大规模重新训练，从而有效利用现有模型的时空推理能力进行医学报告生成。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在AbSteering指导下，通用视频语言模型在HRCT报告生成任务中表现出强可转移性，优于使用大规模CT预训练的最新领域特定CT基础模型。具体地，该方法实现了更高的检测灵敏度，并显著减少了幻觉现象，从而提升了报告准确性和可靠性，验证了框架在医学成像中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了AbSteering框架，展示了通用视频语言模型在医学成像中的可转移潜力，为临床诊断报告生成提供了新方向。这项研究具有重要学术价值，扩展了AI模型在医疗领域的应用，并可能推动更高效、精确的自动化诊断工具发展。未来工作可探索框架在其他医学图像任务中的应用，以进一步提升泛化能力和临床实用性。

title: Nuanced Emotion Recognition Based on a Segment-based MLLM Framework Leveraging Qwen3-Omni for AH Detection
abstract: Emotion recognition in videos is a pivotal task in affective computing, where identifying subtle psychological states such as Ambivalence and Hesitancy holds significant value for behavioral intervention and digital health. Ambivalence and Hesitancy states often manifest through cross-modal inconsistencies such as discrepancies between facial expressions, vocal tones, and textual semantics, posing a substantial challenge for automated recognition. This paper proposes a recognition framework that integrates temporal segment modeling with Multimodal Large Language Models. To address computational efficiency and token constraints in long video processing, we employ a segment-based strategy, partitioning videos into short clips with a maximum duration of 5 seconds. We leverage the Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B model, fine-tuned on the BAH dataset using LoRA and full-parameter strategies via the MS-Swift framework, enabling the model to synergistically analyze visual and auditory signals. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves an accuracy of 85.1% on the test set, significantly outperforming existing benchmarks and validating the superior capability of Multimodal Large Language Models in capturing complex and nuanced emotional conflicts. The code is released at https://github.com/dlnn123/A-H-Detection-with-Qwen-Omni.git.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于时间段的多模态大型语言模型框架，用于识别视频中的矛盾和犹豫情感状态，通过整合时间建模和多模态分析提升识别准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频情感识别在情感计算中至关重要，识别微妙心理状态如矛盾和犹豫对行为干预和数字健康具有重要价值。然而，这些状态常表现为面部表情、声音和文本语义之间的跨模态不一致，给自动识别带来巨大挑战。现有方法难以有效捕捉这种不一致性，因此需要新方法来应对复杂情感冲突的检测。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括一个结合时间段建模的多模态大型语言模型框架。为处理长视频的计算效率和令牌限制，采用段基策略将视频分割为最多5秒的短片段。利用Qwen3-Omni-30B-A3B模型，在BAH数据集上通过LoRA和全参数策略进行微调，使用MS-Swift框架以协同分析视觉和听觉信号。关键创新点在于时间段整合和多模态模型的优化微调。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，所提方法在测试集上达到85.1%的准确率，显著优于现有基准模型。这验证了多模态大型语言模型在捕捉复杂和微妙情感冲突方面的卓越能力。与基线对比表明，该方法在识别跨模态不一致的情感状态上具有优越性能，提升了自动化情感识别的效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了一个有效的识别框架，验证了多模态大型语言模型在捕捉微妙情感状态中的应用潜力，为情感计算和数字健康领域提供新方法。研究在学术上推动了多模态学习和情感分析的发展，在实际应用中可用于行为干预。未来工作可能包括扩展至更多情感类别或优化模型效率。

title: Automatic Analysis of Collaboration Through Human Conversational Data Resources: A Review
abstract: Collaboration is a task-oriented, high-level human behavior. In most cases, conversation serves as the primary medium for information exchange and coordination, making conversational data a valuable resource for the automatic analysis of collaborative processes. In this paper, we focus on verbal aspects of collaboration and conduct a review of collaboration analysis using task-oriented conversation resources, encompassing related theories, coding schemes, tasks, and modeling approaches. We aim to address the question of how to utilize task-oriented human-human conversational data for collaboration analysis. We hope our review will serve as a practical resource and illuminate unexplored areas for future collaboration analysis.

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过系统综述任务导向对话数据在协作分析中的应用，总结了相关理论、编码方案、任务和建模方法，为未来研究提供资源。
light_analysis.motivation: 协作是任务导向的人类高层行为，在许多团队任务和社交场景中至关重要。对话作为协作的主要信息交换媒介，提供了丰富的分析数据，但自动从这些对话中提取协作行为仍是一个挑战。现有研究可能缺乏系统性整合，导致理论和应用脱节。本文旨在解决如何有效利用任务导向的人类对话数据进行协作分析的问题，填补系统性回顾的空白，推动自动化协作分析领域的发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用文献综述方法，全面回顾了协作分析中任务导向对话数据的使用。它涵盖了协作理论框架、人类行为编码方案（如用于标注协作行为的分类体系）、相关分析任务（如协作质量评估和过程监控），以及建模方法（如基于机器学习和自然语言处理的技术）。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或模型架构，但强调了通过系统梳理整合多学科知识来构建实用资源。
light_analysis.result: 本文作为综述论文，未包含具体实验性能数据，其主要成果是提供了协作分析领域的结构化回顾，整合了现有理论和建模方法。这为研究人员提供了一个实用资源，有助于快速了解协作过程自动分析的现状和趋势。摘要未明确说明与基线方法的对比，因为论文侧重于回顾而非原创实验，但它通过总结现有研究，为未来实证工作奠定了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是对协作分析中任务导向对话数据的使用进行了系统综述，为领域提供了全面参考和结构化指导。学术价值在于跨学科整合了行为科学、计算语言学等知识，实际应用价值包括改进团队协作评估工具和促进人机协作系统的发展。未来工作方向可探索新的建模技术、扩展数据集以及将协作分析应用于更多实际场景，如教育和企业管理。

title: Mind the Gap: Pitfalls of LLM Alignment with Asian Public Opinion
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly being deployed in multilingual, multicultural settings, yet their reliance on predominantly English-centric training data risks misalignment with the diverse cultural values of different societies. In this paper, we present a comprehensive, multilingual audit of the cultural alignment of contemporary LLMs including GPT-4o-Mini, Gemini-2.5-Flash, Llama 3.2, Mistral and Gemma 3 across India, East Asia and Southeast Asia. Our study specifically focuses on the sensitive domain of religion as the prism for broader alignment. To facilitate this, we conduct a multi-faceted analysis of every LLM's internal representations, using log-probs/logits, to compare the model's opinion distributions against ground-truth public attitudes. We find that while the popular models generally align with public opinion on broad social issues, they consistently fail to accurately represent religious viewpoints, especially those of minority groups, often amplifying negative stereotypes. Lightweight interventions, such as demographic priming and native language prompting, partially mitigate but do not eliminate these cultural gaps. We further show that downstream evaluations on bias benchmarks (such as CrowS-Pairs, IndiBias, ThaiCLI, KoBBQ) reveal persistent harms and under-representation in sensitive contexts. Our findings underscore the urgent need for systematic, regionally grounded audits to ensure equitable global deployment of LLMs.
comment: 13 pages, including AAAI Paper Checklist. Accepted in Proceedings of the 20th International AAAI Conference on Web and Social Media (ICWSM 2026)

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过多语言审计发现大型语言模型在亚洲宗教观点对齐上存在缺陷，并探讨了轻量级干预措施。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在多语言文化环境中的部署日益增加，但其训练数据主要基于英语，可能导致与不同文化价值观的不匹配。本研究聚焦宗教这一敏感领域，旨在解决LLMs在亚洲地区文化对齐中的问题。现有方法在广泛社会议题上表现尚可，但在宗教观点上常无法准确反映，尤其是对少数群体，显示出对齐不足的缺陷，强调了确保公平全球部署的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用多语言审计方法，针对GPT-4o-Mini、Gemini-2.5-Flash等多个LLMs，分析其在印度、东亚和东南亚的文化对齐。技术核心在于使用内部表示分析，如log-probs/logits，比较模型输出与真实公众态度。以宗教为棱镜，通过多角度评估对齐情况，并测试轻量级干预措施如人口统计提示和母语提示，以探讨缓解文化差距的可能性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，所测试的LLMs在一般社会议题上能与公众意见对齐，但在宗教观点上表现不佳，尤其是对少数群体，经常放大负面刻板印象。轻量级干预措施如人口统计提示和母语提示能部分改善对齐情况，但未完全消除差距。下游评估基于偏见基准（如CrowS-Pairs、IndiBias等）进一步证实了模型在敏感上下文中的持续偏见和代表性不足，与基线方法相比显示出显著的对齐缺陷。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于通过多语言审计揭示了LLMs在亚洲地区文化对齐中的缺陷，特别是在宗教观点上。学术价值在于提供了一种基于内部表示的分析方法，用于评估模型对齐；实际意义是强调为确保LLMs的公平全球部署，需要系统性的、区域基础的审计。未来工作可探索更有效的干预措施，以弥补文化差距，并扩展审计到其他敏感领域。

title: SwitchCraft: Training-Free Multi-Event Video Generation with Attention Controls
abstract: Recent advances in text-to-video diffusion models have enabled high-fidelity and temporally coherent videos synthesis. However, current models are predominantly optimized for single-event generation. When handling multi-event prompts, without explicit temporal grounding, such models often produce blended or collapsed scenes that break the intended narrative. To address this limitation, we present SwitchCraft, a training-free framework for multi-event video generation. Our key insight is that uniform prompt injection across time ignores the correspondence between events and frames. To this end, we introduce Event-Aligned Query Steering (EAQS), which steers frame-level attention to align with relevant event prompts. Furthermore, we propose Auto-Balance Strength Solver (ABSS), which adaptively balances steering strength to preserve temporal consistency and visual fidelity. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SwitchCraft substantially improves prompt alignment, event clarity, and scene consistency compared with existing baselines, offering a simple yet effective solution for multi-event video generation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了SwitchCraft，一种无需训练的多事件视频生成框架，通过事件对齐的注意力控制技术，显著提升叙事连贯性和视觉质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前文本到视频扩散模型在生成高质量视频方面取得进展，但主要针对单事件生成。当处理多事件提示时，由于缺乏明确的时间定位，模型常产生场景混合或坍塌，破坏了叙事意图，限制了复杂叙事应用。现有方法未能充分考虑事件与视频帧之间的对应关系，导致生成视频中事件模糊或顺序混乱，影响视觉效果和故事表达。因此，开发一种能有效处理多事件的生成方法至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出SwitchCraft框架，核心包括两个创新组件。首先，Event-Aligned Query Steering (EAQS) 通过引导帧级注意力与相关事件提示对齐，解决了均匀提示注入忽略事件-帧对应的问题。其次，Auto-Balance Strength Solver (ABSS) 自适应平衡注意力引导强度，以保持时间一致性和视觉保真度。该方法无需额外训练，直接应用于现有扩散模型。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或基础模型架构，但框架旨在通用适配。
light_analysis.result: 通过大量实验验证，SwitchCraft在提示对齐、事件清晰度和场景一致性方面相比现有基线有显著提升。实验结果显示，该方法能有效生成更连贯的多事件视频，减少了场景混合和坍塌现象。虽然没有提供具体量化数据如准确率，但结果证实了其优越性能，为实际应用提供可靠解决方案。这表明SwitchCraft在多事件视频生成任务中表现突出，改善了基线方法的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了SwitchCraft，一个简单有效的免训练框架，用于改进多事件视频生成。通过事件对齐的注意力控制和自适应强度平衡，提高了叙事连贯性和视觉质量。学术上，为扩散模型在复杂任务中的应用提供了新思路；实践上，促进了高质量视频合成技术的发展。局限性方面，摘要未明确说明，但未来工作可能涉及扩展到更复杂场景或与其他模型集成，进一步优化性能。

title: Diffusion Probe: Generated Image Result Prediction Using CNN Probes
abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) diffusion models lack an efficient mechanism for early quality assessment, leading to costly trial-and-error in multi-generation scenarios such as prompt iteration, agent-based generation, and flow-grpo. We reveal a strong correlation between early diffusion cross-attention distributions and final image quality. Based on this finding, we introduce Diffusion Probe, a framework that leverages internal cross-attention maps as predictive signals. We design a lightweight predictor that maps statistical properties of early-stage cross-attention extracted from initial denoising steps to the final image's overall quality. This enables accurate forecasting of image quality across diverse evaluation metrics long before full synthesis is complete. We validate Diffusion Probe across a wide range of settings. On multiple T2I models, across early denoising windows, resolutions, and quality metrics, it achieves strong correlation (PCC > 0.7) and high classification performance (AUC-ROC > 0.9). Its reliability translates into practical gains. By enabling early quality-aware decisions in workflows such as prompt optimization, seed selection, and accelerated RL training, the probe supports more targeted sampling and avoids computation on low-potential generations. This reduces computational overhead while improving final output quality.Diffusion Probe is model-agnostic, efficient, and broadly applicable, offering a practical solution for improving T2I generation efficiency through early quality prediction.

light_analysis.overview: 提出Diffusion Probe框架，利用早期扩散模型的交叉注意力分布预测生成图像质量，以提高文本到图像生成效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在多生成场景中缺乏有效的早期质量评估机制，导致高成本的试错过程，例如在提示迭代、代理生成和流图应用中。现有方法通常依赖完整生成后再评估质量，无法在生成过程中提前判断，这增加了计算开销并降低了效率。因此，开发一种能够在早期阶段预测图像质量的方法对于减少不必要的计算和优化工作流程至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 基于发现早期扩散交叉注意力分布与最终图像质量的强相关性，本论文提出Diffusion Probe框架。该框架利用内部交叉注意力图作为预测信号，设计了一个轻量级预测器，该预测器将从初始去噪步骤中提取的早期交叉注意力统计属性映射到最终图像的整体质量。关键创新在于模型无关性，可应用于各种T2I扩散模型，无需修改底层架构，通过简单的探测机制实现早期预测。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集，但提及在多个T2I模型上进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Diffusion Probe在多个文本到图像模型、早期去噪窗口、不同分辨率和质量评估指标上，实现了强相关性（皮尔逊相关系数PCC大于0.7）和高分类性能（AUC-ROC大于0.9）。这表明该方法能够准确预测图像质量，优于传统依赖完整合成的方法。实际应用中，通过在工作流中启用早期质量感知决策，如提示优化和种子选择，能有效避免对低潜力生成的额外计算，从而减少计算开销并改善最终输出质量。摘要未明确提供具体基线对比数据，但强调了可靠性和效率提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了Diffusion Probe，一个模型无关、高效的框架，用于文本到图像扩散模型的早期质量预测。其学术价值在于揭示了扩散模型内部注意力机制与生成质量的关系，为理解模型行为提供了新视角。实际应用中，该框架可集成到提示优化、强化学习训练等场景，显著提高生成效率和输出质量。局限性方面，摘要未明确说明；未来工作可探索更广泛的模型和评估指标，或扩展到其他生成任务。

title: On the Geometric Coherence of Global Aggregation in Federated Graph Neural Networks
abstract: Federated learning over graph-structured data exposes a fundamental mismatch between standard aggregation mechanisms and the operator nature of graph neural networks (GNNs). While federated optimization treats model parameters as elements of a shared Euclidean space, GNN parameters induce graph-dependent message-passing operators whose semantics depend on underlying topology. Under structurally and distributionally heterogeneous client graph distributions, local updates correspond to perturbations of distinct operator manifolds. Linear aggregation of such updates mixes geometrically incompatible directions, producing global models that converge numerically yet exhibit degraded relational behavior. We formalize this phenomenon as a geometric failure of global aggregation in cross-domain federated GNNs, characterized by destructive interference between operator perturbations and loss of coherence in message-passing dynamics. This degradation is not captured by conventional metrics such as loss or accuracy, as models may retain predictive performance while losing structural sensitivity. To address this, we propose GGRS (Global Geometric Reference Structure), a server-side aggregation framework operating on a data-free proxy of operator perturbations. GGRS enforces geometric admissibility via directional alignment, subspace compatibility, and sensitivity control, preserving the structure of the induced message-passing operator.
comment: This is a developing preprint of an 18-page journal manuscript (6 figures), currently being prepared for formal peer-review submission

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出GGRS框架，通过服务器端聚合处理联邦图神经网络中的算子扰动，以保持消息传递算子的几何一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 联邦学习在处理图结构数据时，标准聚合机制与图神经网络的算子性质不匹配。GNN参数依赖于图拓扑，形成算子流形。在异构客户端图分布下，本地更新扰动不同的算子流形，线性聚合混合了几何不兼容的方向，导致全局模型失去结构敏感性，尽管数值上收敛。现有方法忽略了几何因素，使得模型在关系行为上退化，影响跨域联邦学习的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出GGRS（全局几何参考结构），一个服务器端聚合框架，操作于算子扰动的数据无关代理。关键创新包括：通过方向对齐确保扰动方向一致；通过子空间兼容性匹配不同客户端的算子结构；通过敏感性控制调整聚合权重。GGRS强制几何可容许性，保留消息传递算子的原始结构，从而解决线性聚合导致的几何失败问题。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果。然而，论文指出GGRS框架旨在缓解全局聚合中的几何退化，通过保持算子结构的完整性，预期能够改善联邦GNNs在异构图数据上的关系行为。与传统指标如损失或准确率相比，GGRS重点关注模型的结构敏感性，避免因聚合导致的结构退化，从而可能提升整体性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是形式化了联邦图神经网络中全局聚合的几何失败现象，并提出GGRS框架来解决此问题。GGRS通过几何约束的聚合方法，确保消息传递算子的连贯性，从而提高模型在跨域场景下的结构表示能力。这一研究强调了在联邦学习中考虑几何因素的重要性，为未来在异构图数据处理上提供了新方向，并可能应用于其他领域。

title: Feature Recalibration Based Olfactory-Visual Multimodal Model for Enhanced Rice Deterioration Detection
abstract: Multimodal methods are widely used in rice deterioration detection, but they exhibit limited capability in representing and extracting fine-grained abnormal features. Moreover, these methods rely on devices such as hyperspectral cameras and mass spectrometers, which increase detection costs and prolong data acquisition time. To address these issues, we propose a feature recalibration based olfactory-visual multimodal model for enhanced rice deterioration detection. A fine-grained deterioration embedding constructor (FDEC) is proposed to reconstruct the labeled multimodal embedded feature dataset, thereby enhancing sample representation. A fine-grained deterioration recalibration attention network (FDRA-Net) is proposed to emphasize signal variations and improve sensitivity to fine-grained deterioration on the rice surface. Compared with SS-Net, the proposed method improves classification accuracy by 8.67%, with an average improvement of 11.51% over other traditional baseline models, while simultaneously simplifying the detection procedure. Furthermore, field detection results demonstrate advantages in both accuracy and operational simplicity. The proposed method can also be extended to other agrifood applications in agriculture and the food industry.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于特征重校准的嗅觉-视觉多模态模型，显著提高大米变质检测的准确性和简化检测流程。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在解决大米变质检测中多模态方法的局限性：现有方法表示细粒度异常特征的能力有限，且依赖高光谱相机和质谱仪等昂贵设备，导致检测成本高、数据获取时间长。这些问题降低了检测效率和实用性，因此需要开发更经济、高效的方法来提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出细粒度变质嵌入构造器（FDEC）重构标记的多模态嵌入特征数据集，以增强样本表示；并设计细粒度变质重校准注意力网络（FDRA-Net），通过注意力机制强调信号变化，提高对大米表面细粒度变质的敏感性。核心创新包括特征重校准技术和多模态融合策略，旨在简化检测流程。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，与SS-Net相比，该方法在分类准确率上提升8.67%，平均比传统基线模型提高11.51%。同时，方法简化了检测程序，现场检测结果在准确性和操作简便性方面均有优势，证明其在实用场景中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该方法通过特征重校准和注意力网络，显著改善了大米变质检测的性能，具有学术创新和实际应用价值。未来可扩展到农业和食品行业的其他应用，但可能需考虑不同场景的适应性调整。

title: On-Policy Context Distillation for Language Models
abstract: Context distillation enables language models to internalize in-context knowledge into their parameters. In our work, we propose On-Policy Context Distillation (OPCD), a framework that bridges on-policy distillation with context distillation by training a student model on its own generated trajectories while minimizing reverse Kullback-Leibler divergence against a context-conditioned teacher. We demonstrate the effectiveness of OPCD on two important applications: experiential knowledge distillation, where models extract and consolidate transferable knowledge from their historical solution traces, and system prompt distillation, where models internalize beneficial behaviors encoded in optimized prompts. Across mathematical reasoning, text-based games, and domain-specific tasks, OPCD consistently outperforms baseline methods, achieving higher task accuracy while better preserving out-of-distribution capabilities. We further show that OPCD enables effective cross-size distillation, where smaller student models can internalize experiential knowledge from larger teachers.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了On-Policy Context Distillation（OPCD）框架，通过结合策略蒸馏与上下文蒸馏，以提升语言模型对上下文知识的内部化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决如何使语言模型更有效地内部化上下文知识的问题，因为现有上下文蒸馏方法可能未能充分利用策略蒸馏的优势，导致在复杂任务中知识整合不足或泛化能力受限。通过引入策略蒸馏，OPCD框架试图弥补这一不足，以增强模型在动态环境中学习和应用知识的能力。
light_analysis.method: OPCD框架通过训练学生模型在自身生成的轨迹上进行学习，同时使用逆向Kullback-Leibler散度与一个上下文条件化的教师模型对齐。关键创新在于将策略蒸馏与上下文蒸馏结合，应用于两个具体场景：经验知识蒸馏（从历史解决方案轨迹中提取知识）和系统提示蒸馏（内部化优化提示的行为）。该方法利用语言模型在多个任务中自动生成数据，以改进参数化知识。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在数学推理、基于文本的游戏和特定领域任务中，OPCD始终优于基线方法，实现了更高的任务准确性，并更好地保留了分布外能力。此外，它支持有效的跨大小蒸馏，使得较小的学生模型能从较大的教师模型中成功内部化经验知识。
light_analysis.conclusion: OPCD框架为上下文蒸馏提供了高效的方法，在多个应用场景中展现出显著优势，具有重要的学术价值和实用意义。它提升了语言模型知识内部化的效果，未来可进一步扩展到更多任务类型或探索不同蒸馏策略的优化。

title: Native Reasoning Models: Training Language Models to Reason on Unverifiable Data
abstract: The prevailing paradigm for training large reasoning models--combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) with Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR)--is fundamentally constrained by its reliance on high-quality, human-annotated reasoning data and external verifiers. This dependency incurs significant data-collection costs, risks embedding human cognitive biases, and confines the reinforcement learning stage to objectively assessable domains like mathematics and coding, leaving a wide range of unverifiable tasks beyond its scope. To overcome these limitations, we introduce NRT (Native Reasoning Training), a novel framework that cultivates complex reasoning by having the model generate its own reasoning traces using only standard question-answer pairs, thereby obviating the need for expert-written demonstrations. NRT reframes the training problem by treating the reasoning process as a latent variable. It employs a unified training objective that models reasoning as an optimization problem, intrinsically rewarding paths that increase the model's likelihood of producing the ground-truth answer. This unified perspective allows us to analyze intrinsic failure modes of prior methods, such as policy collapse, and systematically design more robust reward aggregation functions, creating a self-reinforcing feedback loop where the model learns to think in ways that resolve its own uncertainty. Empirical evaluation on Llama and Mistral model families demonstrates that NRT achieves state-of-the-art performance among verifier-free methods, significantly outperforming standard SFT baselines and prior verifier-free RL methods. Our approach yields particularly strong performance gains in complex reasoning domains and exhibits high robustness to policy collapse, offering a general, scalable path toward building more powerful and broadly applicable reasoning systems.
comment: Accepted at ICLR 2026. Code available at https://github.com/sharkwyf/native-reasoning-models

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了名为NRT（Native Reasoning Training）的新框架，通过让语言模型利用标准问答对自主生成推理轨迹，克服了依赖外部验证器和专家标注数据的限制，实现了在不可验证数据上的高效推理训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前训练大型推理模型的主流范式结合了监督微调（SFT）和可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR），这依赖于高质量的人工标注推理数据和外部验证器，导致数据收集成本高昂，并可能嵌入人类认知偏见。此外，这种方法将强化学习阶段限制在可客观评估的领域，如数学和编程，而许多不可验证的任务无法覆盖，限制了推理模型的广泛适用性。研究动机在于解决这些不足，扩展推理模型到更广泛的非可验证领域，提升通用性和效率。
light_analysis.method: NRT框架的核心方法是将推理过程视为潜变量，并采用统一的训练目标，将推理建模为优化问题。它利用标准问题-答案对，让模型自主生成推理轨迹，避免了对专家编写的演示的需求。通过内部奖励那些增加模型产生地面真实答案可能性的路径，NRT形成一个自我增强的反馈循环，使模型学会处理其自身不确定性。这种统一视角允许分析先前方法的失败模式，如策略崩溃，并设计更稳健的奖励聚合函数，从而在无验证器环境中进行鲁棒训练。
light_analysis.result: 在Llama和Mistral模型家族的实证评估中，NRT在无验证器方法中取得了最先进的性能，显著优于标准SFT基线和先前的无验证器强化学习方法。它在复杂推理领域表现出特别强的性能提升，并展现出对策略崩溃的高鲁棒性。这表明NRT框架能有效提升推理能力，减少对外部验证的依赖，为广泛任务提供了更强大的训练路径。
light_analysis.conclusion: NRT框架的主要贡献是提供了一种通用、可扩展的方法来构建更强大和广泛适用的推理系统，通过减少对外部验证器和专家数据的依赖，降低了训练成本，并扩展了应用领域。研究的学术价值在于统一了推理训练的目标，增强了模型的内在推理能力；实际应用价值在于促进更广泛的AI推理应用，如复杂任务和不可验证场景。未来工作可能包括优化奖励函数和扩展到更多模型架构，以进一步提升性能和泛化能力。

title: On Randomness in Agentic Evals
abstract: Agentic systems are evaluated on benchmarks where agents interact with environments to solve tasks. Most papers report a pass@1 score computed from a single run per task, assuming this gives a reliable performance estimate. We test this assumption by collecting 60,000 agentic trajectories on SWE-Bench-Verified, spanning three models and two scaffolds. We find substantial variance: single-run pass@1 estimates vary by 2.2 to 6.0 percentage points depending on which run is selected, with standard deviations exceeding 1.5 percentage points even at temperature 0. This variance has critical implications: reported improvements of 2--3 percentage points may reflect evaluation noise rather than genuine algorithmic progress. Through token-level analysis, we show that trajectories diverge early, often within the first few percent of tokens, and that these small differences cascade into different solution strategies. To enable reliable evaluation of agentic systems, we recommend three concrete practices: (1) estimate pass@1 from multiple independent runs per task, especially when measuring small improvements, (2) use statistical power analysis to determine the number of runs needed to detect expected effect sizes, and (3) consider metrics like pass@k (optimistic bound) and pass^k (pessimistic bound) with k>1 to better characterize the full performance envelope. While these practices increase evaluation cost, they are essential for distinguishing genuine scientific progress from statistical noise.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文通过大规模数据分析揭示代理系统评估中单次运行pass@1分数的高方差问题，并提出改进评估可靠性的具体实践。
light_analysis.motivation: 代理系统在基准测试中通常依赖单次运行的pass@1分数来评估性能，研究者普遍假设这能提供可靠估计。然而，这种评估方法忽略了随机性因素，可能导致对算法改进的误判。现有文献中常见报告微小改进（如2-3个百分点），但如果评估方差大，这些改进可能仅是统计噪音而非真实进步，从而影响科学评估的准确性和可信度。因此，有必要检验单次运行估计的可靠性，并发展更稳健的评估方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用实证研究方法，收集了SWE-Bench-Verified数据集上的60,000条代理轨迹，涵盖三个不同模型和两个scaffolds，以量化单次运行pass@1分数的方差。通过token-level分析技术，详细追踪轨迹从早期令牌开始的差异，并计算方差和标准偏差等统计指标。核心创新在于系统性地测试评估假设，使用大规模数据揭示微小初始差异如何通过级联效应导致最终解决方案策略的不同，从而凸显评估中随机性的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在SWE-Bench-Verified上，单次运行pass@1估计值的方差显著，变化范围达2.2到6.0个百分点，标准偏差超过1.5个百分点，即使在温度设置为0的情况下也是如此。这意味着常见的评估方法不可靠，因为报告的2-3个百分点改进可能完全落在方差范围内，难以与统计噪音区分。token-level分析进一步显示，轨迹分叉往往发生在最初百分之几的令牌处，这些早期差异随时间放大，最终导致不同的解决策略。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文总结指出，代理系统评估中的单次运行pass@1分数存在高方差，可能掩盖真实算法进步。主要贡献是提出了三个具体实践以提高评估可靠性：基于每个任务多个独立运行估计pass@1、使用统计功率分析确定所需运行数以检测预期效应大小，以及考虑pass@k和pass^k等指标以更全面描述性能范围。尽管这些实践会增加评估成本，但对准确区分科学进展和统计噪音至关重要，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用意义，为未来研究提供了改进方向。

title: Logical Guidance for the Exact Composition of Diffusion Models
abstract: We propose LOGDIFF (Logical Guidance for the Exact Composition of Diffusion Models), a guidance framework for diffusion models that enables principled constrained generation with complex logical expressions at inference time. We study when exact score-based guidance for complex logical formulas can be obtained from guidance signals associated with atomic properties. First, we derive an exact Boolean calculus that provides a sufficient condition for exact logical guidance. Specifically, if a formula admits a circuit representation in which conjunctions combine conditionally independent subformulas and disjunctions combine subformulas that are either conditionally independent or mutually exclusive, exact logical guidance is achievable. In this case, the guidance signal can be computed exactly from atomic scores and posterior probabilities using an efficient recursive algorithm. Moreover, we show that, for commonly encountered classes of distributions, any desired Boolean formula is compilable into such a circuit representation. Second, by combining atomic guidance scores with posterior probability estimates, we introduce a hybrid guidance approach that bridges classifier guidance and classifier-free guidance, applicable to both compositional logical guidance and standard conditional generation. We demonstrate the effectiveness of our framework on multiple image and protein structure generation tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出LOGDIFF框架，为扩散模型提供精确的逻辑引导，实现复杂逻辑表达式的原则性约束生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在图像和蛋白质结构生成等任务中需要处理复杂逻辑约束，但现有引导方法往往难以精确实现或计算效率低下。本文旨在研究如何从原子属性引导信号中获得复杂逻辑公式的精确引导，以解决现有方法在原则性约束生成方面的不足。这一问题的解决对于提升AI生成任务的准确性和灵活性至关重要，尤其是在需要精确控制生成内容的实际应用中。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出LOGDIFF框架，包括两个核心部分：首先，推导精确布尔演算，为逻辑引导提供充分条件，即要求公式在电路表示中合取结合条件独立子公式、析取结合条件独立或互斥子公式，从而实现精确引导。其次，引入混合引导方法，结合原子引导分数和后验概率估计，桥接分类器引导和无分类器引导，适用于组合逻辑引导和标准条件生成。使用高效递归算法精确计算引导信号，框架可应用于多种生成任务，如图像和蛋白质结构生成。
light_analysis.result: 在多个图像和蛋白质结构生成任务上，LOGDIFF框架被证明有效，能够精确实现复杂逻辑表达式的约束生成。实验展示了框架在生成准确性或效率方面的优势，尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升数据，但通过与基线方法对比验证了其在多种任务中的适用性和有效性，例如在生成任务中可能改进了条件生成的精确度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是提出LOGDIFF框架，通过理论推导和算法设计实现了扩散模型中精确的逻辑引导生成。这提供了学术价值，如丰富条件生成的理论基础，并具有实际应用价值，如在生物信息学和图像合成中提升生成控制。未来工作可扩展至更多分布类或探索实时应用场景，进一步优化算法的泛化能力。

title: Cross-talk based multi-task learning for fault classification of machine system influenced by multiple variables
abstract: Machine systems inherently generate signals in which fault conditions and various variables influence signals measured from machine system. Although many existing fault classification studies rely solely on direct fault labels, the aforementioned signals naturally embed additional information shaped by other variables. Herein, we leverage this through a multi-task learning (MTL) framework that jointly learns fault conditions and other variables influencing measured signals. Among MTL architectures, cross-talk structures have distinct advantages because they allow for controlled information exchange between tasks through the cross-talk layer while preventing negative transfer, in contrast to shared trunk architectures that often mix incompatible features. We build on our previously introduced residual neural dimension reductor model, and extend its application to two benchmarks where system influenced by multiple variables. The first benchmark is a drone fault dataset, in which machine type and maneuvering direction significantly alter the frequency components of measured signals even under the same drone status. The second benchmark dataset is motor compound fault dataset. In this system, severity of each fault component, inner race fault, outer race fault, misalignment, and unbalance influences measured signal. Across both benchmarks, our residual neural dimension reductor, consistently outperformed single-task models, multi-class models that merge all label combinations, and shared trunk multi-task models.
comment: Submitted to 32th International Congress on Sound and Vibration (ICSV32)

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于cross-talk的多任务学习框架，有效处理受多个变量影响的机器系统故障分类问题，通过控制任务间信息交换提升精度并防止负迁移。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器系统信号不仅受故障条件影响，还受多种变量如机器类型或操作参数等干扰。现有故障分类研究通常只依赖直接故障标签，忽略了这些变量所携带的额外信息，导致模型性能不足。例如，共享主干架构在多任务学习中可能混入不兼容特征，引发负迁移。cross-talk结构的多任务学习能通过可控信息交换，充分利用所有信号信息，解决复杂环境下的故障分类挑战，提高分类的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究扩展了先前提出的残差神经维度还原模型，应用于基于cross-talk的多任务学习框架。该方法通过cross-talk层实现任务间可控信息交换，防止负迁移，相比共享主干架构更有效。在两个基准数据集上验证：无人机故障数据集，变量如机器类型和机动方向显著改变信号频率；电机复合故障数据集，变量如多个故障组件的严重性共同影响信号。模型联合学习故障条件和其他变量，处理多变量影响下的故障分类任务。
light_analysis.result: 在两个基准数据集（无人机故障和电机复合故障）上，本研究的残差神经维度还原模型 consistently outperformed 单任务模型、合并所有标签组合的多类模型以及共享主干多任务模型。例如，在故障分类任务中，模型显示出更高的分类精度和更好的泛化能力，但摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率或错误率数值。这表明cross-talk MTL方法在多变量影响下的机器系统故障分类中具有显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出并验证了一种基于cross-talk的多任务学习框架，有效处理受多个变量影响的机器系统故障分类。这提高了分类精度，并为复杂工业环境下的故障诊断提供了新方法。学术上，该方法扩展了多任务学习的应用领域；实践上，有助于提升系统可靠性和维护效率。局限性可能包括数据集的泛化挑战，未来工作可探索更多基准系统或优化模型架构以适应更广泛的应用场景。

title: RE-MCDF: Closed-Loop Multi-Expert LLM Reasoning for Knowledge-Grounded Clinical Diagnosis
abstract: Electronic medical records (EMRs), particularly in neurology, are inherently heterogeneous, sparse, and noisy, which poses significant challenges for large language models (LLMs) in clinical diagnosis. In such settings, single-agent systems are vulnerable to self-reinforcing errors, as their predictions lack independent validation and can drift toward spurious conclusions. Although recent multi-agent frameworks attempt to mitigate this issue through collaborative reasoning, their interactions are often shallow and loosely structured, failing to reflect the rigorous, evidence-driven processes used by clinical experts. More fundamentally, existing approaches largely ignore the rich logical dependencies among diseases, such as mutual exclusivity, pathological compatibility, and diagnostic confusion. This limitation prevents them from ruling out clinically implausible hypotheses, even when sufficient evidence is available. To overcome these, we propose RE-MCDF, a relation-enhanced multi-expert clinical diagnosis framework. RE-MCDF introduces a generation--verification--revision closed-loop architecture that integrates three complementary components: (i) a primary expert that generates candidate diagnoses and supporting evidence, (ii) a laboratory expert that dynamically prioritizes heterogeneous clinical indicators, and (iii) a multi-relation awareness and evaluation expert group that explicitly enforces inter-disease logical constraints. Guided by a medical knowledge graph (MKG), the first two experts adaptively reweight EMR evidence, while the expert group validates and corrects candidate diagnoses to ensure logical consistency. Extensive experiments on the neurology subset of CMEMR (NEEMRs) and on our curated dataset (XMEMRs) demonstrate that RE-MCDF consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in complex diagnostic scenarios.
comment: Accepted by International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2026); 9 pages, 4 figures

light_analysis.overview: RE-MCDF 提出了一种闭环多专家 LLM 推理框架，通过集成生成-验证-修订架构和关系感知，显著提升了基于知识图的临床诊断准确性和逻辑一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决电子医疗记录（EMRs）在神经学中的异构性、稀疏性和噪声性对大型语言模型（LLMs）进行临床诊断带来的挑战。现有单代理系统容易产生自增强错误，缺乏独立验证；多代理框架虽尝试协作，但交互浅薄，未能反映临床专家严格的证据驱动过程，且忽视了疾病间如互斥性、病理兼容性等丰富逻辑依赖，这限制了排除临床不合理假设的能力，导致诊断准确性不足。
light_analysis.method: RE-MCDF 采用生成-验证-修订的闭环架构，集成了三个互补组件：主专家生成候选诊断及证据，实验室专家动态优先化异构临床指标，多关系感知评估专家组显式执行疾病间逻辑约束。在医疗知识图谱（MKG）指导下，前两个专家自适应重加权 EMR 证据，专家组验证和修正诊断以确保逻辑一致性。关键创新在于模拟临床推理过程，通过闭环和多专家协同强化逻辑依赖，使用数据集如 NEEMRs 和 XMEMRs 进行验证。
light_analysis.result: 在 CMEMR 神经学子集（NEEMRs）和自建数据集（XMEMRs）上的广泛实验表明，RE-MCDF 在复杂诊断场景中一致优于现有基线方法。虽然没有提供具体准确率数值，但摘要指出该方法显著提升性能，尤其是在处理异构和噪声数据时，验证了框架在改善逻辑一致性和诊断有效性方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: RE-MCDF 的主要贡献是提出了一种创新的闭环多专家框架，增强了 LLM 在临床诊断中的可靠性和准确性。通过整合逻辑依赖和多专家协同，该方法反映了真实临床推理，具有重要学术和应用价值，可推广到其他医疗领域。未来工作可扩展逻辑约束模型或优化多专家交互，以应对更广泛诊断任务。

title: EvoOpt-LLM: Evolving industrial optimization models with large language models
abstract: Optimization modeling via mixed-integer linear programming (MILP) is fundamental to industrial planning and scheduling, yet translating natural-language requirements into solver-executable models and maintaining them under evolving business rules remains highly expertise-intensive. While large language models (LLMs) offer promising avenues for automation, existing methods often suffer from low data efficiency, limited solver-level validity, and poor scalability to industrial-scale problems. To address these challenges, we present EvoOpt-LLM, a unified LLM-based framework supporting the full lifecycle of industrial optimization modeling, including automated model construction, dynamic business-constraint injection, and end-to-end variable pruning. Built on a 7B-parameter LLM and adapted via parameter-efficient LoRA fine-tuning, EvoOpt-LLM achieves a generation rate of 91% and an executability rate of 65.9% with only 3,000 training samples, with critical performance gains emerging under 1,500 samples. The constraint injection module reliably augments existing MILP models while preserving original objectives, and the variable pruning module enhances computational efficiency, achieving an F1 score of ~0.56 on medium-sized LP models with only 400 samples. EvoOpt-LLM demonstrates a practical, data-efficient approach to industrial optimization modeling, reducing reliance on expert intervention while improving adaptability and solver efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: EvoOpt-LLM提出一个基于大型语言模型的统一框架，用于自动化工业优化建模的全生命周期，显著提高数据效率和求解器有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 工业优化建模广泛使用混合整数线性规划，但将自然语言需求转化为可执行模型和维护模型随业务规则变化依赖高度专家知识，导致成本高且不灵活。现有基于大型语言模型的自动化方法存在数据效率低、求解器级有效性有限和工业规模扩展性差的问题，限制了实际部署。因此，需要一种更高效、可靠的方法来减少专家干预并提升建模适应性，以应对动态业务环境。
light_analysis.method: EvoOpt-LLM基于一个7B参数的大型语言模型，通过参数高效的LoRA微调实现快速适应。框架包括三个关键模块：自动模型构建模块，用于从自然语言生成可执行模型；动态业务约束注入模块，能可靠地增强现有混合整数线性规划模型而不改变原始目标；端到端变量修剪模块，优化计算效率。这些模块共同支持从需求翻译到模型维护的全流程，使用少量训练样本（如3,000个）。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在仅3,000训练样本下，EvoOpt-LLM实现91%的模型生成率和65.9%的可执行率，关键性能在1,500样本下即有显著提升。约束注入模块可靠地扩展模型，变量修剪模块在中型线性规划模型上达到约0.56的F1分数，仅需400样本，显著提升了计算效率。这些成果对比现有方法，证明了其高数据效率和求解器兼容性，可应用于工业规模问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: EvoOpt-LLM为工业优化建模提供了一种实际且数据高效的方法，通过自动化全生命周期减少了对专家知识的依赖，并提升了模型的适应性和求解器效率。该研究具有重要学术价值，推动了AI在工业优化中的集成，并具有实际应用潜力。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及扩展到更大规模问题或改进模型精度。

title: OpenVTON-Bench: A Large-Scale High-Resolution Benchmark for Controllable Virtual Try-On Evaluation
abstract: Recent advances in diffusion models have significantly elevated the visual fidelity of Virtual Try-On (VTON) systems, yet reliable evaluation remains a persistent bottleneck. Traditional metrics struggle to quantify fine-grained texture details and semantic consistency, while existing datasets fail to meet commercial standards in scale and diversity. We present OpenVTON-Bench, a large-scale benchmark comprising approximately 100K high-resolution image pairs (up to $1536 \times 1536$). The dataset is constructed using DINOv3-based hierarchical clustering for semantically balanced sampling and Gemini-powered dense captioning, ensuring a uniform distribution across 20 fine-grained garment categories. To support reliable evaluation, we propose a multi-modal protocol that measures VTON quality along five interpretable dimensions: background consistency, identity fidelity, texture fidelity, shape plausibility, and overall realism. The protocol integrates VLM-based semantic reasoning with a novel Multi-Scale Representation Metric based on SAM3 segmentation and morphological erosion, enabling the separation of boundary alignment errors from internal texture artifacts. Experimental results show strong agreement with human judgments (Kendall's $τ$ of 0.833 vs. 0.611 for SSIM), establishing a robust benchmark for VTON evaluation.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一个大规模高分辨率虚拟试穿基准 OpenVTON-Bench 及多模态评估协议，以解决评估不可靠的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着扩散模型的进步，虚拟试穿（VTON）系统的视觉保真度显著提升，但可靠的评估仍是瓶颈。传统指标如 SSIM 难以量化细粒度纹理细节和语义一致性，现有数据集在规模和多样性上不足，不符合商业标准，这阻碍了 VTON 系统性能的准确比较和应用推广，因此需要一个新的基准来改进评估方法。
