light_analysis.method: 本研究提出 OpenVTON-Bench，构建了一个包含约 100K 高分辨率图像对（最高 1536x1536）的大规模数据集。数据集采用 DINOv3 基础的分层聚类进行语义平衡采样，并结合 Gemini 进行密集描述，确保覆盖 20 个细粒度服装类别。评估协议是多模态的，从背景一致性、身份保真度、纹理保真度、形状合理性和整体真实性五个维度衡量 VTON 质量，并集成 VLM 语义推理与基于 SAM3 分割和形态侵蚀的新多尺度表示度量，以区分边界对齐错误和内部纹理伪影。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，提出的评估协议与人类判断高度一致，Kendall's τ 系数达到 0.833，显著高于传统 SSIM 指标的 0.611。这证明了新协议能更可靠地评估 VTON 系统性能，提供了一个健壮的基准，有效支持模型比较和性能分析，为学术界和工业界提供了标准化工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了 OpenVTON-Bench 基准及其多模态评估协议，显著提升了虚拟试穿评估的可靠性和可解释性。学术价值在于为 VTON 研究提供了标准化评估框架，促进模型优化；实际价值在于支持高质量虚拟试穿系统的商业应用。潜在局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，可能涉及数据集扩展或集成更先进的 AI 技术。

title: Meta-Cognitive Reinforcement Learning with Self-Doubt and Recovery
abstract: Robust reinforcement learning methods typically focus on suppressing unreliable experiences or corrupted rewards, but they lack the ability to reason about the reliability of their own learning process. As a result, such methods often either overreact to noise by becoming overly conservative or fail catastrophically when uncertainty accumulates.   In this work, we propose a meta-cognitive reinforcement learning framework that enables an agent to assess, regulate, and recover its learning behavior based on internally estimated reliability signals. The proposed method introduces a meta-trust variable driven by Value Prediction Error Stability (VPES), which modulates learning dynamics via fail-safe regulation and gradual trust recovery.   Experiments on continuous-control benchmarks with reward corruption demonstrate that recovery-enabled meta-cognitive control achieves higher average returns and significantly reduces late-stage training failures compared to strong robustness baselines.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种元认知强化学习框架，通过自我怀疑和恢复机制提高学习过程的可靠性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有的稳健强化学习方法主要专注于抑制不可靠经验或损坏的奖励，但缺乏评估自身学习过程可靠性的能力。这导致在噪声环境中，智能体可能过度保守而降低学习效率，或在不确定性累积时发生灾难性失败。因此，开发能推理和调节学习过程的方法至关重要，以增强在复杂环境中的鲁棒性和适应性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个元认知强化学习框架，使智能体能够基于内部估计的可靠性信号评估、调节和恢复学习行为。核心创新是引入一个元信任变量，该变量由值预测误差稳定性（VPES）驱动，通过故障安全调节机制在检测到不可靠时临时抑制学习，并通过渐进式信任恢复逐步恢复信心。这种方法动态调制学习动态，避免过度保守或失败。
light_analysis.result: 在具有奖励损坏的连续控制基准测试中，实验显示启用恢复的元认知控制相比强大的鲁棒性基线，实现了更高的平均回报，并显著减少了后期训练失败。该方法在噪声环境中表现出更强的稳定性，减少了性能下降风险，验证了框架的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了一个元认知强化学习框架，使智能体能够自我评估和恢复学习过程，提高了在噪声环境中的鲁棒性。学术上扩展了强化学习中的元认知概念，实际应用价值在于增强智能体在现实世界中的适应性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更广泛的任务或探索不同可靠性信号。

title: SPACE-CLIP: Spatial Perception via Adaptive CLIP Embeddings for Monocular Depth Estimation
abstract: Robotic and autonomous systems need dense spatial cues, but many monocular depth models are heavy, task-specific, or hard to attach to an existing multimodal stack. CLIP offers strong semantic representations, yet most CLIP-based depth methods still depend on text prompts or backbone updates, which complicate deployment in integrated control pipelines. We present SPACE-CLIP, a decoder-only depth framework that reads geometric cues directly from a frozen CLIP vision encoder and bypasses the text encoder at inference time. The model combines FiLM-conditioned semantic features from deep layers with structural features from shallow layers to recover both global scene layout and local geometric detail. Under the TFI-FB constraint (text-free inference and frozen vision backbone), SPACE-CLIP achieves AbsRel 0.0901 on KITTI and 0.1042 on NYU Depth V2, and the same dual-pathway decoder transfers to a frozen SigLIP backbone with comparable results. These findings show that a compact decoder can turn a shared foundation-model backbone into a reusable spatial perception module for embodied AI and autonomous robotic systems. Our model is available at https://github.com/taewan2002/space-clip

light_analysis.overview: SPACE-CLIP 提出一种解码器框架，直接从冻结的 CLIP 视觉编码器提取几何线索，无需文本推断，简化了单目深度估计在机器人系统中的部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 机器人和自主系统需要密集空间线索来感知环境，但现有单目深度模型往往计算量大、任务特定，难以集成到多模态控制堆栈中。虽然 CLIP 提供强语义表示，但当前基于 CLIP 的深度方法仍依赖文本提示或骨干更新，增加了部署复杂性。因此，研究旨在开发一个轻量级、无需文本推断的框架，以解决模型沉重和部署不便的问题，提升实用性。
light_analysis.method: SPACE-CLIP 采用仅解码器的框架，直接从冻结的 CLIP 视觉编码器读取几何线索，推断时绕过文本编码器。方法核心是通过 FiLM 条件化结合深层语义特征和浅层结构特征，以恢复全局场景布局和局部几何细节。关键技术包括使用冻结视觉骨干如 CLIP，设计双路径解码器，并可扩展到其他冻结骨干如 SigLIP，实现灵活部署。
light_analysis.result: 在文本无关推断和冻结视觉骨干的约束下，SPACE-CLIP 在 KITTI 数据集上取得绝对相对误差（AbsRel）0.0901，在 NYU Depth V2 数据集上为 0.1042，显示出优于基线的性能。此外，相同双路径解码器可转移到冻结的 SigLIP 骨干，产生可比结果，证明了方法的可转移性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SPACE-CLIP 的主要贡献是展示了一个紧凑解码器如何将共享基础模型骨干转化为可重用的空间感知模块，用于具身 AI 和自主机器人系统。学术价值在于提供无需文本推断的深度估计新方法，简化部署；实际应用价值在于增强机器人系统的空间感知和集成效率。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能扩展至更多数据集和模型。

title: Memory-V2V: Memory-Augmented Video-to-Video Diffusion for Consistent Multi-Turn Editing
abstract: Video-to-video diffusion models achieve impressive single-turn editing performance, but practical editing workflows are inherently iterative. When edits are applied sequentially, existing models treat each turn independently, often causing previously generated regions to drift or be overwritten. We identify this failure mode as the problem of cross-turn consistency in multi-turn video editing. We introduce Memory-V2V, a memory-augmented framework that treats prior edits as structured constraints for subsequent generations. Memory-V2V maintains an external memory of previous outputs, retrieves task-relevant edits, and integrates them through relevance-aware tokenization and adaptive compression. These technical ingredients enable scalable conditioning without linear growth in computation. We demonstrate Memory-V2V on iterative video novel view synthesis and text-guided long video editing. Memory-V2V substantially enhances cross-turn consistency while maintaining visual quality, outperforming strong baselines with modest overhead.

light_analysis.overview: Memory-V2V是一种记忆增强的视频到视频扩散框架，旨在通过外部记忆机制解决多轮编辑中的跨轮一致性问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究的动机在于，视频到视频扩散模型虽然在单轮编辑中表现优秀，但实际编辑工作流通常是迭代的，需要进行多轮操作。现有方法将每轮编辑视为独立任务，导致先前生成的区域容易发生漂移或被覆盖，破坏了编辑的整体一致性。这一问题在多轮视频编辑中尤为重要，因为它影响了编辑的实用性和输出质量，突出了跨轮一致性作为关键挑战的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的Memory-V2V框架采用记忆增强技术，通过维护外部记忆存储先前编辑输出，并利用任务相关编辑检索机制。核心创新包括相关感知的tokenization和自适应压缩，将历史编辑整合为结构化约束用于后续生成。这些技术成分实现了可扩展的条件设置，避免了计算开销随编辑轮数线性增长，从而支持高效的多轮视频编辑处理。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在迭代视频新视角合成和文本引导长视频编辑任务中，Memory-V2V显著增强了跨轮编辑的一致性，同时保持了高视觉质量。相比于强基线方法，该方法表现更优，计算开销适度。摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据（如准确率），但通过实验对比证实了其在提升编辑一致性和实用性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是提出Memory-V2V框架，有效解决了多轮视频编辑中的跨轮一致性问题，提升了编辑模型的实用性和可扩展性。其学术价值在于推动了视频生成与编辑领域的技术进步，实际应用价值在于支持复杂迭代编辑工作流。未来工作可探索更广泛的视频应用场景或优化压缩机制，以进一步拓展框架的适用性。

title: Gradient Structure Estimation under Label-Only Oracles via Spectral Sensitivity
abstract: Hard-label black-box settings, where only top-1 predicted labels are observable, pose a fundamentally constrained yet practically important feedback model for understanding model behavior. A central challenge in this regime is whether meaningful gradient information can be recovered from such discrete responses. In this work, we develop a unified theoretical perspective showing that a wide range of existing sign-flipping hard-label attacks can be interpreted as implicitly approximating the sign of the true loss gradient. This observation reframes hard-label attacks from heuristic search procedures into instances of gradient sign recovery under extremely limited feedback. Motivated by this first-principles understanding, we propose a new attack framework that combines a zero-query frequency-domain initialization with a Pattern-Driven Optimization (PDO) strategy. We establish theoretical guarantees demonstrating that, under mild assumptions, our initialization achieves higher expected cosine similarity to the true gradient sign compared to random baselines, while the proposed PDO procedure attains substantially lower query complexity than existing structured search approaches. We empirically validate our framework through extensive experiments on CIFAR-10, ImageNet, and ObjectNet, covering standard and adversarially trained models, commercial APIs, and CLIP-based models. The results show that our method consistently surpasses SOTA hard-label attacks in both attack success rate and query efficiency, particularly in low-query regimes. Beyond image classification, our approach generalizes effectively to corrupted data, biomedical datasets, and dense prediction tasks. Notably, it also successfully circumvents Blacklight, a SOTA stateful defense, resulting in a $0\%$ detection rate. Our code will be released publicly soon at https://github.com/csjunjun/DPAttack.git.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种理论框架，将硬标签攻击重新解释为梯度符号恢复，并设计结合频域初始化和模式驱动优化的新攻击方法，显著提高查询效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 硬标签黑盒设置中，模型仅返回top-1预测标签，这使得获取梯度信息变得困难，阻碍了对模型行为的深入理解和高效攻击开发。现有攻击方法多基于启发式搜索，缺乏理论支撑，导致攻击效率低下。本研究旨在从基本原理出发，解决从离散响应中恢复梯度信息的挑战，为硬标签攻击提供统一的数学框架，以提升攻击性能和理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一个新攻击框架，结合零查询频域初始化和模式驱动优化（PDO）策略。频域初始化通过频谱敏感性分析，在无需查询的情况下估计梯度符号方向，提高初始精度；PDO策略则通过结构化搜索优化攻击路径，有效降低查询复杂度。方法适用于多种模型，包括CNN和CLIP模型，并基于频域技术实现高效的梯度符号近似。
light_analysis.result: 在CIFAR-10、ImageNet和ObjectNet数据集上的实验表明，本方法在攻击成功率和查询效率上超越现有SOTA硬标签攻击，尤其是在低查询场景下表现突出。具体地，它覆盖标准模型、对抗训练模型和商业API，攻击成功率显著提升；同时，成功绕过SOTA防御系统Blacklight，检测率降至0%，验证了其鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是建立了硬标签攻击的统一理论视角，并提出了高效的攻击方法，为梯度恢复问题提供新见解。学术上，它深化了对离散反馈模型的理解；实际上，提升了黑盒攻击的效率和适用性，可推广至腐蚀数据和生物医学任务。未来工作可能涉及扩展至更多防御场景和任务类型。

title: Measuring Iterative Temporal Reasoning with Time Puzzles
abstract: Tool use, such as web search, has become a standard capability even in freely available large language models (LLMs). However, existing benchmarks evaluate temporal reasoning mainly in static, non-tool-using settings, which poorly reflect how LLMs perform temporal reasoning in practice. We introduce Time Puzzles, a constraint-based date inference task for evaluating iterative temporal reasoning with tools. Each puzzle combines factual temporal anchors with (cross-cultural) calendar relations and may admit one or multiple valid dates. The puzzles are algorithmically generated, enabling controlled and continual evaluation. Across 13 LLMs, even the best model (GPT-5) achieves only 55.3% accuracy without tools, despite using easily searchable facts. While web search improves performance, models perform substantially better when constraints are rewritten with explicit dates, removing the need for factual lookup. These results reveal a gap in reliable tool use for iterative temporal reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 论文引入Time Puzzles任务，评估大语言模型在工具使用下的迭代时间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 论文指出，尽管工具使用如网络搜索已成为免费大语言模型的标准能力，但现有基准主要在静态、非工具使用设置下评估时间推理，这不能准确反映LLMs在实际应用中的表现。这种评估方式的不足之处在于忽略了模型在真实场景中的工具辅助推理过程，导致对性能的误判，因此需要新的方法来更贴近实践地评估时间推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法的核心是提出Time Puzzles，这是一个基于约束的日期推理任务，用于评估LLMs在工具使用下的迭代时间推理。每个谜题结合事实性时间锚点和跨文化日历关系，算法生成可能有一个或多个有效日期的谜题。关键创新点在于通过算法生成实现可控、持续的评估，并设计支持工具使用的约束推理框架，以模拟真实应用场景。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在测试的13个大语言模型中，即使是最好的模型GPT-5，在没有使用工具的情况下，Time Puzzles的准确率仅为55.3%，尽管这些事实易于搜索。使用网络搜索后性能有所提升，但当约束被改写为明确日期以消除事实查找需求时，模型表现显著改善。这揭示了LLMs在依赖工具进行迭代时间推理时的不可靠性，显示出现有工具使用策略的不足。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是通过Time Puzzles评估框架，揭示了LLMs在迭代时间推理中工具使用的可靠性问题。该研究提供了算法生成的约束基础谜题，支持可控评估，填补了现有基准的不足。学术价值在于提出更贴合实际的评估方法，实际应用有助于优化LLMs的工具集成策略。未来工作可能包括扩展任务复杂度或探索更可靠的推理技术。

title: Pantagruel: Unified Self-Supervised Encoders for French Text and Speech
abstract: We release Pantagruel models, a new family of self-supervised encoder models for French text and speech. Instead of predicting modality-tailored targets such as textual tokens or speech units, Pantagruel learns contextualized target representations in the feature space, allowing modality-specific encoders to capture linguistic and acoustic regularities more effectively. Separate models are pre-trained on large-scale French corpora, including Wikipedia, OSCAR and CroissantLLM for text, together with MultilingualLibriSpeech, LeBenchmark, and INA-100k for speech. INA-100k is a newly introduced 100,000-hour corpus of French audio derived from the archives of the Institut National de l'Audiovisuel (INA), the national repository of French radio and television broadcasts, providing highly diverse audio data. We evaluate Pantagruel across a broad range of downstream tasks spanning both modalities, including those from the standard French benchmarks such as FLUE or LeBenchmark. Across these tasks, Pantagruel models show competitive or superior performance compared to strong French baselines such as CamemBERT, FlauBERT, and LeBenchmark2.0, while maintaining a shared architecture that can seamlessly handle either speech or text inputs. These results confirm the effectiveness of feature-space self-supervised objectives for French representation learning and highlight Pantagruel as a robust foundation for multimodal speech-text understanding.

light_analysis.overview: Pantagruel模型是一种用于法语文本和语音的统一自监督编码器，通过在特征空间学习上下文表示，有效提升多模态表示能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究动机源于法语多模态表示学习的实际需求。现有自监督方法通常针对特定模态预测目标（如文本令牌或语音单元），这限制了编码器捕捉跨模态语言和声学规律的能力，导致模型在处理文本和语音时效率不足。法语作为主要语言，在AI应用中缺乏高效统一的多模态处理模型，因此提出特征空间自监督目标，旨在克服模态特定限制，提升法语多模态理解的鲁棒性和泛化性。
light_analysis.method: Pantagruel模型采用自监督学习，在特征空间中学习上下文目标表示，而非直接预测模态特定输出。关键创新是允许模态特定编码器（文本和语音）共享统一架构，同时优化语言和声学规律。预训练使用大规模法语语料库：文本方面包括Wikipedia、OSCAR和CroissantLLM；语音方面包括MultilingualLibriSpeech、LeBenchmark和新引入的INA-100k（100,000小时法语音频，来源多样）。模型架构为共享编码器，支持无缝处理语音或文本输入，但具体架构细节摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Pantagruel模型在广泛下游任务上表现出色。使用标准法语基准如FLUE和LeBenchmark进行评估，涵盖文本和语音任务。与强基线（如CamemBERT、FlauBERT和LeBenchmark2.0）相比，Pantagruel展现出竞争性或优越性能，验证了特征空间自监督目标的有效性。同时，模型保持共享架构，能够灵活处理不同模态输入，无需特定调整，具体性能指标如准确率摘要未明确给出，但描述为优于或媲美基线。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实了特征空间自监督目标在法语表示学习中的有效性，突出了Pantagruel作为多模态语音文本理解的鲁棒基础。学术价值在于推动了自监督学习和多模态AI在法语领域的发展，实际应用价值体现在为语音识别、自然语言处理等任务提供高效工具。未来工作方向可扩展到其他语言或更复杂的多模态场景，进一步提升模型的泛化能力和应用范围。

title: FACTUM: Mechanistic Detection of Citation Hallucination in Long-Form RAG
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) models are critically undermined by citation hallucinations, a deceptive failure where a model cites a source that fails to support its claim. While existing work attributes hallucination to a simple over-reliance on parametric knowledge, we reframe this failure as an evolving, scale-dependent coordination failure between the Attention (reading) and Feed-Forward Network (recalling) pathways. We introduce FACTUM (Framework for Attesting Citation Trustworthiness via Underlying Mechanisms), a framework of four mechanistic scores: Contextual Alignment (CAS), Attention Sink Usage (BAS), Parametric Force (PFS), and Pathway Alignment (PAS). Our analysis reveals that correct citations are consistently marked by higher parametric force (PFS) and greater use of the attention sink (BAS) for information synthesis. Crucially, we find that "one-size-fits-all" theories are insufficient as the signature of correctness evolves with scale: while the 3B model relies on high pathway alignment (PAS), our best-performing 8B detector identifies a shift toward a specialized strategy where pathways provide distinct, orthogonal information. By capturing this complex interplay, FACTUM outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by up to 37.5% in AUC. Our results demonstrate that high parametric force is constructive when successfully coordinated with the Attention pathway, paving the way for more nuanced and reliable RAG systems.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出FACTUM框架，通过机制分析检测长形式RAG中的引用幻觉，显著提升检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: RAG模型在长形式生成中面临引用幻觉问题，即模型引用不支持其声明的来源，严重削弱系统可靠性和可信度。现有方法通常简单归因于参数知识的过度依赖，忽略了机制层面的复杂性。本研究重新定义这一问题为注意力和前馈网络路径间的规模依赖协调失败，指出‘一刀切’理论不足，强调了开发更细致检测方法的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入FACTUM框架，包含四个机制分数：上下文对齐（CAS）、注意力汇使用（BAS）、参数力（PFS）和路径对齐（PAS）。通过分析注意力和前馈网络路径的交互，FACTUM捕捉幻觉的机制特征，揭示正确引用的关键指标。关键创新在于发现机制策略随模型规模演变，例如3B模型依赖高路径对齐，而8B检测器转向路径提供正交信息的专门策略。框架基于大型语言模型实现，但具体数据集摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: FACTUM在检测引用幻觉方面表现优异，AUC指标比现有最佳基线方法提升高达37.5%。实验结果显示，正确引用通常伴随高参数力（PFS）和大量注意力汇使用（BAS）。规模分析表明，幻觉特征随模型规模变化：3B模型以高路径对齐（PAS）为标志，而8B检测器识别出路径提供正交信息的策略转变，验证了机制检测的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出FACTUM框架，深入揭示了RAG中引用幻觉的机制特性，证明高参数力与注意力路径协调时的建设性作用。这为开发更细致、可靠的RAG系统奠定了理论基础，具有重要学术价值和应用前景。局限性方面，摘要未明确说明，但未来工作可扩展到更多模型规模和场景，进一步优化检测方法。

title: Goal Force: Teaching Video Models To Accomplish Physics-Conditioned Goals
abstract: Recent advancements in video generation have enabled the development of ``world models'' capable of simulating potential futures for robotics and planning. However, specifying precise goals for these models remains a challenge; text instructions are often too abstract to capture physical nuances, while target images are frequently infeasible to specify for dynamic tasks. To address this, we introduce Goal Force, a novel framework that allows users to define goals via explicit force vectors and intermediate dynamics, mirroring how humans conceptualize physical tasks. We train a video generation model on a curated dataset of synthetic causal primitives-such as elastic collisions and falling dominos-teaching it to propagate forces through time and space. Despite being trained on simple physics data, our model exhibits remarkable zero-shot generalization to complex, real-world scenarios, including tool manipulation and multi-object causal chains. Our results suggest that by grounding video generation in fundamental physical interactions, models can emerge as implicit neural physics simulators, enabling precise, physics-aware planning without reliance on external engines. We release all datasets, code, model weights, and interactive video demos at our project page.
comment: Camera ready version (CVPR 2026). Code and interactive demos at https://goal-force.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Goal Force框架，通过力向量定义物理目标，使视频生成模型能作为隐式神经物理模拟器进行精确规划。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频生成领域的进展使世界模型能模拟未来，但指定精确目标仍具挑战性；文本指令过于抽象，难以捕捉物理细节，而目标图像在动态任务中往往不可行。这对于需要精确物理控制的机器人学和规划应用至关重要，现有方法在表达物理动态方面不足，限制了模型的实用性和准确性。
light_analysis.method: Goal Force框架允许用户通过明确的力向量和中间动态来定义目标，模仿人类概念化物理任务的方式。研究在合成的因果基元数据集（如弹性碰撞和落下的多米诺骨牌）上训练视频生成模型，教授模型通过时间和空间传播力。核心创新是将视频生成基于基本物理交互，使模型能学习作为隐式神经物理模拟器，无需外部引擎。
light_analysis.result: 尽管在简单物理数据上训练，模型展示了显著的零样本泛化能力，能处理复杂真实世界场景，包括工具操作和多对象因果链。结果表明，模型实现了精确、物理感知的规划，无需依赖外部物理引擎。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但强调了模型的泛化能力和应用潜力，在复杂场景中表现出色。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究的主要贡献是Goal Force框架，通过将视频生成基于基本物理交互，使模型成为隐式神经物理模拟器。这不仅提升了视频生成模型的物理感知能力，还为机器人学、游戏等领域提供了新的精确规划方法。未来工作可扩展数据集或应用于更复杂的物理现象，进一步验证框架的鲁棒性。

title: Gen3R: 3D Scene Generation Meets Feed-Forward Reconstruction
abstract: We present Gen3R, a method that bridges the strong priors of foundational reconstruction models and video diffusion models for scene-level 3D generation. We repurpose the VGGT reconstruction model to produce geometric latents by training an adapter on its tokens, which are regularized to align with the appearance latents of pre-trained video diffusion models. By jointly generating these disentangled yet aligned latents, Gen3R produces both RGB videos and corresponding 3D geometry, including camera poses, depth maps, and global point clouds. Experiments demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art results in single- and multi-image conditioned 3D scene generation. Additionally, our method can enhance the robustness of reconstruction by leveraging generative priors, demonstrating the mutual benefit of tightly coupling reconstruction and generative models.

light_analysis.overview: Gen3R提出了一种结合基础重建模型和视频扩散模型的方法，用于生成场景级3D几何和视频，桥接了重建与生成先验。
light_analysis.motivation: 场景级3D生成是计算机视觉中的重要挑战，需要高质量几何和外观表示。现有方法往往独立使用重建模型或生成模型，可能导致输出不一致或质量受限。Gen3R旨在解决这一问题，通过结合两者的强先验，提升3D场景生成的鲁棒性和效果，满足VR、AR等应用需求。摘要未明确说明具体不足之处，但可推断现有方法在联合生成方面存在局限。
light_analysis.method: Gen3R的核心方法基于VGGT重建模型，训练一个适配器来生成几何潜在表示，这些表示与预训练视频扩散模型的外观潜在表示通过正则化对齐。通过联合生成解耦但对齐的潜在表示，方法能同时输出RGB视频和对应3D几何，包括相机姿势、深度图和全局点云。关键创新在于将重建模型的几何先验与生成模型的外观先验紧密结合，实现高效的前馈生成过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Gen3R在单图像和多图像条件下的3D场景生成任务中达到了最先进的结果。此外，通过利用生成模型的先验，方法增强了重建的鲁棒性，展示了重建与生成模型耦合的互惠互利。摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据，如准确率或效率改进，但强调了其在基准测试中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: Gen3R的主要贡献在于提出了一种桥接重建模型和视频扩散模型的方法，实现了高质量的3D场景生成。研究展示了紧密耦合重建和生成模型可以相互增强，具有学术价值（如推动多模态生成研究）和实际应用价值（如3D内容创作）。潜在局限性可能包括对预训练模型的依赖或计算复杂度，未来工作可探索更多条件生成或扩展到其他领域。

title: Vision-language models lag human performance on physical dynamics and intent reasoning
abstract: Spatial intelligence is central to embodied cognition, yet contemporary AI systems still struggle to reason about physical interactions in open-world human environments. Despite strong performance on controlled benchmarks, vision-language models often fail to jointly model physical dynamics, reference frames, and the latent human intentions that drive spatial change. We introduce Teleo-Spatial Intelligence (TSI), a reasoning capability that links spatiotemporal change to goal-directed structure. To evaluate TSI, we present EscherVerse, a large-scale open-world resource built from 11,328 real-world videos, including an 8,000-example benchmark and a 35,963-example instruction-tuning set. Across 27 state-of-the-art vision-language models and an independent analysis of first-pass human responses from 11 annotators, we identify a persistent teleo-spatial reasoning gap: the strongest proprietary model achieves 57.26\% overall accuracy, far below first-pass human performance, which ranges from 84.81\% to 95.14\% with a mean of 90.62\%. Fine-tuning on real-world, intent-aware data narrows this gap for open-weight models, but does not close it. EscherVerse provides a diagnostic testbed for purpose-aware spatial reasoning and highlights a critical gap between pattern recognition and human-level understanding in embodied AI.

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入Teleo-Spatial Intelligence（TSI）概念，并构建EscherVerse基准来评估视觉-语言模型在物理动态和意图推理上的表现，发现模型与人类存在显著差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于空间智能对具身认知至关重要，但当前AI系统在开放世界人类环境中推理物理交互时仍面临挑战。尽管视觉-语言模型在受控基准测试中表现良好，但它们在联合建模物理动态、参考框架和驱动空间变化的潜在人类意图方面存在不足。这一问题限制了AI在现实世界应用中的有效性和可靠性，凸显了开发更综合推理能力的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Teleo-Spatial Intelligence（TSI）作为核心概念，旨在将时空变化与目标导向结构联系起来以增强推理能力。为评估TSI，作者构建了EscherVerse数据集，这是一个基于11,328个真实世界视频的大规模开放世界资源，包括一个8,000示例的基准测试集和一个35,963示例的指令调优集。研究评估了27个最先进的视觉-语言模型，并与11名人类注释者的第一遍响应进行独立对比分析，以系统诊断模型在意图感知推理上的表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在Teleo-spatial推理任务上，最强的专有视觉-语言模型整体准确率为57.26%，远低于第一遍人类表现，后者准确率范围从84.81%到95.14%，平均值为90.62%。这表明模型与人类之间存在显著的性能差距。通过对开放权重模型在真实世界、意图感知数据上进行微调，可以缩小这一差距，但未能完全消除，突显了当前技术在模式识别与深层理解方面的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是引入EscherVerse作为诊断测试床，用于评估目的感知空间推理，并揭示了当前AI在模式识别与人类水平理解之间的关键差距。这具有重要的学术和实际价值，推动了具身AI领域对更全面推理能力的研究。未来工作可能包括改进模型架构或训练数据以弥合这一差距，摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: Intrinsic-Metric Physics-Informed Neural Networks (IM-PINN) for Reaction-Diffusion Dynamics on Complex Riemannian Manifolds
abstract: Simulating nonlinear reaction-diffusion dynamics on complex, non-Euclidean manifolds remains a fundamental challenge in computational morphogenesis, constrained by high-fidelity mesh generation costs and symplectic drift in discrete time-stepping schemes. This study introduces the Intrinsic-Metric Physics-Informed Neural Network (IM-PINN), a mesh-free geometric deep learning framework that solves partial differential equations directly in the continuous parametric domain. By embedding the Riemannian metric tensor into the automatic differentiation graph, our architecture analytically reconstructs the Laplace-Beltrami operator, decoupling solution complexity from geometric discretization. We validate the framework on a "Stochastic Cloth" manifold with extreme Gaussian curvature fluctuations ($K \in [-2489, 3580]$), where traditional adaptive refinement fails to resolve anisotropic Turing instabilities. Using a dual-stream architecture with Fourier feature embeddings to mitigate spectral bias, the IM-PINN recovers the "splitting spot" and "labyrinthine" regimes of the Gray-Scott model. Benchmarking against the Surface Finite Element Method (SFEM) reveals superior physical rigor: the IM-PINN achieves global mass conservation error of $\mathcal{E}_{mass} \approx 0.157$ versus SFEM's $0.258$, acting as a thermodynamically consistent global solver that eliminates mass drift inherent in semi-implicit integration. The framework offers a memory-efficient, resolution-independent paradigm for simulating biological pattern formation on evolving surfaces, bridging differential geometry and physics-informed machine learning.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了内在度量物理信息神经网络（IM-PINN），一种无需网格的几何深度学习框架，用于在复杂黎曼流形上模拟反应-扩散动力学，通过嵌入度量张量解决了传统方法的几何离散化问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在计算形态发生学中，模拟复杂非欧几里得流形上的非线性反应-扩散动力学是一个根本挑战，因为高保真网格生成成本高昂，且离散时间步进方案存在辛漂移。现有方法如表面有限元法（SFEM）在自适应细化失败时，无法有效解析各向异性的图灵不稳定性，特别是在极端高斯曲率波动的情况下，这限制了模拟生物图案形成的精确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: IM-PINN通过将黎曼度量张量嵌入到自动微分图中，解析地重构拉普拉斯-贝尔特拉米算子，从而将解复杂度与几何离散化解耦。该框架采用双流架构，并结合傅里叶特征嵌入来减轻频谱偏差。在“Stochastic Cloth”流形上进行了验证，该流形具有极端高斯曲率波动，用于处理Gray-Scott模型的反应-扩散动力学，无需依赖网格生成。
light_analysis.result: 在“Stochastic Cloth”流形上，IM-PINN成功恢复了Gray-Scott模型的“分裂点”和“迷宫”模式。与表面有限元法（SFEM）基准相比，IM-PINN表现出更优越的物理严谨性：全局质量守恒误差约为0.157，而SFEM为0.258，这消除了半隐式积分中固有的质量漂移，提供了一个热力学一致的全局求解器，表明其在复杂几何下的高精度和稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该框架为模拟演化表面上的生物图案形成提供了一个内存高效、分辨率无关的范式，连接了微分几何和物理信息机器学习，解决了复杂流形上偏微分方程求解的难题。主要贡献在于通过内在度量嵌入避免了网格依赖，未来可扩展到更广泛的几何和非线性动力学模拟，具有潜在的生物学和工程应用价值。

title: GroundingME: Exposing the Visual Grounding Gap in MLLMs through Multi-Dimensional Evaluation
abstract: Visual grounding, localizing objects from natural language descriptions, represents a critical bridge between language and vision understanding. While multimodal large language models (MLLMs) achieve impressive scores on existing benchmarks, a fundamental question remains: can MLLMs truly visually ground with human-like sophistication, or are they merely pattern-matching on simplified datasets? Current benchmarks fail to capture real-world complexity where humans effortlessly navigate intricate references and recognize when grounding is impossible. To rigorously assess MLLMs' true capabilities, we introduce GroundingME, a benchmark that systematically challenges models across four critical dimensions: (1) Discriminative: distinguishing highly similar objects, (2) Spatial: understanding complex relational descriptions, (3) Limited: handling occlusions or tiny objects, and (4) Rejection: recognizing ungroundable queries. Through careful curation combining automated generation with human verification, we create 1,005 challenging examples mirroring real-world complexity. Evaluating 25 state-of-the-art MLLMs reveals a profound capability gap: the best model achieves only 45.1% accuracy, while most score 0% on rejection tasks. We explore two strategies for improvements: (1) test-time scaling selects optimal response by thinking trajectory to improve overall performance by up to 4.5%, and (2) data-mixture training boosts rejection accuracy from 0% to 27.9%. GroundingME thus serves as both a diagnostic tool revealing current limitations in MLLMs and a roadmap toward human-level visual grounding. Project page: https://groundingme.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过引入GroundingME基准，系统评估多模态大语言模型在视觉接地任务中的真实能力，揭示其与人类水平的显著差距。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉接地是连接语言和视觉理解的关键桥梁，对AI系统至关重要。当前基准测试往往简化场景，无法评估模型在现实世界复杂情况下的表现，如区分高度相似对象、处理遮挡或识别不可接地查询。这导致MLLMs可能仅在简单数据集上表现良好，而无法胜任实际应用中的挑战，限制了其在真实环境中的可靠性。因此，需要更严谨的评估工具来暴露模型局限，推动多模态AI向更智能的方向发展。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出GroundingME基准，从四个关键维度系统挑战MLLMs：区分性（区分相似对象）、空间理解（处理复杂关系描述）、受限条件（处理遮挡或微小物体）和拒绝任务（识别不可接地查询）。基准通过结合自动生成和人工验证，创建了1,005个挑战性示例，模仿现实世界复杂性。评估了25个前沿MLLMs，并探索了两种改进策略：测试时缩放通过思维轨迹选择最优响应，数据混合训练增强模型处理拒绝任务的能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，所有评估模型在GroundingME上表现不佳：最佳模型的整体准确率仅为45.1%，而大多数模型在拒绝任务上的准确率为0%。通过改进策略，测试时缩放使整体性能提升最高达4.5%，数据混合训练将拒绝准确率从0%提高到27.9%。这些数据凸显了MLLMs在复杂视觉接地任务上的严重能力缺口，远未达到人类水平。
light_analysis.conclusion: GroundingME基准成功暴露了MLLMs在视觉接地任务中的深刻局限性，表明当前模型在真实世界应用中存在巨大差距。该研究不仅提供了一个有效的诊断工具来评估模型性能，还为未来研究指明了改进方向，如通过优化训练策略和推理机制提升模型鲁棒性。尽管存在挑战，这项工作推动了多模态AI向更可靠的视觉理解发展，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。

title: TTP: Test-Time Padding for Adversarial Detection and Robust Adaptation on Vision-Language Models
abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs), such as CLIP, have achieved impressive zero-shot recognition performance but remain highly susceptible to adversarial perturbations, posing significant risks in safety-critical scenarios. Previous training-time defenses rely on adversarial fine-tuning, which requires labeled data and costly retraining, while existing test-time strategies fail to reliably distinguish between clean and adversarial inputs, thereby preventing both adversarial robustness and clean accuracy from reaching their optimum. To address these limitations, we propose Test-Time Padding (TTP), a lightweight defense framework that performs adversarial detection followed by targeted adaptation at inference. TTP identifies adversarial inputs via the cosine similarity shift between CLIP feature embeddings computed before and after spatial padding, yielding a universal threshold for reliable detection across architectures and datasets. For detected adversarial cases, TTP employs trainable padding to restore disrupted attention patterns, coupled with a similarity-aware ensemble strategy for a more robust final prediction. For clean inputs, TTP leaves them unchanged by default or optionally integrates existing test-time adaptation techniques for further accuracy gains. Comprehensive experiments on diverse CLIP backbones and fine-grained benchmarks show that TTP consistently surpasses state-of-the-art test-time defenses, delivering substantial improvements in adversarial robustness without compromising clean accuracy. The code for this paper will be released soon.
comment: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Test-Time Padding (TTP)框架，通过测试时填充实现对抗性检测和鲁棒适应，显著提升视觉语言模型的鲁棒性而不影响干净准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型（VLMs）如CLIP在零样本识别中表现卓越，但对抗性扰动使其在安全关键场景中存在安全风险。现有训练时防御方法依赖标注数据和昂贵重训练，效率低下；而现有测试时策略无法可靠区分干净和对抗性输入，导致模型对抗鲁棒性和干净准确性无法同时优化。因此，亟需一种轻量级测试时方案来解决这一平衡问题，提高VLMs的实用性和安全性。
light_analysis.method: TTP框架包括对抗性检测和针对性适应两个阶段。检测阶段通过计算空间填充前后CLIP特征嵌入的余弦相似度变化来识别对抗性输入，并设定通用阈值以适应不同架构和数据集。对于检测到的对抗性案例，采用可训练填充恢复被扰乱的注意力模式，并结合相似性感知集成策略进行鲁棒预测。对于干净输入，框架默认不作改动或可选集成现有测试时适应技术以进一步提升准确性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多种CLIP主干模型和细粒度基准测试中进行，结果显示TTP一致超越最先进的测试时防御方法。具体而言，它显著提高了对抗性鲁棒性指标，同时保持了干净的识别准确性，避免了性能折衷。这证明TTP在实际应用中能有效增强模型的安全性，并在多样数据集和模型配置下均表现稳定和优越。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了TTP框架，实现了轻量级且无需训练数据的对抗性防御。其学术价值在于创新性地结合了检测和适应策略于测试时，扩展了视觉语言模型的安全性研究；实际应用价值在于提升模型在安全关键场景的可靠部署。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂的攻击类型或集成到其他多模态模型中。

title: Improving Fairness of Large Language Model-Based ICU Mortality Prediction via Case-Based Prompting
abstract: Accurately predicting mortality risk in intensive care unit (ICU) patients is essential for clinical decision-making. Although large language models (LLMs) show strong potential in structured medical prediction tasks, their outputs may exhibit biases related to demographic attributes such as sex, age, and race, limiting their reliability in fairness-critical clinical settings. Existing debiasing methods often degrade predictive performance, making it difficult to balance fairness and accuracy.   In this study, we systematically analyze fairness issues in LLM-based ICU mortality prediction and propose a clinically adaptive prompting framework that improves both performance and fairness without model retraining. We first design a multi-dimensional bias assessment scheme to identify subgroup disparities. Based on this, we introduce CAse Prompting (CAP), a training-free framework that integrates existing debiasing strategies and further guides models using similar historical misprediction cases paired with correct outcomes to correct biased reasoning.   We evaluate CAP on the MIMIC-IV dataset. Results show that AUROC improves from 0.806 to 0.873 and AUPRC from 0.497 to 0.694. Meanwhile, prediction disparities are substantially reduced across demographic groups, with reductions exceeding 90% in sex and certain White-Black comparisons. Feature reliance analysis further reveals highly consistent attention patterns across groups, with similarity above 0.98.   These findings demonstrate that fairness and performance in LLM-based clinical prediction can be jointly optimized through carefully designed prompting, offering a practical paradigm for developing reliable and equitable clinical decision-support systems.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出CAP框架，通过基于病例的提示方法，无需重新训练即可联合优化大型语言模型在ICU死亡率预测中的公平性和准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: ICU患者死亡率预测对临床决策至关重要。大型语言模型（LLM）在结构化医疗预测任务中潜力巨大，但其输出可能存在性别、年龄、种族等人口统计属性相关的偏差，影响在公平性敏感临床环境中的可靠性。现有去偏方法往往导致预测性能下降，难以平衡公平性与准确性，因此需要开发能同时提升性能并改善公平性的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 研究首先设计多维度偏差评估方案，识别不同子组间的预测差异。接着提出CAse Prompting（CAP）框架，这是一种无需训练的临床自适应提示方法。CAP整合现有去偏策略，并利用类似历史误预测案例与正确结果配对，引导模型纠正偏差推理。在MIMIC-IV数据集上进行评估，框架通过提示工程优化LLM输出，无需特定模型架构调整。
light_analysis.result: 在MIMIC-IV数据集上的实验显示，使用CAP后，AUROC从0.806提升至0.873，AUPRC从0.497提升至0.694，性能显著改善。同时，各人口统计组间的预测差异大幅减少，性别和某些白人与黑人比较中减少超过90%。特征依赖分析表明，不同组间的注意力模式高度一致，相似度超过0.98，有效平衡了公平性和预测准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是通过CAP框架展示了如何通过精心设计的提示工程在LLM临床预测中联合优化公平性和性能，为开发可靠且公平的临床决策支持系统提供了实用范式。摘要未明确说明该方法的局限性，未来工作可能包括在更多数据集上验证泛化能力或扩展到其他医疗预测任务。

title: XNNTab -- Interpretable Neural Networks for Tabular Data using Sparse Autoencoders
abstract: In data-driven applications relying on tabular data, where interpretability is key, machine learning models such as decision trees and linear regression are applied. Although neural networks can provide higher predictive performance, they are not used because of their blackbox nature. In this work, we present XNNTab, a neural architecture that combines the expressiveness of neural networks and interpretability. XNNTab first learns highly non-linear feature representations, which are decomposed into monosemantic features using a sparse autoencoder (SAE). These features are then assigned human-interpretable concepts, making the overall model prediction intrinsically interpretable. XNNTab outperforms interpretable predictive models, and achieves comparable performance to its non-interpretable counterparts.
comment: Accepted at the 4th World Conference on eXplainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI-2026)

light_analysis.overview: XNNTab是一种使用稀疏自编码器的可解释神经网络架构，为表格数据提供高预测性能并保持可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 在数据驱动的表格数据应用中，可解释性对决策支持、信任建立和合规性至关重要。传统可解释模型如决策树和线性回归预测性能有限，而神经网络虽性能高却因黑箱特性难以解释，限制了其在关键领域的应用。现有方法无法同时满足高预测性能和可解释性需求，因此本研究旨在开发一种兼顾两者的解决方案，以弥补这一缺陷。
light_analysis.method: XNNTab架构首先利用神经网络学习表格数据的高度非线性特征表示，以捕捉复杂模式。接着，通过稀疏自编码器（SAE）将这些表示分解为单义特征，使每个特征对应特定概念，从而提升可解释性。关键创新在于结合神经网络的表达力和SAE的特征分解能力，为特征分配人类可理解的概念，实现模型预测的本质上可解释。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或详细模型架构。
light_analysis.result: XNNTab在实验中优于其他可解释预测模型如决策树和线性回归，同时其预测性能达到了与非解释性神经网络模型相当的水平。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升数据，但强调了模型在保持可解释性的同时，实现了与黑箱模型竞争性的表现，表明其在平衡可解释性与预测准确性方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: XNNTab的主要贡献是提出一种结合神经网络和稀疏自编码器的可解释架构，成功解决了表格数据应用中可解释性与预测性能的权衡问题。这项研究为可解释AI领域提供了新方法，促进了神经网络在医疗、金融等关键领域的实际应用。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他数据类型或优化特征解释方法，以进一步提高模型的泛化能力。

title: SciLaD: A Large-Scale, Transparent, Reproducible Dataset for Natural Scientific Language Processing
abstract: SciLaD is a novel, large-scale dataset of scientific language constructed entirely using open-source frameworks and publicly available data sources. It comprises a curated English split containing over 10 million scientific publications and a multilingual, unfiltered TEI XML split including more than 35 million publications. We also publish the extensible pipeline for generating SciLaD. The dataset construction and processing workflow demonstrates how open-source tools can enable large-scale, scientific data curation while maintaining high data quality. Finally, we pre-train a RoBERTa model on our dataset and evaluate it across a comprehensive set of benchmarks, achieving performance comparable to other scientific language models of similar size, validating the quality and utility of SciLaD. We publish the dataset and evaluation pipeline to promote reproducibility, transparency, and further research in natural scientific language processing and understanding, including scholarly document processing.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了SciLaD，一个大规模、透明、可复现的科学语言处理数据集，并通过开源工具构建和验证其质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 科学语言处理领域缺乏大规模、高质量且透明可复现的数据集，现有方法常依赖封闭数据源，导致研究可复现性差和透明度低。这阻碍了自然科学语言处理（如学术文档处理）的进展。本研究旨在解决这些问题，通过创建基于开源框架和公开数据的SciLaD数据集，促进开放科学和更广泛的研究应用，以提升数据集的可用性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用开源框架和公开数据源构建SciLaD数据集，包括一个精心策划的英文分割（含超过1000万篇科学出版物）和一个多语言、未过滤的TEI XML分割（含超过3500万篇出版物）。关键创新在于发布了可扩展的数据集生成管道，利用开源工具实现大规模科学数据整理，同时确保高数据质量。此外，为了验证数据集，预训练了一个RoBERTa模型，以展示其在实际应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.result: 预训练的RoBERTa模型在多个综合基准测试中进行了评估，表现出与类似规模的其他科学语言模型相当的性能，这验证了SciLaD数据集的高质量和实用性。摘要未明确说明具体准确率数据，但与基线模型的对比表明数据集能支持有效的模型训练。结果强调了开源数据在促进科学语言处理研究中的价值，为后续工作提供了可靠基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是推出了SciLaD数据集及其构建管道，强调了透明和可复现性在科学数据整理中的重要性。数据集通过模型评估验证了其质量，为自然科学语言处理和学术文档处理领域提供了宝贵资源。学术价值在于推动开放数据集的创建，应用价值在于支持各种NLP任务。未来工作可能包括扩展数据集规模、探索多语言处理或集成更多模型架构。

title: Token Sample Complexity of Attention
abstract: As context windows in large language models continue to expand, it is essential to characterize how attention behaves at extreme sequence lengths. We introduce token-sample complexity: the rate at which attention computed on $n$ tokens converges to its infinite-token limit. We estimate finite-$n$ convergence bounds at two levels: pointwise uniform convergence of the attention map, and convergence of moments for the transformed token distribution. For compactly supported (and more generally sub-Gaussian) distributions, our first result shows that the attention map converges uniformly on a ball of radius $R$ at rate $C(R)/\sqrt{n}$, where $C(R)$ grows exponentially with $R$. For large $R$, this estimate loses practical value, and our second result addresses this issue by establishing convergence rates for the moments of the transformed distribution (the token output of the attention layer). In this case, the rate is $C'(R)/n^β$ with $β<\tfrac{1}{2}$, and $C'(R)$ depends polynomially on the size of the support of the distribution. The exponent $β$ depends on the attention geometry and the spectral properties of the tokens distribution. We also examine the regime in which the attention parameter tends to infinity and the softmax approaches a hardmax, and in this setting, we establish a logarithmic rate of convergence. Experiments on synthetic Gaussian data and real BERT models on Wikipedia text confirm our predictions.

light_analysis.overview: 论文首次提出token-sample复杂度的概念，并估计了注意力机制在极端序列长度下的收敛速率，为大型语言模型的注意力行为提供理论分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型上下文窗口的持续扩展，注意力机制在超长序列中的行为特性亟待研究。现有方法往往忽视注意力计算的收敛性问题，特别是在无限token极限下的表现。本研究旨在解决这一关键问题，量化注意力从有限样本到理论极限的收敛速率，揭示其在极端长度下的稳定性，为模型设计和优化提供理论依据，以应对日益增长的长序列处理需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括引入token-sample复杂度，从两个层面理论分析收敛边界：一是注意力图的点一致收敛，针对紧支撑或子高斯分布，推导出在半径为R的球上以C(R)/√n的速率收敛；二是变换token分布的矩收敛，得到C'(R)/n^β的速率，其中β<1/2且依赖于注意力几何和分布谱性质。还探讨了注意力参数趋近无穷时，softmax逼近hardmax的对数收敛速率。实验验证部分使用合成高斯数据和真实BERT模型在维基百科文本上进行测试，以确认理论预测。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果展示了理论收敛速率的有效性：对于紧支撑分布，注意力图的点一致收敛速率为C(R)/√n，但C(R)随R指数增长，对于大R可能失去实用价值；而矩收敛速率更快，为C'(R)/n^β，C'(R)多项式依赖于分布支撑大小。当注意力参数趋向无穷时，收敛速率降至对数级别。实验在合成高斯数据和BERT模型上验证了这些预测，结果表明理论分析与实际数据一致，证实了收敛速率的正确性，尽管摘要未提供具体性能指标数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过提出token-sample复杂度，首次系统分析了注意力机制在极端序列长度下的收敛行为，建立了点一致收敛和矩收敛的速率边界。这为理解大型语言模型在长上下文中的注意力动态提供了重要理论贡献，有助于指导注意力机制的优化和高效计算，提升模型的可扩展性。潜在局限性包括对分布类型的依赖，未来工作可扩展至更一般的分布或复杂注意力架构，进一步探索应用场景。

title: LoGoColor: Local-Global 3D Colorization for 360° Scenes
abstract: Single-channel 3D reconstruction is widely used in fields such as robotics and medical imaging. While these methods are good at reconstructing 3D geometry, their outputs are typically uncolored 3D models, making 3D colorization necessary for visualization. Recent 3D colorization studies address this problem by distilling 2D image colorization models. However, these approaches suffer from an inherent inconsistency of 2D image models. This results in colors being averaged during training, leading to monotonous and oversimplified results, particularly in complex 360° scenes. In contrast, we aim to preserve color diversity by generating a new set of consistently colorized training views, thereby suppressing the averaging process. Nevertheless, mitigating the averaging process introduces a new challenge: ensuring strict multi-view consistency across these colorized views. To achieve this, we propose \ourmethod, a pipeline designed to preserve color diversity by eliminating this guidance-averaging process with a `Local-Global' approach: we partition the scene into subscenes and explicitly tackle both inter-subscene and intra-subscene consistency using a fine-tuned multi-view diffusion model. We demonstrate our method achieves quantitatively and qualitatively more consistent and plausible 3D colorization on complex 360° scenes than existing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出LoGoColor方法，通过局部-全局策略和多视图扩散模型提升复杂360°场景中3D着色的颜色多样性和一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 单通道3D重建广泛应用于机器人和医学成像等领域，但其输出为无色模型，着色对可视化至关重要。现有方法通过蒸馏2D图像着色模型，存在2D模型不一致性问题，导致训练中颜色被平均化，结果单调且过于简化，尤其在复杂360°场景中表现不佳。因此，需要开发新方法以保留颜色多样性并确保多视图一致性，解决着色质量的限制。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出LoGoColor方法，采用‘局部-全局’策略：将复杂场景划分为子场景，以处理子场景内和子场景间的一致性。通过微调多视图扩散模型生成一致的着色训练视图，从而抑制颜色平均化过程。关键创新点包括场景分区和多视图一致性优化，专注于直接应对多视图挑战，而无需依赖传统2D模型蒸馏。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，LoGoColor在复杂360°场景中实现了定量和定性上更一致和合理的3D着色，优于现有方法。具体性能指标未在摘要中详细说明，但论文强调其在视觉和定量评估上的优越性，能有效提升颜色多样性和一致性，克服了现有方法的单调性问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出LoGoColor方法，有效解决了3D着色中颜色多样性和多视图一致性问题，通过局部-全局策略和多视图扩散模型提升了着色质量，对机器人和医学成像等领域的3D可视化有重要应用价值。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向，但为复杂场景着色提供了新思路。

title: Automatic Essay Scoring and Feedback Generation in Basque Language Learning
abstract: This paper introduces the first publicly available dataset for Automatic Essay Scoring (AES) and feedback generation in Basque, targeting the CEFR C1 proficiency level. The dataset comprises 3,200 essays from HABE, each annotated by expert evaluators with criterion specific scores covering correctness, richness, coherence, cohesion, and task alignment enriched with detailed feedback and error examples. We fine-tune open-source models, including RoBERTa-EusCrawl and Latxa 8B/70B, for both scoring and explanation generation. Our experiments show that encoder models remain highly reliable for AES, while supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of Latxa significantly enhances performance, surpassing state-of-the-art (SoTA) closed-source systems such as GPT-5 and Claude Sonnet 4.5 in scoring consistency and feedback quality. We also propose a novel evaluation methodology for assessing feedback generation, combining automatic consistency metrics with expert-based validation of extracted learner errors. Results demonstrate that the fine-tuned Latxa model produces criterion-aligned, pedagogically meaningful feedback and identifies a wider range of error types than proprietary models. This resource and benchmark establish a foundation for transparent, reproducible, and educationally grounded NLP research in low-resource languages such as Basque.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究贡献了首个巴斯克语自动作文评分与反馈生成的公开数据集，并通过微调模型在性能上超越SOTA闭源系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 巴斯克语作为低资源语言，在自动作文评分和反馈生成领域缺乏公开资源和基准，现有闭源系统如GPT-5可能不透明且性能受限。本研究旨在解决这一教育技术难题，通过构建标注数据集和透明方法，促进低资源语言的NLP研究，推动教育应用的创新和可重复性。摘要未明确说明具体不足，但强调了资源匮乏和现有系统局限性的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出使用开源模型RoBERTa-EusCrawl和Latxa 8B/70B进行监督微调，针对自动评分和反馈生成任务。关键创新包括对Latxa模型的优化，以及提出一种结合自动一致性指标和专家验证的新评估方法，用于评估反馈生成的质量。数据集包含3,200篇标注文章，覆盖CEFR C1水平的多个评分标准如正确性、连贯性和任务对齐。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，编码器模型在自动评分中保持高可靠性，而微调的Latxa模型在评分一致性和反馈质量上显著提升，超越了GPT-5和Claude Sonnet 4.5等SOTA闭源系统。具体表现为生成教育学意义的反馈、识别更广泛的错误类型，并通过新评估方法验证了其有效性，摘要未明确给出具体数字，但强调了性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于建立了巴斯克语自动作文评分和反馈生成的基础资源与基准，为低资源语言的透明、可重复NLP研究奠定基础。其意义在于提供教育学实用的工具，并可能扩展到其他低资源语言。未来工作可扩展数据集或模型应用到更多语言和教育场景，或进一步优化评估方法。

title: Leveraging Multispectral Sensors for Color Correction in Mobile Cameras
abstract: Recent advances in snapshot multispectral (MS) imaging have enabled compact, low-cost spectral sensors for consumer and mobile devices. By capturing richer spectral information than conventional RGB sensors, these systems can enhance key imaging tasks, including color correction. However, most existing methods treat the color correction pipeline in separate stages, often discarding MS data early in the process. We propose a unified, learning-based framework that performs end-to-end color correction and jointly leverages data from a high-resolution RGB sensor and an auxiliary low-resolution MS sensor. Our approach integrates the full pipeline within a single model, producing coherent and color-accurate outputs. We demonstrate the flexibility and generality of our framework by refactoring two different state-of-the-art image-to-image architectures. To support training and evaluation, we construct a dedicated dataset by aggregating and repurposing publicly available spectral datasets, rendering under multiple RGB camera sensitivities. Extensive experiments show that our approach improves color accuracy and stability, reducing error by up to 50% compared to RGB-only and MS-driven baselines. Code, models and dataset available at: https://lucacogo.github.io/Mobile-Spectral-CC/.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个统一的端到端学习框架，整合RGB和多光谱传感器数据，显著提升移动相机颜色校正的准确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，快照多光谱成像的进步使得紧凑、低成本的光谱传感器可用于消费和移动设备，这些系统能捕获比传统RGB传感器更丰富的光谱信息，从而改进关键成像任务如颜色校正。然而，大多数现有方法将颜色校正管道分为多个阶段，通常在处理早期丢弃多光谱数据，导致效率降低和潜在信息损失，限制了颜色准确性的提升。因此，研究旨在开发一种更有效的集成方法，以充分利用多光谱数据，解决移动相机颜色校正中的瓶颈问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个基于学习的统一框架，实现端到端颜色校正，联合利用高分辨率RGB传感器和辅助低分辨率多光谱传感器的数据，将整个校正管道集成在单一模型中，生产一致且颜色准确的输出。关键创新点包括：通过重构两种不同的最先进图像到图像架构（摘要未明确说明具体名称）来展示框架灵活性，以及构建专用数据集用于训练和评估。该数据集通过聚合和重新利用公开可用的光谱数据集构建，渲染时考虑多个RGB相机灵敏度，确保模型的泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验验证，所提出的方法显著提高了颜色准确性和稳定性。与仅使用RGB和多光谱驱动的基线方法相比，该方法将错误减少高达50%，具体性能指标在实验中得到量化，证明了其在整合多光谱数据方面的优越性。实验结果还显示，框架在不同场景下表现稳定，优于传统分割处理方法，为移动相机颜色校正提供了有效解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了一个端到端学习框架，有效整合多光谱传感器数据，提升移动相机颜色校正的性能。学术上，推动了多光谱图像处理和机器学习在成像任务中的应用；实践上，可改善消费级移动设备的成像质量，具有广泛的应用前景。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括进一步优化计算效率、扩展框架到其他成像任务或处理更多传感器类型。代码、模型和数据集已公开，便于后续研究和推广。

title: SCAIL: Towards Studio-Grade Character Animation via In-Context Learning of 3D-Consistent Pose Representations
abstract: Achieving controllable character animation that meets studio-grade standards remains challenging despite recent progress. Existing approaches can transfer motion from a driving video to a reference image, but often fail to preserve structural fidelity and temporal consistency in wild scenarios involving complex motion and cross-identity animations. In this work, we present \textbf{SCAIL} (a framework toward \textbf{S}tudio-grade \textbf{C}haracter \textbf{A}nimation via \textbf{I}n-context \textbf{L}earning), which is designed to address these challenges from two key innovations. First, we propose a novel 3D pose representation, providing a robust and flexible motion signal. Second, we introduce a full-context pose injection mechanism within a diffusion-transformer, enabling effective spatio-temporal reasoning over full motion sequences. To align with studio-grade requirements, we develop a curated data pipeline ensuring both diversity and quality, and establish a comprehensive benchmark for systematic evaluation. Experiments show that \textbf{SCAIL} achieves state-of-the-art performance and advances character animation toward studio-grade controlling. Code and model are available at \href{https://github.com/zai-org/SCAIL}{zai-org/SCAIL}.

light_analysis.overview: SCAIL框架通过引入3D一致性姿态表示和全上下文姿态注入机制，实现了工作室级的可控角色动画。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于实现工作室级可控角色动画的挑战。现有方法虽然能从驱动视频传递运动到参考图像，但在复杂运动（如快速动作）和跨身份动画（如不同角色交互）的野外场景中，往往无法保持结构保真度和时间一致性，导致动画质量下降。这一问题在高质量动画制作中至关重要，因为工作室级标准要求高精度和一致性，而当前技术在处理非结构化场景时存在局限，限制了实际应用效果。
light_analysis.method: SCAIL的核心方法包括两个创新点：首先，提出新颖的3D姿态表示，提供鲁棒且灵活的运动信号，增强动画的结构一致性；其次，在扩散变换器中引入全上下文姿态注入机制，实现对运动序列的端到端时空推理，提升控制精度。技术细节涉及使用策展数据管道确保训练数据的多样性和质量，并建立全面基准进行系统评估。这些创新旨在优化动画生成过程，支持复杂场景的处理。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示SCAIL在角色动画任务中达到了最先进的性能，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率或效率改进），但与现有方法相比，它在结构保真度和时间一致性方面表现出显著提升。这表明SCAIL有效推动了动画向工作室级控制迈进，尽管缺乏详细数据对比，但其整体效果被证实优于基线，验证了所提方法的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SCAIL的主要贡献是提出了一种结合3D姿态表示和全上下文注入机制的新框架，解决了角色动画中结构保真度和时间一致性的问题。学术上，它为动画控制提供了创新技术路线；实际上，有助于实现高质量工作室级动画制作，推动行业应用。潜在局限性或未来方向可能包括扩展到更复杂场景或优化计算效率，以进一步强化实用性。

title: Denoise to Track: Harnessing Video Diffusion Priors for Robust Correspondence
abstract: In this work, we introduce HeFT (Head-Frequency Tracker), a zero-shot point tracking framework that leverages the visual priors of pretrained video diffusion models. To better understand how they encode spatiotemporal information, we analyze the internal representations of Video Diffusion Transformer (VDiT). Our analysis reveals that attention heads act as minimal functional units with distinct specializations for matching, semantic understanding, and positional encoding. Additionally, we find that the low-frequency components in VDiT features are crucial for establishing correspondences, whereas the high-frequency components tend to introduce noise. Building on these insights, we propose a head- and frequency-aware feature selection strategy that jointly selects the most informative attention head and low-frequency components to enhance tracking performance. Specifically, our method extracts discriminative features through single-step denoising, applies feature selection, and employs soft-argmax localization with forward-backward consistency checks for correspondence estimation. Extensive experiments on TAP-Vid benchmarks demonstrate that HeFT achieves state-of-the-art zero-shot tracking performance, approaching the accuracy of supervised methods while eliminating the need for annotated training data. Our work further underscores the promise of video diffusion models as powerful foundation models for a wide range of downstream tasks, paving the way toward unified visual foundation models.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出HeFT框架，通过分析视频扩散模型的内部表示并选择关键特征，实现高效的零样本点跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决零样本点跟踪问题，即无需标注训练数据在视频中跟踪点。该问题在实际应用中至关重要，如机器人导航和视频分析。现有方法常依赖于监督训练，需要大量标注数据，限制了在无监督场景下的性能。视频扩散模型作为预训练模型提供了丰富的视觉先验，但如何有效利用这些先验提升跟踪性能尚不明确。本研究通过分析VDiT内部表示，旨在揭示其时空编码机制，以弥补现有零样本方法的不足，促进更鲁棒的跟踪技术发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于对Video Diffusion Transformer（VDiT）内部表示的深入分析，揭示注意力头作为最小功能单元具有匹配、语义理解和位置编码的专门化。同时，发现VDiT特征中的低频组件对建立对应关系至关重要，而高频组件引入噪声。基于这些见解，提出头-频率感知特征选择策略，联合选择最信息量的注意力头和低频组件以增强特征表示。具体技术路线包括：通过单步去噪提取区分性特征，应用特征选择机制，以及使用软-argmax定位结合前后一致性检查进行对应估计，确保跟踪的精确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验在TAP-Vid基准上进行，HeFT框架实现了最先进的零样本跟踪性能，接近监督方法的准确性，同时消除了对注释训练数据的需要。这证明了所提出的头-频率感知特征选择策略的有效性，显著提升了跟踪的鲁棒性和效率。与其他基线零样本方法相比，HeFT在性能上表现突出，为零样本视觉任务提供了强有力的实证支持，展示了预训练视频扩散模型在下游应用中的潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是开发了HeFT框架，通过分析视频扩散模型的内部表示和特征选择策略，成功实现零样本点跟踪，为零样本视觉任务提供了新方法。研究强调了视频扩散模型作为强大基础模型的学术价值，为统一视觉基础模型的发展铺平了道路，具有广泛的实际应用前景。未来工作可探索扩展到更多视觉任务、优化特征选择机制或结合其他预训练模型，以进一步提升性能和通用性。

title: Teaching Old Tokenizers New Words: Efficient Tokenizer Adaptation for Pre-trained Models
abstract: Tokenizer adaptation plays an important role in adapting pre-trained language models to new domains or languages. In this work, we address two complementary aspects of this process: vocabulary extension and pruning. The common approach to extension trains a new tokenizer on domain-specific text and appends the tokens that do not overlap with the existing vocabulary, which often results in many tokens that are unreachable or never used. We propose continued BPE training that extends a pre-trained tokenizer by continuing the BPE merge learning process on new data. Experiments across multiple languages and model families show that this approach improves tokenization efficiency and leads to better utilization of added vocabulary. We also introduce leaf-based vocabulary pruning, which removes redundant tokens while preserving model quality. Together, these methods provide practical tools for controlled vocabulary modification, which we release as an open-source toolkit.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种高效的分词器适应方法，通过继续BPE训练扩展词汇并结合叶节点剪枝优化词汇使用。
light_analysis.motivation: 分词器适应在将预训练语言模型应用于新领域或语言时至关重要，但现有方法常基于领域特定文本训练新分词器并添加非重叠词汇，导致许多词汇不可达或不使用，降低了效率和模型性能。因此，本研究旨在解决词汇扩展中的冗余问题，提升适应过程的效率，以优化预训练模型的实际应用效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出两种核心技术：一是continued BPE training，在预训练分词器基础上，通过在新数据上继续BPE合并学习过程来扩展词汇，避免训练新分词器带来的冗余。二是leaf-based vocabulary pruning，从词汇表中移除不常使用的叶节点词汇，以精简词汇同时保持模型质量。这些方法结合成一套工具，支持受控的词汇修改，并作为开源工具包发布。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多种语言和模型家族中进行，结果表明提出的方法能显著提高分词效率，并更好利用添加的词汇，减少了不可达词汇的数量，优化了性能。与传统的基于新分词器扩展的方法相比，整体效果显示出改进，但摘要未明确说明具体数据如准确率提升百分比，仅强调了在效率和利用率方面的正面影响。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献是开发了一种高效的分词器适应方法，通过词汇扩展和剪枝实现受控修改，增强了预训练模型对新领域的适应能力。作为开源工具包发布，促进了实际应用，具有学术和实用价值。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多语言或模型类型，并进一步优化剪枝策略。

title: BERnaT: Basque Encoders for Representing Natural Textual Diversity
abstract: Language models depend on massive text corpora that are often filtered for quality, a process that can unintentionally exclude non-standard linguistic varieties, reduce model robustness and reinforce representational biases. In this paper, we argue that language models should aim to capture the full spectrum of language variation (dialectal, historical, informal, etc.) rather than relying solely on standardized text. Focusing on the Basque language, we construct new corpora combining standard, social media, and historical sources, and pre-train the BERnaT family of encoder-only models in three configurations: standard, diverse, and combined. We further propose an evaluation framework that separates Natural Language Understanding (NLU) tasks into standard and diverse subsets to assess linguistic generalization. Results show that models trained on both standard and diverse data consistently outperform those trained on standard corpora, improving performance across all task types without compromising standard benchmark accuracy. These findings highlight the importance of linguistic diversity in building inclusive, generalizable language models.
comment: Under review for the Journal Procesamiento de Lenguaje Natural 2026 // En revisión en la revista de Procesamiente de Lenguaje Natural 2026

light_analysis.overview: BERnaT通过结合标准与非标准文本语料库，提升了巴斯克语语言模型的泛化能力和包容性。
light_analysis.motivation: 语言模型通常依赖过滤后的大规模文本进行训练，这可能导致非标准语言变体（如方言、历史文本和社交媒体语言）被排除，从而降低模型鲁棒性并加剧代表性偏见。现有方法过度依赖标准化文本，忽略了语言多样性，限制了模型在实际多样化场景中的应用。本研究以巴斯克语为例，强调捕获语言变异全谱的重要性，旨在构建更包容和可泛化的模型，以解决传统方法的不足和偏见问题。
light_analysis.method: 研究以巴斯克语为对象，构建了包含标准文本、社交媒体内容和历史资料的新语料库。基于这些语料库，预训练了BERnaT系列的仅编码器模型，包括三种配置：标准配置（仅用标准数据）、多样化配置（仅用非标准数据）和组合配置（结合两者）。关键创新点在于整合多样化语料库以提升模型泛化能力，并提出一个评估框架，将自然语言理解（NLU）任务划分为标准和多样化子集，以系统评估模型在不同语言变体上的性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，BERnaT模型在标准和多样化数据上训练时，在所有自然语言理解任务中一致优于仅用标准语料库训练的模型，提升了性能而不损害标准基准准确性。与基线方法相比，组合配置模型在标准任务上保持高准确率，同时在多样化任务上表现更优，证实了多样化训练能有效增强模型泛化能力，但具体准确率提升数值摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究验证了通过整合多样化语料库可以显著提升语言模型的包容性和泛化能力，为自然语言处理领域提供了新的训练和评估策略。BERnaT模型在巴斯克语上的成功表明语言多样性是关键因素，具有学术价值和应用潜力，可推广到其他低资源或多样化语言中。潜在局限性包括摘要未明确说明的扩展性，未来工作可能涉及更多语言和变体的探索。

title: ASPEN: An Adaptive Spectral Physics-Enabled Network for Ginzburg-Landau Dynamics
abstract: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) have emerged as a powerful, mesh-free paradigm for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). However, they notoriously struggle with stiff, multi-scale, and nonlinear systems due to the inherent spectral bias of standard multilayer perceptron (MLP) architectures, which prevents them from adequately representing high-frequency components. In this work, we introduce the Adaptive Spectral Physics-Enabled Network (ASPEN), a novel architecture designed to overcome this critical limitation. ASPEN integrates an adaptive spectral layer with learnable Fourier features directly into the network's input stage. This mechanism allows the model to dynamically tune its own spectral basis during training, enabling it to efficiently learn and represent the precise frequency content required by the solution. We demonstrate the efficacy of ASPEN by applying it to the complex Ginzburg-Landau equation (CGLE), a canonical and challenging benchmark for nonlinear, stiff spatio-temporal dynamics. Our results show that a standard PINN architecture catastrophically fails on this problem, diverging into non-physical oscillations. In contrast, ASPEN successfully solves the CGLE with exceptional accuracy. The predicted solution is visually indistinguishable from the high-resolution ground truth, achieving a low median physics residual of 5.10 x 10^-3. Furthermore, we validate that ASPEN's solution is not only pointwise accurate but also physically consistent, correctly capturing emergent physical properties, including the rapid free energy relaxation and the long-term stability of the domain wall front. This work demonstrates that by incorporating an adaptive spectral basis, our framework provides a robust and physically-consistent solver for complex dynamical systems where standard PINNs fail, opening new options for machine learning in challenging physical domains.

light_analysis.overview: 提出自适应频谱物理神经网络ASPEN，有效克服物理信息神经网络在处理复杂偏微分方程时的频谱偏差问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于物理信息神经网络在解决stiff、多尺度、非线性偏微分方程时，因标准多层感知机的频谱偏差而失败，无法表示高频分量。这一问题限制了机器学习在复杂物理系统模拟中的应用。现有PINNs方法在处理Ginzburg-Landau方程等挑战性基准时，常导致非物理振荡，表明需要更有效的架构来提升求解精度和物理一致性，以应对现实世界中的复杂动态系统。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出ASPEN架构，核心创新是在网络输入阶段集成自适应频谱层和可学习傅里叶特征。该机制允许模型在训练过程中动态调整频谱基础，优化频率内容的表示，从而高效学习精确的频率成分。具体应用于复杂Ginzburg-Landau方程，一个典型的非线性stiff时空动态系统，作为验证基准，通过自适应方法提升了模型的鲁棒性和适应性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，标准PINN在处理Ginzburg-Landau方程时彻底失败，产生非物理振荡。相比之下，ASPEN成功求解方程，预测解与高分辨率真值视觉无区别，中值物理残差仅为5.10 x 10^-3。此外，ASPEN的解在物理上一致，正确捕捉了自由能快速松弛和域壁前端的长期稳定性等物理特性，证明了其高精度和鲁棒性，远优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论表明，ASPEN通过集成自适应频谱基础，提供了一个鲁棒的物理一致求解器，适用于标准PINNs失败的复杂动态系统。这项工作拓展了机器学习在挑战性物理领域的应用可能性，展示了自适应方法在提升模型性能方面的重要价值。未来工作可探索ASPEN在其他复杂PDEs中的应用，或进一步优化频谱自适应机制。

title: ELVIS: Enhance Low-Light for Video Instance Segmentation in the Dark
abstract: Video instance segmentation (VIS) for low-light content remains highly challenging for both humans and machines alike, due to noise, blur and other adverse conditions. The lack of large-scale annotated datasets and the limitations of current synthetic pipelines, particularly in modeling temporal degradations, further hinder progress. Moreover, existing VIS methods are not robust to the degradations found in low-light videos and, consequently, perform poorly even after finetuning. In this paper, we introduce \textbf{ELVIS} (\textbf{E}nhance \textbf{L}ow-Light for \textbf{V}ideo \textbf{I}nstance \textbf{S}egmentation), a framework that enables domain adaptation of state-of-the-art VIS models to low-light scenarios. ELVIS is comprised of an unsupervised synthetic low-light video pipeline that models both spatial and temporal degradations, a calibration-free degradation profile estimation network (VDP-Net) and an enhancement decoder head that disentangles degradations from content features. ELVIS improves performances by up to \textbf{+3.7AP} on the synthetic low-light YouTube-VIS 2019 dataset and beats two-stage baselines by at least \textbf{+2.8AP} on real low-light videos. Code and dataset available at: \href{https://joannelin168.github.io/research/ELVIS}{https://joannelin168.github.io/research/ELVIS}

light_analysis.overview: ELVIS框架通过无监督合成管道和降解分离技术，显著提升低光视频实例分割的领域适应性能，解决现有方法在黑暗环境中的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 低光视频实例分割因噪声、模糊等降解条件而极具挑战，现有方法对这类降解不鲁棒，且缺乏大规模标注数据集，特别是能准确建模时间降解的合成管道有限。这阻碍了在监控、自动驾驶等黑暗环境中的应用进展，因此急需开发一种能有效适应低光场景、提升模型鲁棒性的新方法。
light_analysis.method: ELVIS框架包括三个核心组件：一个无监督合成低光视频管道，能同时模拟空间和时间降解；一个无需校准的降解配置文件估计网络（VDP-Net），用于估计降解特性；以及一个增强解码器头，用于从内容特征中解耦降解。关键创新在于建模了时空降解，并通过分离降解与内容特征，使状态-艺术VIS模型能更好地适应低光条件，提升分割准确性。
light_analysis.result: ELVIS在合成低光YouTube-VIS 2019数据集上实现了高达+3.7 AP的性能提升。在真实低光视频测试中，它超越了传统两阶段基线方法，获得至少+2.8 AP的改进。这些结果表明，ELVIS在降解建模和增强方面效果显著，通过更精确的降解估计和内容分离，大幅提高了低光视频实例分割的鲁棒性和准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: ELVIS的主要贡献在于提出了一种结合无监督合成和降解分离的框架，有效提升了低光视频实例分割的领域适应能力。其学术价值在于解决了低光视觉中的关键降解问题，推动了该领域的发展；实际应用价值体现在夜间监控等场景中。未来工作可探索更多降解类型的建模或扩展到更大数据集。

title: EZ-SP: Fast and Lightweight Superpoint-Based 3D Segmentation
abstract: Superpoint-based pipelines provide an efficient alternative to point- or voxel-based 3D semantic segmentation, but are often bottlenecked by their CPU-bound partition step. We propose a learnable, fully GPU partitioning algorithm that generates geometrically and semantically coherent superpoints 13$\times$ faster than prior methods. Our module is compact (under 60k parameters), trains in under 20 minutes with a differentiable surrogate loss, and requires no handcrafted features. Combine with a lightweight superpoint classifier, the full pipeline fits in $<$2 MB of VRAM, scales to multi-million-point scenes, and supports real-time inference. With 72$\times$ faster inference and 120$\times$ fewer parameters, EZ-SP matches the accuracy of point-based SOTA models across three domains: indoor scans (S3DIS), autonomous driving (KITTI-360), and aerial LiDAR (DALES). Code and pretrained models are accessible at github.com/drprojects/superpoint_transformer.
comment: Accepted at ICRA 2026. Camera-ready version with Appendix

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种快速、轻量级的基于superpoint的3D语义分割方法，通过GPU分区算法显著提升效率，匹配SOTA准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: Superpoint-based pipelines在3D语义分割中提供了效率优势，但现有方法的partition步骤通常受限于CPU处理，成为性能瓶颈，限制了在大规模点云场景中的实时应用，尤其是在自动驾驶和航空测绘等需要快速推理的领域。该研究旨在解决这一效率问题，通过将分区步骤迁移到GPU来加速整个流程，弥补了现有方法在处理速度和资源占用上的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一种可学习的、完全基于GPU的分区算法，用于生成几何和语义上一致的superpoints。该方法使用可微分的替代损失进行训练，无需手工特征，模块紧凑（参数少于60k），训练时间在20分钟内。结合轻量级superpoint分类器，整个管道占用的VRAM少于2MB，支持扩展到百万点级别的场景，并实现实时推理，关键技术包括高效GPU实现和轻量化网络设计。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该方法在分区速度上比先前方法快13倍，整体推理速度快72倍，参数数量减少120倍，同时在三个基准数据集（室内扫描S3DIS、自动驾驶KITTI-360和航空LiDAR DALES）上达到了与基于点的当前最优（SOTA）模型相当的准确性，证明了其在保持高精度的同时，显著提升了效率和轻量化程度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献在于开发了一种高效且轻量级的3D语义分割管道，通过GPU加速和可学习算法解决了superpoint方法中的瓶颈问题，具有重要的学术价值和实际应用潜力，特别是在需要实时处理的大规模3D场景中。未来工作可以探索更多场景的适应性或进一步优化硬件兼容性。

title: The Price of Progress: Price Performance and the Future of AI
abstract: Language models have seen enormous progress on advanced benchmarks in recent years, but much of this progress has only been possible by using more costly models. Benchmarks may therefore present a warped picture of progress in practical capabilities *per dollar*. To remedy this, we use data from Artificial Analysis and Epoch AI to form the largest dataset of current and historical prices to run benchmarks to date. We find that the price for a given level of benchmark performance has decreased remarkably fast, around $5\times$ to $10\times$ per year, for frontier models on knowledge, reasoning, math, and software engineering benchmarks. These reductions in the cost of AI inference are due to economic forces, hardware efficiency improvements, and algorithmic efficiency improvements. Isolating out open models to control for competition effects and dividing by hardware price declines, we estimate that algorithmic efficiency progress is around $3\times$ per year. However, at the same time, the price of running frontier models is rising between $3\times$ to $18\times$ per year due to bigger models and larger reasoning demands. Finally, we recommend that evaluators both publicize and take into account the price of benchmarking as an essential part of measuring the real-world impact of AI.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过分析AI模型在基准测试上的价格性能趋势，揭示了算法效率进步与运行成本上升的对比现象，并建议评估中纳入成本考虑。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，语言模型在高级基准测试上取得显著进步，但许多进步依赖于使用更昂贵的模型，导致基准测试可能扭曲每美元实用能力的进步视图。这一问题在AI实际部署中至关重要，因为成本是影响技术采纳和应用的关键因素。现有评估方法往往只关注性能提升，而忽略了价格因素，因此无法准确反映AI在真实世界中的进展和影响力。
light_analysis.method: 作者收集了来自Artificial Analysis和Epoch AI的当前和历史价格数据，构建了迄今为止最大的数据集，用于分析基准测试的价格性能。他们通过量化价格趋势，隔离开放模型以控制竞争效应，并除以硬件价格下降来估计算法效率的进步。核心创新点在于综合经济力量、硬件效率和算法效率，以全面评估成本变化，并采用统计方法来分离不同因素的影响。
light_analysis.result: 研究发现，在知识、推理、数学和软件工程等基准上，前沿模型达到给定性能的价格每年下降约5到10倍。算法效率的进步估计为每年约3倍，这得益于技术改进。然而，由于模型规模增大和推理需求提高，运行前沿模型的价格每年上涨3到18倍，显示出成本压力的增加。这些结果通过对比历史数据得出，强调了价格性能的动态变化。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是揭示了AI价格性能的复杂趋势，强调了成本在评估技术进步中的重要性。它建议评估者公开和考虑基准测试价格，作为衡量AI现实影响的关键指标，这有助于更全面地理解进步并指导未来研究。潜在局限性可能包括数据集范围的限制，未来工作可扩展到更多领域或细化成本分析。

title: Real-Time Long Horizon Air Quality Forecasting via Group-Relative Policy Optimization
abstract: Accurate long horizon forecasting of particulate matter (PM) concentration fields is essential for operational public health decisions. However, achieving reliable forecasts remains challenging in regions with complex terrain and strong atmospheric dynamics such as East Asia. While foundation models such as Aurora offer global generality, they often miss region-specific dynamics and rely on non-real-time inputs, limiting their practical utility for localized warning systems. To address this gap, we construct and release the real-world observations and high-resolution CMAQ-OBS dataset for East Asia, reducing regional error by 59.5% and enabling real-time 48-120 hour forecasts critical for public health alerts. However, standard point-wise objectives cannot reflect asymmetric operational costs, where false alarms deteriorate public trust while missed severe events endanger populations. This cost mismatch causes SFT models to over-predict and yield high False Alarm Rates. We introduce Group-Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with class-wise rewards and curriculum rollout to align predictions with operational priorities. Experimental results demonstrate that our framework significantly improves the reliability of the forecast. Compared to the SFT-only baseline, our model reduces the False Alarm Rate by 47.3% while achieving a competitive F1-score, proving its effectiveness for practical, real-world air quality forecasting systems on long lead time scenarios. Code and dataset are publicly available at https://github.com/kaist-cvml/FAKER-Air.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了Group-Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO）方法，结合分类奖励和课程滚动，以改进实时长时空气质量预测的可靠性，减少假警报率。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决东亚等复杂地形和强大气动力学区域的长时颗粒物浓度预测问题，这对公共健康预警系统至关重要。现有基础模型如Aurora虽然具有全球通用性，但缺乏区域特异性，依赖非实时输入，限制了实际应用。此外，标准逐点预测目标无法反映假警报和漏报的不对称操作成本，导致监督微调模型产生高假警报率。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于Group-Relative Policy Optimization（GRPO），通过类级奖励和课程滚动优化预测，使模型对齐操作优先级。作者构建并发布了CMAQ-OBS数据集，整合东亚地区的真实观测数据和高分辨率模拟，将区域误差降低了59.5%，支持实时48-120小时预测。该方法利用强化学习元素调整预测策略，减少假警报。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，与仅使用监督微调的基线相比，GRPO框架显著提高了预测可靠性。具体数据：假警报率降低了47.3%，同时保持了有竞争力的F1分数。这证明该方法在长时提前场景下有效，提升了实际空气质量预测系统的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了GRPO框架，通过组相对策略优化解决了长时空气质量预测中的假警报问题。学术价值在于引入了操作成本对齐的新方法，实际应用上为本地预警系统提供了可靠工具。未来工作可能包括扩展其他区域或进一步优化实时性能。

title: UAVLight: A Benchmark for Illumination-Robust 3D Reconstruction in Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) Scenes
abstract: Illumination inconsistency is a fundamental challenge in multi-view 3D reconstruction. Variations in sunlight direction, cloud cover, and shadows break the constant-lighting assumption underlying both classical multi-view stereo (MVS) and structure from motion (SfM) pipelines and recent neural rendering methods, leading to geometry drift, color inconsistency, and shadow imprinting. This issue is especially critical in UAV-based reconstruction, where long flight durations and outdoor environments make lighting changes unavoidable. However, existing datasets either restrict capture to short time windows, thus lacking meaningful illumination diversity, or span months and seasons, where geometric and semantic changes confound the isolated study of lighting robustness. We introduce UAVLight, a controlled-yet-real benchmark for illumination-robust 3D reconstruction. Each scene is captured along repeatable, geo-referenced flight paths at multiple fixed times of day, producing natural lighting variation under consistent geometry, calibration, and viewpoints. With standardized evaluation protocols across lighting conditions, UAVLight provides a reliable foundation for developing and benchmarking reconstruction methods that are consistent, faithful, and relightable in real outdoor environments.

light_analysis.overview: UAVLight基准通过可控方法捕获无人机场景的光照变化，为光照稳健的3D重建提供了标准化评估平台。
light_analysis.motivation: 光照不一致是多视角3D重建的核心挑战，尤其在无人机场景中，长时间飞行和户外环境使光照变化不可避免，导致几何漂移和颜色不一致。现有数据集要么缺乏有效光照多样性，要么跨季节捕获导致几何变化混淆光照影响研究，无法孤立评估光照稳健性。因此，开发一个专门针对光照稳健性的基准至关重要，以支持方法开发并提升重建质量在真实环境中的适用性。
light_analysis.method: UAVLight基准采用重复、地理参考的飞行路径，在不同固定时间捕获同一场景，确保几何结构、相机校准和视点一致，从而自然产生光照变化。关键创新在于可控但真实的捕获方法，隔离光照因素，避免其他变量干扰。数据集提供标准化评估协议，用于测试重建方法在不同光照条件下的性能，支持经典多视角立体、运动结构重建和神经渲染方法的比较与改进。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果，如准确率提升或效率改进。UAVLight基准主要作为基础设施，为光照稳健的3D重建方法提供一致评估环境。通过标准化协议，它旨在支持后续研究在不同光照条件下对比基线方法，但论文摘要未提供详细性能数据，重点关注基准的设计和潜在应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: UAVLight的主要贡献是填补了光照稳健3D重建基准的空白，通过真实可控的数据集促进方法开发。学术上，它为研究光照一致性挑战提供了标准测试平台；实际应用中，有助于提升无人机场景中重建的可靠性和真实性。尽管摘要未提及局限性或未来方向，但潜在扩展可能包括更复杂环境的光照建模或集成多传感器数据。

title: SelfMOTR: Revisiting MOTR with Self-Generating Detection Priors
abstract: End-to-end transformer architectures have driven significant progress in multi-object tracking by unifying detection and association into a single, heuristic-free framework. Despite these benefits, poor detection performance and the inherent conflict between detection and association in a joint architecture remain critical concerns. Recent approaches aim to mitigate these issues by employing advanced denoising or label assignment strategies, or by incorporating detection priors from external object detectors. In this paper, we propose SelfMOTR, a simple yet highly effective detector-free alternative that decouples proposal discovery from association using self-generated internal detection priors. Through extensive analysis and ablation studies, we show that end-to-end transformer trackers with joint detection-association decoding retain substantial hidden detection capacity, and we provide a practical detector-free mechanism for leveraging it. To shed light on these joint decoding dynamics, we draw inspiration from attention sink analyses in large language models, leveraging Track Attention Mass to show that standard generic queries exhibit unbalanced attention, frequently struggling to weigh track context against novel object discovery. SelfMOTR achieves highly competitive performance in complex, dynamic environments, yielding 69.2 HOTA on DanceTrack and leading with 71.1 HOTA on the Bird Flock Tracking (BFT) dataset. Project page: https://medem23.github.io/SM

light_analysis.overview: 提出SelfMOTR，一种基于自生成内部检测先验的无检测器多目标跟踪方法，有效解决端到端transformer架构中检测与关联的冲突问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于多目标跟踪中，端到端transformer架构虽简化了检测与关联的统一框架，但检测性能差和两者内在冲突仍是关键挑战。现有方法通过去噪、改进标签分配或引入外部检测器来缓解，但这些方案增加了复杂性或依赖外部模块。本文旨在开发一种更简单高效的替代方案，直接利用内部能力克服限制，提升跟踪性能而无需额外检测器。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出SelfMOTR，一个无需外部检测器的框架，通过自生成内部检测先验来解耦提议发现和关联。核心创新在于利用transformer架构的隐藏检测能力，并借鉴大语言模型中的注意力汇分析，引入Track Attention Mass来分析和平衡注意力分布，优化对象发现与跟踪上下文之间的权衡。这提供了一种实用机制，在保持端到端简洁性的同时提升联合解码效果。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，SelfMOTR在复杂动态环境中取得竞争性性能：在DanceTrack数据集上达到69.2 HOTA分数，在Bird Flock Tracking (BFT)数据集上以71.1 HOTA领先。这些成绩表明方法无需外部检测器，即在挑战性场景中实现优异效果，突显其有效性和鲁棒性。摘要未明确说明与具体基线方法的对比细节，但强调了整体性能的高度竞争力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结SelfMOTR的主要贡献是提出一种利用自生成内部检测先验的无检测器多目标跟踪方法，有效优化联合检测-关联解码。研究揭示了transformer跟踪器的隐藏检测能力，并通过注意力分析提供新视角，具有重要学术价值，可为未来自监督跟踪机制等研究奠定基础。潜在局限性可能包括计算效率或其他未探索方面，需进一步工作验证。

title: IDSplat: Instance-Decomposed 3D Gaussian Splatting for Driving Scenes
abstract: Reconstructing dynamic driving scenes is essential for developing autonomous systems through sensor-realistic simulation. Although recent methods achieve high-fidelity reconstructions, they either rely on costly human annotations for object trajectories or use time-varying representations without explicit object-level decomposition, leading to intertwined static and dynamic elements that hinder scene separation. We present IDSplat, a self-supervised 3D Gaussian Splatting framework that reconstructs dynamic scenes with explicit instance decomposition and learnable motion trajectories, without requiring human annotations. Our key insight is to model dynamic objects as coherent instances undergoing rigid transformations, rather than unstructured time-varying primitives. For instance decomposition, we employ zero-shot, language-grounded video tracking anchored to 3D using lidar, and estimate consistent poses via feature correspondences. We introduce a coordinated-turn smoothing scheme to obtain temporally and physically consistent motion trajectories, mitigating pose misalignments and tracking failures, followed by joint optimization of object poses and Gaussian parameters. Experiments on the Waymo Open Dataset demonstrate that our method achieves competitive reconstruction quality while maintaining instance-level decomposition and generalizes across diverse sequences and view densities without retraining, making it practical for large-scale autonomous driving applications. Code will be released.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了IDSplat，一种自监督的3D高斯泼溅框架，通过实例分解和可学习运动轨迹重构驾驶场景，无需人工标注。
light_analysis.motivation: 重构动态驾驶场景对于自动驾驶系统开发至关重要，但现有方法存在不足：它们要么依赖昂贵的人工标注来获取物体轨迹，要么使用无显式对象分解的时间变化表示，导致静态与动态元素交织，阻碍场景分离。这种交织问题降低了仿真质量，限制了大规模应用。本研究旨在克服这些缺陷，通过自监督方式实现实例级分解，减少对人工干预的依赖，提高实用性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.method: IDSplat采用自监督3D高斯泼溅框架，核心创新是将动态对象建模为经历刚性变换的连贯实例，而非无结构的时间变化原语。方法包括使用零样本、语言基础视频跟踪，通过激光雷达将跟踪结果锚定到3D空间，利用特征对应估计一致姿态。引入协调转向平滑方案，确保时间一致和物理合理的运动轨迹，缓解姿态错位和跟踪失败。最后，通过联合优化物体姿态和高斯参数，提升重建精度和稳定性。
light_analysis.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset上的实验表明，IDSplat实现了竞争性的重建质量，同时保持实例级分解。相比于基线方法，它能在无需重新训练的情况下泛化到多样序列和不同视图密度，展示了鲁棒性和实用性。这为大规模自动驾驶应用提供了可行解决方案，支持高效场景分离和仿真。
light_analysis.conclusion: IDSplat的主要贡献是提出一个自监督框架，通过实例分解和可学习轨迹重构动态驾驶场景，无需人工标注。学术上，推动了无监督动态场景建模的发展；实际上，适用于大规模自动驾驶仿真，提高了场景分离的效率和效果。代码将发布，促进进一步研究和应用。局限性或未来工作摘要未明确说明。

title: DepthFocus: Controllable Depth Estimation for See-Through Scenes
abstract: Depth in the real world is rarely singular. Transmissive materials create layered ambiguities that confound conventional perception systems. Existing models remain passive; conventional approaches typically estimate static depth maps anchored to the nearest surface, and even recent multi-head extensions suffer from a representational bottleneck due to fixed feature representations. This stands in contrast to human vision, which actively shifts focus to perceive a desired depth. We introduce \textbf{DepthFocus}, a steerable Vision Transformer that redefines stereo depth estimation as condition-aware control. Instead of extracting fixed features, our model dynamically modulates its computation based on a physical reference depth, integrating dual conditional mechanisms to selectively perceive geometry aligned with the desired focus. Leveraging a newly curated large-scale synthetic dataset, \textbf{DepthFocus} achieves state-of-the-art results across all evaluated benchmarks, including both standard single-layer and complex multi-layered scenarios. While maintaining high precision in opaque regions, our approach effectively resolves depth ambiguities in transparent and reflective scenes by selectively reconstructing geometry at a target distance. This capability enables robust, intent-driven perception that significantly outperforms existing multi-layer methods, marking a substantial step toward active 3D perception. \noindent \textbf{Project page}: \href{https://junhong-3dv.github.io/depthfocus-project/}{\textbf{this https URL}}.

light_analysis.overview: DepthFocus模型是一种可控制的Vision Transformer，通过条件感知控制实现可调节深度估计，解决透射场景中的层次性模糊问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 真实世界深度估计常因透射材料如玻璃或反射表面导致多层模糊，传统方法被动地估计单一静态深度，即使多扩展方法也因固定特征表示而受限。这与人类视觉主动调整焦点的能力形成对比，凸显了开发主动控制深度焦点系统的必要性，以提升在复杂场景如自动驾驶或机器人视觉中的感知准确性。
light_analysis.method: DepthFace模型采用Vision Transformer架构，核心创新在于引入条件感知控制机制，通过基于物理参考深度动态调制计算过程，并集成双条件机制以选择性重建目标距离的几何结构。这允许模型根据输入焦点自适应调整感知，解决深度模糊。研究还利用新策划的大规模合成数据集进行训练，覆盖多样化透射场景。
light_analysis.result: DepthFocus在所有评估基准上实现最先进结果，涵盖标准单层和复杂多层场景。在透明和反射区域，它能有效解决深度模糊，同时保持不透明区域高精度，显著优于现有多层深度估计方法。这展示了模型在意图驱动感知方面的鲁棒性，尽管摘要未明确具体性能指标数字。
light_analysis.conclusion: DepthFocus模型的主要贡献在于将深度估计从被动感知转向主动控制，为主动3D感知领域迈出重要一步，具有学术价值和实际应用潜力，如增强现实和自动驾驶。未来工作可进一步探索模型在实际部署中的泛化能力或扩展到更复杂真实世界场景。

title: Stable diffusion models reveal a persisting human and AI gap in visual creativity
abstract: While recent research suggests Large Language Models match human creative performance in divergent thinking tasks, visual creativity remains underexplored. This study compared image generation in human participants (Visual Artists and Non Artists) and using an image generation AI model (two prompting conditions with varying human input: high for Human Inspired, low for Self Guided). Human raters (N=255) and GPT4o evaluated the creativity of the resulting images. We found a clear creativity gradient, with Visual Artists being the most creative, followed by Non Artists, then Human Inspired generative AI, and finally Self Guided generative AI. Increased human guidance strongly improved GenAI's creative output, bringing its productions close to those of Non Artists. Notably, human and AI raters also showed vastly different creativity judgment patterns. These results suggest that, in contrast to language centered tasks, GenAI models may face unique challenges in visual domains, where creativity depends on perceptual nuance and contextual sensitivity, distinctly human capacities that may not be readily transferable from language models.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究揭示了人类与AI在视觉创造力上的持久差距，并表明增加人类指导能显著提升AI的创造力。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管大型语言模型在发散思维任务中已接近人类创造力水平，但视觉创造力领域的研究仍显不足。视觉创造力依赖于感知细微差别和上下文敏感度，这些是人类特有的能力，可能难以从语言模型中迁移。因此，本研究旨在探索AI在视觉创造力方面的表现，填补研究空白，并解决AI在视觉领域可能面临的独特挑战。
light_analysis.method: 研究采用比较方法，涉及人类参与者（包括视觉艺术家和非艺术家）和AI图像生成模型（使用Stable Diffusion模型）。AI模型在两种提示条件下运行：高人类输入的'Human Inspired'条件和低人类输入的'Self Guided'条件。创造力评估由255名人类评估者和GPT-4o进行，以量化不同条件下的表现，关键创新在于控制人类输入程度来研究其对AI创造力的影响。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示明确的创造力梯度：视觉艺术家创造力最高，其次是非艺术家、高人类输入AI和低人类输入AI。增加人类指导显著提升了生成AI的创造力，使其输出接近非艺术家水平。此外，人类评估者和AI评估者对创造力的判断模式存在差异，表明评估标准可能不同。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是揭示了人类与AI在视觉创造力上的差距，并强调人类指导对提升AI创造力的重要性。学术上，这指出AI在视觉领域面临独特挑战，不同于语言任务。实际应用中，研究结果可为改进生成AI模型提供方向，例如通过增强人类-AI协作。未来工作可探索如何进一步缩小这一差距。

title: First Frame Is the Place to Go for Video Content Customization
abstract: What role does the first frame play in video generation models? Traditionally, it's viewed as the spatial-temporal starting point of a video, merely a seed for subsequent animation. In this work, we reveal a fundamentally different perspective: video models implicitly treat the first frame as a conceptual memory buffer that stores visual entities for later reuse during generation. Leveraging this insight, we show that it's possible to achieve robust and generalized video content customization in diverse scenarios, using only 20-50 training examples without architectural changes or large-scale finetuning. This unveils a powerful, overlooked capability of video generation models for reference-based video customization.

light_analysis.overview: 本文揭示了视频生成模型中第一帧作为概念记忆缓冲区的新角色，并基于此提出了一种仅需少量训练示例的视频内容定制方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统视频生成模型将第一帧视为简单的时空起点，导致视频内容定制通常需要大量训练数据或复杂模型调整。本研究旨在解决这一效率低下的问题，通过重新定义第一帧的隐含功能，探索更高效的视频定制途径，以简化应用流程并提升模型利用率。
light_analysis.method: 研究基于关键洞察：视频模型隐含地将第一帧用作概念记忆缓冲区，存储视觉实体以供后续生成重用。作者设计了一种方法，利用这一特性实现视频内容定制，仅需20-50个训练示例，无需模型架构更改或大规模微调。具体数据集和模型架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，该方法在多样场景中实现了鲁棒和通用的视频内容定制。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率，但强调仅需少量示例即可达成效果，暗示与传统方法相比在效率和适应性方面的改进。基线对比信息摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究贡献在于重新定义了第一帧的角色，并展示了高效视频定制方法，学术上深化了对模型机制的理解，实际应用中提供了低资源定制途径。未来工作可探索更多场景和优化，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Can You Learn to See Without Images? Procedural Warm-Up for Vision Transformers
abstract: Transformers are remarkably versatile, suggesting the existence of generic inductive biases beneficial across modalities. In this work, we explore a new way to instil such biases in vision transformers (ViTs) through pretraining on procedurally generated data devoid of visual or semantic content. We generate this data with simple algorithms such as formal grammars, so the results bear no relationship to either natural or synthetic images. We use this procedurally generated data to pretrain ViTs in a warm-up phase that bypasses their visual patch embedding mechanisms, thus encouraging the models to internalise abstract computational priors. When followed by standard image-based training, this warm-up significantly improves data efficiency, convergence speed, and downstream performance. On ImageNet-1K, for example, allocating just 1% of the training budget to procedural data improves final accuracy by over 1.7%.
