In terms of its effect on performance, 1% procedurally generated data is thus equivalent to 28% of the ImageNet-1K data. These findings suggest a promising path toward new data-efficient and domain-agnostic pretraining strategies.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种创新的预训练方法，通过程序生成的、非视觉数据预热视觉变换器，显著提升数据效率和模型性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Transformers因其跨模态通用性而备受关注，暗示着存在可泛化的归纳偏见，但现有视觉变换器预训练通常依赖大量图像数据，导致数据效率低下和领域依赖问题。本研究旨在解决如何在没有视觉或语义内容的情况下灌输这些偏见，以提高模型训练效率和泛化能力，应对现实世界中数据稀缺的挑战。现有方法依赖于图像内容，可能限制了模型的抽象学习能力，因此探索程序生成数据作为替代手段具有重要性和创新性。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出一种预热阶段策略，使用简单算法（如形式文法）生成无视觉或语义关联的程序数据，来预训练视觉变换器。这种方法绕过视觉补丁嵌入机制，迫使模型内部化抽象计算先验，从而灌输通用的归纳偏见。关键创新在于利用非视觉数据初始化模型，随后结合标准图像训练，以验证其效果。具体而言，预热阶段不使用图像输入，而是基于算法生成的结构化数据，为模型提供更泛化的学习基础。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在ImageNet-1K数据集上，仅将1%的训练预算用于程序生成数据预热，就能提高最终准确率超过1.7%。这种效果相当于使用28%的ImageNet-1K数据，显著提升了数据效率、收敛速度和下游任务性能。相比于标准图像训练基线，该方法在资源有限条件下表现优异，显示了程序数据在减少数据依赖和加速训练方面的实际优势。摘要未明确说明与其他预训练方法的详细对比，但整体结果突出了其高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了一种数据高效的预训练策略，通过程序生成数据预热视觉变换器，促进了模型在视觉任务中的泛化能力。其学术价值在于探索了非视觉数据在AI训练中的应用，为领域无关的预训练方法提供了新路径；实际应用价值体现在减少数据需求、提高训练速度和模型性能。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可扩展到其他模态或算法优化，以进一步验证其通用性。

title: From Synthetic Scenes to Real Performance: Enhancing Spatial Reasoning in VLMs
abstract: Fine-tuning Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is a common strategy to improve performance following an ad-hoc data collection and annotation of real-world scenes. However, this process is often prone to biases, errors, and distribution imbalance, resulting in overfitting and imbalanced performance. Although a few studies have tried to address this problem by generating synthetic data, they lacked control over distribution bias and annotation quality. To address these challenges, we redesign the fine-tuning process in two ways. First, we control the generation of data and its annotations, ensuring it is free from bias, distribution imbalance, and annotation errors. We automatically construct the dataset by comprehensively sampling objects' attributes, including color, shape, size, and position within the scene. Secondly, using this annotated dataset, we fine-tune state-of-the-art VLMs and assess performance transferability to real-world data on the absolute position task. We conduct exhaustive evaluations on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks. Our experiments reveal two key findings: 1) fine-tuning on balanced synthetic data yields uniform performance across the visual scene and mitigates common biases; and 2) fine-tuning on synthetic stimuli improves performance by 13% on real-world data (COCO), outperforming models fine-tuned on the full COCO train set.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种通过生成无偏见的平衡合成数据来微调视觉语言模型的方法，有效提升空间推理性能并转移至真实世界数据，解决了传统微调中的偏见和过拟合问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于微调视觉语言模型时，依赖真实世界数据的收集和标注容易引入偏见、错误和分布不平衡，导致过拟合和性能不均。这些问题限制了模型在实际应用中的泛化能力，而现有方法虽尝试使用合成数据，却缺乏对分布偏见和标注质量的有效控制，因此需要开发更可靠的数据生成和微调策略以提升模型性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文重新设计微调过程：首先，控制合成数据及其标注的生成，通过自动采样对象的颜色、形状、大小和位置等属性，确保数据无偏见、分布平衡且标注准确；其次，使用这个高质量数据集微调先进的视觉语言模型，并在绝对位置任务上评估其对真实世界数据（如COCO）的性能可转移性，强调了对数据生成过程的精确管理和模型评估的全面性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在合成和真实世界基准上进行了详尽评估，结果显示：在平衡合成数据上微调的模型能产生视觉场景上的均匀性能，有效减轻常见偏见；同时在COCO真实数据集上的性能提升13%，优于在全COCO训练集上微调的模型，表明了合成数据微调不仅提升性能还具有良好的可转移性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了一种基于控制生成合成数据的VLMs微调方法，解决了数据偏见和过拟合问题，显著提升了模型在真实世界任务中的性能。该研究具有学术价值，为视觉语言模型优化提供了新思路，并可在数据稀缺场景中推广应用，未来工作可能包括扩展至更多任务或数据类型以验证泛化能力。

title: Human or LLM as Standardized Patients? A Comparative Study for Medical Education
abstract: Standardized patients (SPs) are indispensable for clinical skills training but remain expensive and difficult to scale. Although large language model (LLM)-based virtual standardized patients (VSPs) have been proposed as an alternative, their behavior remains unstable and lacks rigorous comparison with human standardized patients. We propose EasyMED, a multi-agent VSP framework that separates case-grounded information disclosure from response generation to support stable, inquiry-conditioned patient behavior. We also introduce SPBench, a human-grounded benchmark with eight expert-defined criteria for interaction-level evaluation. Experiments show that EasyMED more closely matches human SP behavior than existing VSPs, particularly in case consistency and controlled disclosure. A four-week controlled study further demonstrates learning outcomes comparable to human SP training, with stronger early gains for novice learners and improved flexibility, psychological safety, and cost efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出EasyMED多代理框架和SPBench基准，使LLM驱动的虚拟标准病人更稳定并接近人类行为，优化医学教育训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 在医学教育中，标准病人对临床技能训练至关重要，但高昂成本和扩展困难限制了其广泛应用。现有基于大语言模型的虚拟标准病人虽然作为替代方案提出，但其行为表现不稳定，且缺乏与人类标准病人的系统性比较，这导致可靠性和有效性不足，无法满足大规模、低成本培训的需求。因此，研究需要开发稳定、可评估的VSPs解决方案，以解决现有方法的缺陷，推动医学教育的创新和普及。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出EasyMED，一个多代理虚拟标准病人框架，通过分离案例基础的信息披露和响应生成，支持稳定、查询条件驱动的患者行为。关键创新点在于多代理架构，确保行为一致性和可控性，从而提高交互稳定性。此外，引入SPBench基准，包含八个专家定义的标准，如案例一致性，用于在交互级别评估虚拟病人与人类标准病人的相似度。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节，但框架和基准为系统性评估提供了基础。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，EasyMED在案例一致性和受控披露方面比现有虚拟标准病人更接近人类标准病人行为，这表明其在模拟真实患者互动中的有效性。一项为期四周的对照研究进一步证明，使用EasyMED进行训练的学习成果与人类标准病人训练相当，对初学者来说早期学习增益更强，同时还提高了训练的灵活性、心理安全性和成本效率，展现了其在实际教育场景中的优越性能和可扩展优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了EasyMED框架和SPBench基准，解决了虚拟标准病人行为不稳定和缺乏评估的问题。学术价值在于为LLM在医学教育中的应用提供了创新方法和技术基准；实际应用中，它显著降低了培训成本，提高了可扩展性和训练效果，具有广泛的教育潜力。未来工作可能包括优化模型以处理更复杂病例或扩展多模态交互，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: AgentExpt: Automating AI Experiment Design with LLM-based Resource Retrieval Agent
abstract: Large language model agents are becoming increasingly capable at web-centric tasks such as information retrieval, complex reasoning. These emerging capabilities have given rise to surge research interests in developing LLM agent for facilitating scientific quest. One key application in AI research is to automate experiment design through agentic dataset and baseline retrieval. However, prior efforts suffer from limited data coverage, as recommendation datasets primarily harvest candidates from public portals and omit many datasets actually used in published papers, and from an overreliance on content similarity that biases model toward superficial similarity and overlooks experimental suitability. Harnessing collective perception embedded in the baseline and dataset citation network, we present a comprehensive framework for baseline and dataset recommendation. First, we design an automated data-collection pipeline that links roughly one hundred thousand accepted papers to the baselines and datasets they actually used. Second, we propose a collective perception enhanced retriever. To represent the position of each dataset or baseline within the scholarly network, it concatenates self-descriptions with aggregated citation contexts. To achieve efficient candidate recall, we finetune an embedding model on these representations. Finally, we develop a reasoning-augmented reranker that exact interaction chains to construct explicit reasoning chains and finetunes a large language model to produce interpretable justifications and refined rankings. The dataset we curated covers 85\% of the datasets and baselines used at top AI conferences over the past five years. On our dataset, the proposed method outperforms the strongest prior baseline with average gains of +5.85\% in Recall@20, +8.30\% in HitRate@5. Taken together, our results advance reliable, interpretable automation of experimental design.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一个基于大型语言模型的资源检索代理框架，通过利用基线引用网络的集体感知自动化推荐AI实验设计所需的数据集和基线，显著提升检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决AI研究中自动化实验设计的数据集和基线检索问题。现有推荐系统数据覆盖不全，主要从公共门户获取候选，忽略了实际在论文中使用的数据；同时过度依赖内容相似性，导致偏差和忽略实验适用性，降低了自动化设计的可靠性。自动化实验设计对提高研究效率和促进科学探索至关重要，因此需要更全面的方法来改善检索质量。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个综合框架，包括三个核心部分。首先，设计自动数据收集管道，链接约十万篇论文到其实际使用的基线和数据集。其次，开发集体感知增强检索器，将每个数据集或基线的自描述与聚合的引用上下文结合表示，并微调嵌入模型以高效召回候选。最后，构建推理增强重排器，使用交互链构建显式推理链，并微调大型语言模型以生成可解释理由和优化排名。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，论文构建的数据集覆盖了过去五年顶级AI会议中85%的数据集和基线。在评估指标上，该方法在Recall@20上平均提升了5.85%，在HitRate@5上平均提升了8.30%，显著优于先前最强基线。这些数据表明，框架有效提高了检索的覆盖率和精度，证明了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个可靠且可解释的自动化实验设计框架，通过利用引用网络的集体感知解决了现有方法的局限性。这一方法在学术上推动了实验设计的自动化，增强了检索的可解释性，为AI研究工具的开发提供了新思路。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他研究领域或进一步优化模型性能，但摘要未明确说明具体方向。

title: From Five Dimensions to Many: Large Language Models as Precise and Interpretable Psychological Profilers
abstract: Psychological constructs within individuals are widely believed to be interconnected. We investigated whether and how Large Language Models (LLMs) can model the correlational structure of human psychological traits from minimal quantitative inputs. We prompted various LLMs with Big Five Personality Scale responses from 816 human individuals to role-play their responses on nine other psychological scales. LLMs demonstrated remarkable accuracy in capturing human psychological structure, with the inter-scale correlation patterns from LLM-generated responses strongly aligning with those from human data $(R^2 > 0.89)$. This zero-shot performance substantially exceeded predictions based on semantic similarity and approached the accuracy of machine learning algorithms trained directly on the dataset. Analysis of reasoning traces revealed that LLMs use a systematic two-stage process: First, they transform raw Big Five responses into natural language personality summaries through information selection and compression, analogous to generating sufficient statistics. Second, they generate target scale responses based on reasoning from these summaries. For information selection, LLMs identify the same key personality factors as trained algorithms, though they fail to differentiate item importance within factors. The resulting compressed summaries are not merely redundant representations but capture synergistic information--adding them to original scores enhances prediction alignment, suggesting they encode emergent, second-order patterns of trait interplay. Our findings demonstrate that LLMs can precisely predict individual participants' psychological traits from minimal data through a process of abstraction and reasoning, offering both a powerful tool for psychological simulation and valuable insights into their emergent reasoning capabilities.

light_analysis.overview: 大型语言模型通过抽象和推理从五维人格量表预测多维度心理特质，展现出高精度和可解释性，为零-shot心理剖析提供新方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决大型语言模型（LLMs）是否能从最少的定量输入中建模人类心理特质相关结构的问题。心理学中，个体心理构念相互关联，准确预测这些特质对理解人类行为至关重要。现有方法如基于语义相似性的预测可能不够精确，而直接训练机器学习算法需要大量数据。因此，研究LLMs在零-shot设置下的能力，以克服从有限数据中建模心理特质的挑战，具有重要的学术和应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出使用多种LLMs，通过提示Big Five Personality Scale的响应来模拟个体在其他九种心理量表上的响应。核心方法是一个两阶段推理过程：首先，LLMs将原始Big Five响应转换为自然语言人格摘要，涉及信息选择和压缩；其次，基于这些摘要生成目标量表响应。创新点在于LLMs能系统性地抽象关键人格因素，并生成捕获特质交互的压缩摘要。数据集包括816个人的Big Five响应，实验采用零-shot设置，无需额外训练。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，LLMs生成的响应与人类数据在心理量表间的相关模式高度一致，R² > 0.89。这种零-shot性能显著优于基于语义相似性的预测方法，并且接近直接在数据集上训练的机器学习算法的准确性。分析推理轨迹表明，LLMs能够识别与训练算法相同的关键人格因素，但无法区分因素内项目的重要性。压缩摘要编码了突发的二阶特质交互模式，加入原始分数能提高预测一致性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了LLMs通过抽象和推理过程从最少数据中精确预测个体心理特质的能力，为心理学模拟提供了强大工具，并对其涌现推理能力提供深刻见解。主要贡献在于揭示了LLMs在零-shot心理剖析中的高效性和可解释性。局限性包括在区分项目重要性方面的失败；未来工作可优化推理过程或扩展到其他心理学应用领域。

title: COFAP: A Universal Framework for COFs Adsorption Prediction through Designed Multi-Modal Extraction and Cross-Modal Synergy
abstract: Covalent organic frameworks (COFs) are promising adsorbents for gas adsorption and separation, while identifying the optimal structures among their vast design space requires efficient high-throughput screening. Conventional machine-learning predictors rely heavily on specific gas-related features. However, these features are time-consuming and limit scalability, leading to inefficiency and labor-intensive processes. Herein, a universal COFs adsorption prediction framework (COFAP) is proposed, which can extract multi-modal structural and chemical features through deep learning, and fuse these complementary features via cross-modal attention mechanism. Without relying on explicit gas-specific thermodynamic descriptors, COFAP achieves state-of-the-art prediction performance on the hypoCOFs dataset under the conditions investigated in this study, outperforming existing approaches. Based on COFAP, we also found that high-performing COFs for gas separation concentrate within a narrow range of pore size and surface area. A weight-adjustable prioritization scheme is also developed to enable flexible, application-specific ranking of candidate COFs for researchers. Superior efficiency and accuracy render COFAP directly deployable in crystalline porous materials.

light_analysis.overview: 提出COFAP框架，通过深度学习提取多模态特征和跨模态注意力机制融合，实现无需特定气体特征的COFs吸附预测。
light_analysis.motivation: COFs作为气体吸附和分离的有前途材料，其设计空间广阔，需要高效的高通量筛选来识别最佳结构。传统机器学习方法依赖于计算耗时的特定气体相关特征，这不仅限制可扩展性，还导致预测过程效率低下和劳动密集，影响了实际应用和材料开发的效率。
light_analysis.method: COFAP框架使用深度学习技术自动提取COFs的结构和化学等多模态特征，并通过跨模态注意力机制融合这些互补特征。关键创新在于避免依赖传统的气体特定热力学描述符，提高特征提取的通用性和可扩展性，基于hypoCOFs数据集进行模型训练和评估。
light_analysis.result: COFAP在hypoCOFs数据集上实现了最先进的吸附预测性能，优于现有方法。研究发现，高性能COFs主要集中在狭窄的孔径和表面积范围内。开发了权重可调整的优先级方案，使研究人员能够灵活地对候选COFs进行特定应用排序，提高了预测的准确性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: COFAP提供了一个高效、准确的通用框架，可直接部署于晶体多孔材料的吸附预测，推动了COFs高通量筛选方法的学术发展。该研究具有重要的实际应用价值，未来工作可扩展至更多数据集和吸附剂类型，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Regularization Implies balancedness in the deep linear network
abstract: We use geometric invariant theory (GIT) to study the deep linear network (DLN). The Kempf-Ness theorem is used to establish that the $L^2$ regularizer is minimized on the balanced manifold. We introduce related balancing flows using the Riemannian geometry of fibers. The balancing flow defined by the $L^2$ regularizer is shown to converge to the balanced manifold at a uniform exponential rate. The balancing flow defined by the squared moment map is computed explicitly and shown to converge globally.   This framework allows us to decompose the training dynamics into two distinct gradient flows: a regularizing flow on fibers and a learning flow on the balanced manifold. It also provides a common mathematical framework for balancedness in deep learning and linear systems theory. We use this framework to interpret balancedness in terms of fast-slow systems, model reduction and Bayesian principles.
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures. Fixed minor errors in revision, added more context and created Discussion section

light_analysis.overview: 本文通过几何不变量理论和平衡流框架，揭示了深度线性网络中正则化与平衡性的内在联系，并提供了一个统一的数学框架来分解训练动态。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于探索深度线性网络中正则化与平衡性的关系，这一问题在优化和稳定性中至关重要。现有方法往往缺乏严格的数学基础，无法统一解释平衡性在深度学习和线性系统理论中的表现。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过几何不变量理论提供一个共同框架，以解决训练动态的理论挑战，并连接不同领域的相关概念。摘要未明确说明具体实际问题，但可推断为增强网络训练的稳定性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于几何不变量理论（GIT），运用Kempf-Ness定理证明L2正则化器在平衡流形上最小化。引入使用纤维黎曼几何的平衡流，特别是由L2正则化器和平方矩映射定义的流。该框架将训练动态分解为两个梯度流：纤维上的正则化流和平衡流形上的学习流。关键创新点包括平衡流的数学定义和收敛性分析，无需特定数据集或模型架构，专注于理论推导。
light_analysis.result: 主要理论结果表明，由L2正则化器定义的平衡流以统一的指数速率收敛到平衡流形，而由平方矩映射定义的平衡流则全局收敛。这些结果为深度线性网络的训练动态提供了严格的收敛保证，展示了平衡流在促进平衡性方面的有效性。摘要未提及与基线方法的直接对比，但框架本身建立了一个新的理论基准，强调了正则化与平衡性的紧密联系。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献是建立了一个共同的数学框架，将深度线性网络中的平衡性与正则化联系起来。该框架具有重要的学术价值，为理解训练动态提供了理论基础，并允许从快速-慢速系统、模型简化和贝叶斯原理的角度解释平衡性。潜在应用包括优化算法设计和理论分析，未来工作可能扩展到非线性网络或更复杂的架构，以增强框架的普适性。

title: DeepCompress: A Dual Reward Strategy for Dynamically Exploring and Compressing Reasoning Chains
abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) have demonstrated impressive capabilities but suffer from cognitive inefficiencies like "overthinking" simple problems and "underthinking" complex ones. While existing methods that use supervised fine-tuning (SFT) or reinforcement learning (RL) with token-length rewards can improve efficiency, they often do so at the cost of accuracy. This paper introduces DeepCompress, a novel framework that simultaneously enhances both the accuracy and efficiency of LRMs. We challenge the prevailing approach of consistently favoring shorter reasoning paths, showing that longer responses can contain a broader range of correct solutions for difficult problems. DeepCompress employs an adaptive length reward mechanism that dynamically classifies problems as "Simple" or "Hard" in real-time based on the model's evolving capability. It encourages shorter, more efficient reasoning for "Simple" problems while promoting longer, more exploratory thought chains for "Hard" problems. This dual-reward strategy enables the model to autonomously adjust its Chain-of-Thought (CoT) length, compressing reasoning for well-mastered problems and extending it for those it finds challenging. Experimental results on challenging mathematical benchmarks show that DeepCompress consistently outperforms baseline methods, achieving superior accuracy while significantly improving token efficiency.

light_analysis.overview: DeepCompress通过双奖励策略动态调整推理链长度，显著提升大推理模型的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大推理模型（LRMs）存在认知效率问题，如对简单问题'过度思考'和对复杂问题'思考不足'，导致推理过程低效。现有方法如监督微调（SFT）或强化学习（RL）配合token长度奖励虽能提升效率，但往往以准确性为代价。本研究的动机是解决这一矛盾，开发一种能同时优化准确性和效率的方法，以满足LRMs在实际应用中的需求。
light_analysis.method: DeepCompress采用自适应长度奖励机制，动态地将问题分类为'简单'或'困难'，基于模型能力的实时评估。对于'简单'问题，通过奖励机制鼓励较短的推理链以压缩思考过程；对于'困难'问题，则促进更长的、探索性的推理链以寻找更多正确解。该方法利用双奖励策略，结合强化学习框架，实现推理链长度的自主调整，关键创新在于打破了现有方法对短推理路径的固定偏好。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但提及在数学基准测试上应用。
light_analysis.result: 在具有挑战性的数学基准测试中，DeepCompress consistently outperforms baseline methods，取得 superior accuracy while significantly improving token efficiency。实验结果表明，该方法在准确性上优于基线方法，同时显著提升了token使用效率。摘要未提供具体性能数据，但强调了其相对于现有方法的整体优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: DeepCompress的主要贡献是提出一种新颖的双奖励策略框架，能够动态调整推理链长度以同时提升准确性和效率。学术上，它挑战了传统方法偏好短推理的假设，强调了长推理在解决困难问题中的价值。实际应用中，这提高了LRMs的资源效率，使其更适用于受限环境。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但可推断需要扩展到其他领域和进一步优化分类机制。

title: Difficulty-Controllable Multiple-Choice Question Generation Using Large Language Models and Direct Preference Optimization
abstract: Difficulty-controllable question generation for reading comprehension has gained significant attention in the field of education as a fundamental tool for adaptive learning support. Although several neural question generation methods have recently succeeded in controlling difficulty, conventional approaches still face two major limitations. First, they cannot directly generate multiple-choice questions, which are the most widely used question type in educational contexts. Second, they are not explicitly trained to optimize the accuracy of difficulty control, leaving room for further improvement in difficulty controllability. To address these limitations, this study proposes a novel difficulty-controllable multiple-choice question generation method for reading comprehension which leverages a large language model trained using a direct preference optimization technique to improve the accuracy of difficulty control.
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Access. Please refer to the published version for the final content. DOI: 10.1109/ACCESS.2026.3674595

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种基于大语言模型和直接偏好优化技术的难度可控多项选择题生成方法，以改进阅读理解中的自适应学习工具。
light_analysis.motivation: 难度可控的阅读理解问题生成在教育自适应学习中至关重要，作为基础工具支持个性化学习。现有神经问题生成方法虽能控制难度，但仍存在两个主要局限：无法直接生成教育场景中最常用的多项选择题；以及未明确优化难度控制的准确性，导致可控性不足。因此，本研究旨在克服这些缺陷，提升难度可控多项选择题的生成质量。
light_analysis.method: 该方法利用大语言模型，通过直接偏好优化技术进行训练，以增强难度控制的准确性。核心创新在于结合优化策略来学习生成不同难度级别的多项选择题，但摘要未明确说明具体数据集、模型架构等关键细节。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明主要实验结果，包括具体性能指标如准确率提升、效率改进，以及与其他基线方法的对比情况。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过整合大语言模型和直接偏好优化技术，解决了传统方法在生成难度可控多项选择题时的局限性，提高了难度控制的准确性。具有学术价值，为自适应学习提供了新方法，但潜在应用价值和未来研究方向摘要未明确说明。

title: Modality Matching Matters: Calibrating Language Distances for Cross-Lingual Transfer in URIEL+
abstract: Existing linguistic knowledge bases such as URIEL+ provide valuable geographic, genetic and typological distances for cross-lingual transfer but suffer from two key limitations. First, their one-size-fits-all vector representations are ill-suited to the diverse structures of linguistic data. Second, they lack a principled method for aggregating these signals into a single, comprehensive score. In this paper, we address these gaps by introducing a framework for type-matched language distances. We propose novel, structure-aware representations for each distance type: speaker-weighted distributions for geography, hyperbolic embeddings for genealogy, and a latent variables model for typology. We unify these signals into a robust, task-agnostic composite distance. Across multiple zero-shot transfer benchmarks, we demonstrate that our representations significantly improve transfer performance when the distance type is relevant to the task, while our composite distance yields gains in most tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出类型匹配的语言距离框架，通过结构感知表示和复合距离优化跨语言迁移，解决现有知识库表示和聚合方法的不足。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有语言知识库如URIEL+为跨语言迁移提供了地理、遗传和类型学距离，但其一刀切的向量表示无法适应语言数据的多样结构，且缺乏将不同距离信号聚合为综合分数的有效方法。这导致在跨语言任务中性能受限，因为不匹配的表示可能引入噪声，而聚合不当会削弱信号的有效性，因此需要更精准和集成的方法来提升迁移效果。
light_analysis.method: 论文针对地理、遗传和类型学距离分别设计了结构感知的表示方法：地理距离采用说话者加权的分布来捕捉空间模式，遗传距离使用双曲嵌入以适应树状结构，类型学距离应用潜变量模型处理复杂依赖关系。然后，这些表示被统一到一个稳健、任务无关的复合距离中，通过原则性聚合机制整合不同信号。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集，但实验基于多个零样本迁移基准进行。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个零样本迁移基准上进行，结果表明当距离类型与任务相关时，论文提出的结构感知表示方法显著提高了迁移性能；同时，复合距离在大多数任务中带来性能增益，优于现有的URIEL+基线方法。这证明了框架的有效性和鲁棒性，摘要未提供具体数值，但强调在相关任务中表现优异。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是解决了现有语言知识库的表示和聚合问题，通过类型匹配的距离框架提升了跨语言迁移的准确性和泛化能力。这具有重要学术价值，为多语言NLP任务提供了更精细的工具；实际应用中，可促进跨语言模型的开发和优化。未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多距离类型或应用到其他任务，但摘要未明确说明局限性或具体方向。

title: GAS: Improving Discretization of Diffusion ODEs via Generalized Adversarial Solver
abstract: While diffusion models achieve state-of-the-art generation quality, they still suffer from computationally expensive sampling. Recent works address this issue with gradient-based optimization methods that distill a few-step ODE diffusion solver from the full sampling process, reducing the number of function evaluations from dozens to just a few. However, these approaches often rely on intricate training techniques and do not explicitly focus on preserving fine-grained details. In this paper, we introduce the Generalized Solver: a simple parameterization of the ODE sampler that does not require additional training tricks and improves quality over existing approaches. We further combine the original distillation loss with adversarial training, which mitigates artifacts and enhances detail fidelity. We call the resulting method the Generalized Adversarial Solver and demonstrate its superior performance compared to existing solver training methods under similar resource constraints. Code is available at https://github.com/3145tttt/GAS.
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026. Camera ready version

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出广义对抗求解器（GAS），通过简单参数化和对抗训练优化扩散ODE的离散化，提升采样效率和质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在图像生成等任务中达到最先进质量，但其采样过程计算成本高昂，限制了实际应用。近期研究通过基于梯度的优化方法蒸馏少步ODE求解器来减少评估次数，但这些方法通常依赖复杂的训练技巧，并且未显式关注保持图像的精细细节，导致在加速采样时可能牺牲生成质量，尤其是在细节保真度方面。因此，本研究旨在解决扩散模型采样效率低和细节损失的问题，开发一种更简单、更有效的方法来改进离散化过程。
light_analysis.method: 本文的核心方法是广义对抗求解器（GAS），首先引入广义求解器作为ODE采样器的简单参数化方案，无需额外训练技巧。然后，将原始的蒸馏损失与对抗训练相结合，通过对抗性训练减少生成过程中的伪影并增强细节保真度。关键创新点在于利用对抗训练来弥补蒸馏中可能损失的细节，同时保持采样的高效性，优化扩散ODE的离散化。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节，但暗示了基于扩散模型的框架。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，广义对抗求解器在类似的资源约束下，相比现有的求解器训练方法，表现出更优的性能。通过结合对抗训练，该方法有效减少了生成图像中的伪影，并显著增强了细节保真度，从而提高了整体生成质量。摘要未提供具体的性能指标数据（如准确率或效率提升的精确数值），但强调了在保持采样效率的同时，改进了细节保持能力，证明了其相对于基线方法的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了广义对抗求解器（GAS），一种通过简单参数化和对抗训练优化扩散ODE离散化的方法，简化了训练过程并提升了采样质量和细节保真度。研究的学术价值在于为扩散模型的采样加速提供了新思路，可能推动扩散模型在图像生成等领域的更快部署。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但暗示了该方法在资源受限场景下的应用潜力。

title: Towards a Practical Understanding of Lagrangian Methods in Safe Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Safe reinforcement learning addresses constrained optimization problems where maximizing performance must be balanced against safety constraints, and Lagrangian methods are a widely used approach for this purpose. However, the effectiveness of Lagrangian methods depends crucially on the choice of the Lagrange multiplier $λ$, which governs the multi-objective trade-off between return and cost. A common practice is to update the multiplier automatically during training. Although this approach is standard in practice, there remains limited empirical evidence on the optimally achievable trade-off between return and cost as a function of $λ$, and there is currently no systematic benchmark comparing automated update mechanisms to this empirical optimum. Therefore, we study (i) the constraint geometry for eight widely used safety tasks and (ii) the previously overlooked constraint-regime sensitivity of different Lagrange multiplier update mechanisms in safe reinforcement learning. Through the lens of multi-objective analysis, we present empirical Pareto frontiers that offer a complete visualization of the trade-off between return and cost in the underlying optimization problem. Our results reveal the highly sensitive nature of $λ$ and further show that the restrictiveness of the constraint cost can vary across different cost limits within the same task. This highlights the importance of careful cost limit selection across different regions of cost restrictiveness when evaluating safe reinforcement learning methods. We provide a recommended set of cost limits for each evaluated task and offer an open-source code base: https://github.com/lindsayspoor/Lagrangian_SafeRL.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过多目标分析和帕累托前沿，揭示了拉格朗日乘子在安全强化学习中的高度敏感性，并为不同任务推荐了成本限制。
light_analysis.motivation: 安全强化学习旨在平衡性能与安全约束，拉格朗日方法虽广泛应用但依赖于拉格朗日乘子λ的选择，以调整收益与成本的多目标权衡。现有方法常自动更新λ，但缺乏对λ与权衡关系的实证证据，也无系统基准比较自动更新机制与实证最优，导致方法效果不确定。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，探索约束几何和更新机制的敏感性，以提升实践理解。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用多目标分析框架，研究了八个广泛使用的安全任务中的约束几何。通过构建帕累托前沿，可视化收益与成本的完整权衡，并分析不同拉格朗日乘子更新机制对约束制度的敏感性。关键创新在于系统评估了λ变化对性能的影响，并提供了开源代码库（https://github.com/lindsayspoor/Lagrangian_SafeRL）用于基准测试和任务评估。
light_analysis.result: 实证结果显示，拉格朗日乘子λ具有高度敏感性，帕累托前沿完整展示了收益与成本的权衡关系。研究发现，在不同成本限制下，约束成本的限制性会变化，表明成本限制选择对评估方法至关重要。摘要未明确提供具体性能指标数据，但通过帕累托前沿的视觉化，为比较自动更新机制与最优权衡提供了新基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于揭示了拉格朗日乘子的敏感性和约束成本的变化，强调了在安全强化学习评估中谨慎选择成本限制的重要性。学术上，提供了实证理解和系统基准，推动了多目标优化领域的发展；实践上，推荐了任务相关的成本限制并开源代码，有助于方法优化和实际应用。未来工作可扩展更多任务或改进更新机制，以应对更复杂的安全约束场景。

title: TRI-DEP: A Trimodal Comparative Study for Depression Detection Using Speech, Text, and EEG
abstract: Depression is a widespread mental health disorder, yet its automatic detection remains challenging. Prior work has explored unimodal and multimodal approaches, with multimodal systems showing promise by leveraging complementary signals. However, existing studies are limited in scope, lack systematic comparisons of features, and suffer from inconsistent evaluation protocols. We address these gaps by systematically exploring feature representations and modelling strategies across EEG, together with speech and text. We evaluate handcrafted features versus pre-trained embeddings, assess the effectiveness of different neural encoders, compare unimodal, bimodal, and trimodal configurations, and analyse fusion strategies with attention to the role of EEG. Consistent subject-independent splits are applied to ensure robust, reproducible benchmarking. Our results show that (i) the combination of EEG, speech and text modalities enhances multimodal detection, (ii) pretrained embeddings outperform handcrafted features, and (iii) carefully designed trimodal models achieve state-of-the-art performance. Our work lays the groundwork for future research in multimodal depression detection.

light_analysis.overview: 论文系统比较了使用EEG、语音和文本的trimodal模型在抑郁症检测中的特征表示和建模策略，并实现了最先进性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 抑郁症是一种广泛的心理健康障碍，其自动检测面临挑战。现有研究虽探索了单模态和多模态方法，但范围有限、缺乏系统性特征比较，且评估协议不一致，导致结果难以复现和比较。因此，本研究旨在填补这些空白，通过全面分析EEG、语音和文本的互补信号，改进抑郁症检测的准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 研究系统探索了EEG、语音和文本的特征表示，包括手工特征与预训练嵌入的比较，评估了不同神经编码器的效果，对比了单模态、双模态和trimodal配置，并分析了融合策略，特别关注EEG的角色。实验采用一致的受试者独立分割来确保基准的鲁棒性和可复现性，摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，EEG、语音和文本的组合能增强多模态检测性能；预训练嵌入相比手工特征表现更优；精心设计的trimodal模型达到了当前最先进水平。这些结果通过系统比较得出，为多模态抑郁症检测提供了实证支持，但摘要未给出具体准确率或效率数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文通过系统比较多模态特征和策略，为抑郁症检测研究奠定了新基础。其学术价值在于提供了可复现的基准和深入分析，实际应用在于推动更准确的自动检测系统发展。未来工作可扩展更多模态或改进融合技术，以克服潜在的局限性。

title: What "Not" to Detect: Negation-Aware VLMs via Structured Reasoning and Token Merging
abstract: State-of-the-art vision-language models (VLMs) suffer from a critical failure in understanding negation, often referred to as affirmative bias. This limitation is particularly severe in described object detection (DOD) tasks. To address this, we propose two primary contributions: (1) a new dataset pipeline and (2) a novel, lightweight adaptation recipe. First, we introduce CoVAND, a dataset constructed with a systematic chain-of-thought (CoT) and VQA-based pipeline to generate high-quality, instance-grounded negation data. Second, we propose NegToMe, a novel text token merging module that directly tackles the architectural cause of affirmative bias. NegToMe fundamentally addresses the structural loss of negation cues in tokenization, grouping them with attributes into coherent semantic phrases. It maintains correct polarity at the input level, enabling robust negation understanding even with limited data. For instance, to prevent a model from treating the fragmented tokens "not" and "girl" as simply "girl", NegToMe binds them into a single token whose meaning is correctly distinguished from that of "girl" alone. This module is integrated with a parameter-efficient and strategic LoRA fine-tuning approach. Our method significantly improves performance on challenging negation benchmarks with a lowered false positive rate, boosting NMS-AP by up to +10.8 points on OVDEval and demonstrating generalization to SoTA VLMs. This work marks a crucial step forward in addressing negation understanding for real-world detection applications.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出 CoVAND 数据集和 NegToMe 令牌合并模块，解决了视觉语言模型在否定理解中的肯定性偏见，显著提升了描述性物体检测性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前最先进的视觉语言模型（VLMs）在理解否定词时存在肯定性偏见，这在描述性物体检测（DOD）任务中尤为严重，导致错误检测对象。否定在自然语言和现实世界应用（如自动驾驶、智能监控）中普遍存在，但现有模型无法有效处理，限制了模型的准确性和实用性。因此，解决这一问题对于提升 VLMs 在实际场景中的可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出两个核心方法：首先，CoVAND 数据集，通过结合链式思维（CoT）和视觉问答（VQA）的管道，系统生成高质量、实例接地的否定数据。其次，NegToMe 模块，一个轻量级文本令牌合并模块，直接针对分词中否定线索丢失的架构问题，将否定词与属性分组为单一语义短语，确保输入级别正确极性。该方法与参数高效的 LoRA 微调策略集成，实现高效适应，无需大规模数据即可增强否定理解。
light_analysis.result: 该方法在挑战性否定基准测试中显著提升了性能，降低了假阳性率。具体来说，在 OVDEval 数据集上，NMS-AP 指标提升了高达 +10.8 点。此外，方法展示了良好的泛化能力，能够适用于当前最先进的视觉语言模型（SoTA VLMs），证明了其有效性和普适性，相较于基线模型有明显改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过 CoVAND 数据集和 NegToMe 模块，成功解决了视觉语言模型中的否定理解问题。学术上，它推动了语言理解在视觉任务中的研究进展；实际上，它为现实世界检测应用提供了更准确的模型，增强了可靠性和安全性。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他语言结构或更多样化数据集，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Putting on the Thinking Hats: A Survey on Chain of Thought Fine-tuning from the Perspective of Human Reasoning Mechanism
abstract: Chain of thought (CoT) fine-tuning aims to endow large language models (LLMs) with reasoning capabilities by training them on curated reasoning traces. It leverages both supervised and reinforced fine-tuning to cultivate human-like reasoning skills in LLMs, including detailed planning, divergent thinking, intuitive judgment, timely reflection, internal thinking, and fact perception, etc. As CoT fine-tuning has advanced, LLMs have demonstrated substantial improvements in tasks such as mathematical reasoning and code generation. However, existing surveys about CoT fine-tuning primarily focus on technical aspects and overlook a systematic analysis from the perspective of human reasoning mechanisms. Given that the ultimate goal of CoT fine-tuning is to enable LLMs to reason like humans, it is crucial to investigate this technique through the lens of human cognition. To fill this gap, we present the first comprehensive survey of CoT fine-tuning grounded in human reasoning theory. Specifically, inspired by the well-known Six Thinking Hats framework, which systematically characterizes common human thinking modes using six metaphorical hats, we classify and examine CoT fine-tuning methods through this lens. Furthermore, building upon this theory, we outline potential directions for future research in CoT fine-tuning. In addition, we compile a comprehensive overview of existing datasets and model performances, and a real-time GitHub repository \footnote{https://github.com/AI-Chen/Awesome-CoT-Finetuning} that continuously tracks recent advances in this area is maintained. We hope this survey will serve as a valuable resource to inspire innovation and foster progress in this rapidly evolving field.

light_analysis.overview: 本文首次从人类推理机制角度，基于Six Thinking Hats框架对CoT fine-tuning进行系统性综述，填补了现有研究的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: CoT fine-tuning旨在通过训练大型语言模型（LLMs）在推理痕迹上赋予其人类般的推理能力，如详细规划、发散思维等。现有调查多聚焦于技术细节，忽略了从人类认知角度的系统分析。由于CoT fine-tuning的终极目标是使LLMs能像人类一样推理，因此从人类推理机制视角探究至关重要，这有助于弥补当前方法的不足，推动AI推理能力的实质性提升，以实现更自然、高效的智能系统。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用系统性综述方法，以人类推理理论为基础，创新性地引入Six Thinking Hats框架来分类和检查现有CoT fine-tuning方法。该框架通过六种思维模式（如计划性思维、创造性思维等）系统描述人类推理过程，作者据此将CoT fine-tuning方法分为不同类别进行分析。此外，研究还整理了现有数据集和模型性能的概览，并基于该理论提出了未来研究方向，强调从认知角度优化训练策略。
light_analysis.result: 摘要指出CoT fine-tuning的进展已使LLMs在数学推理和代码生成等任务上展现出显著性能改进，例如准确率提升，但未提供具体数据。综述汇总了现有研究结果，表明通过监督和强化微调，LLMs在推理任务中相对于基线方法有优势，增强了模型的泛化能力。然而，详细对比数据如具体指标数字在摘要中未明确说明，需参考具体文献以获取量化结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献在于首次从人类推理机制视角对CoT fine-tuning进行全面调查，利用Six Thinking Hats框架作为分析工具，为领域研究提供了新视角。学术价值在于弥合技术方法与人类认知之间的鸿沟，促进了LLMs推理能力的深层理解。未来工作方向包括基于该框架的进一步探索，如开发更贴合人类思维的训练方法，实际应用可扩展至教育、决策支持等领域，但局限性在于调查性质，需后续实证研究验证。

title: Emotionally Charged, Logically Blurred: AI-driven Emotional Framing Impairs Human Fallacy Detection
abstract: Logical fallacies are common in public communication and can mislead audiences; fallacious arguments may still appear convincing despite lacking soundness, because convincingness is inherently subjective. We present the first computational study of how emotional framing interacts with fallacies and convincingness, using large language models (LLMs) to systematically change emotional appeals in fallacious arguments. We benchmark eight LLMs on injecting emotional appeal into fallacious arguments while preserving their logical structures, then use the best models to generate stimuli for a human study. Our results show that LLM-driven emotional framing reduces human fallacy detection in F1 by 14.5% on average. Humans perform better in fallacy detection when perceiving enjoyment than fear or sadness, and these three emotions also correlate with significantly higher convincingness compared to neutral or other emotion states. Our work has implications for AI-driven emotional manipulation in the context of fallacious argumentation.
comment: EACL 2026 Main Camera-ready; Figure 4 and typo fixed

light_analysis.overview: 本研究首次使用大型语言模型系统研究情感框架如何降低人类对逻辑谬误的检测能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 逻辑谬误在公共沟通中常见，可能误导受众，因为说服力是主观的，但现有研究未深入探讨情感框架如何与谬误和说服力相互作用。本研究旨在填补这一空白，强调理解情感因素在认知偏差中的重要性，特别是在AI技术日益普及的背景下，情感操控对公众判断的潜在影响。
light_analysis.method: 研究使用大型语言模型（LLMs）系统改变谬误论证中的情感诉求，基准测试了八个不同的LLM模型，评估其在注入情感（如愉悦、恐惧、悲伤）同时保持逻辑结构的能力。选择性能最佳的模型生成用于人类实验的刺激物，设计实验以测量情感框架对谬误检测的影响，关键创新在于结合AI驱动方法和人类参与验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，LLM驱动的情感框架平均使人类谬误检测的F1分数降低14.5%。人类在感知愉悦情感时检测性能更好，而恐惧和悲伤情感与显著更高的说服力相关，相比中性或其他情感状态。这些数据表明情感框架能有效干扰人类对逻辑谬误的识别，并量化了情感在论证说服力中的作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究首次通过计算和实验方法揭示了情感框架如何削弱人类谬误检测，核心贡献在于量化了AI驱动情感操控的效果。学术价值在于深化对情感与逻辑交互的理解，实际意义在于警示AI技术在误导性论证中的潜在风险。未来工作可探索更多情感类型或长期影响，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Understanding Temporal Logic Consistency in Video-Language Models through Cross-Modal Attention Discriminability
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) often generate self-contradictory outputs, which severely impacts their reliability and hinders their adoption in practical applications. In video-language models (Video-LLMs), this phenomenon recently draws the attention of researchers. Specifically, these models fail to provide logically consistent responses to rephrased questions based on their grounding outputs. However, the underlying causes of this phenomenon remain underexplored. In this work, we adopt an interpretability-driven approach to analyze, statistically summarize, and intervention the potential factors of the phenomenon. We find that one of the primary reasons for the inconsistency in responses lies in the inability of cross-modal attention heads to effectively distinguish video tokens across different timestamps. To address this, we propose an attention enhancement method called Temporally Conditioned Attention Sharpening (TCAS), which constructs an enhancement objective based on attention distinctions to enhance the model's temporal resolution capability, thereby improving its temporal understanding logic consistency. Experimental results demonstrate that our method significantly enhances the temporal logic consistency of Video-LLMs. Further analyses reveal that our method indeed improves the temporal discriminability of attention heads, validating our conclusions. Additionally, our method even achieves performance improvements in general video temporal grounding tasks, suggesting that temporal logic consistency is an important factor in temporal understanding.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出TCAS方法，通过增强跨模态注意力头的时间区分能力，提高视频-语言模型的时间逻辑一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型常生成自相矛盾输出，影响其可靠性，阻碍实际应用；在视频-语言模型中，模型对基于接地输出的重述问题提供逻辑不一致响应，表明时间理解不足。现有研究未深入探索这一现象的根本原因，限制了模型在视频任务中的实用价值。因此，分析并解决时间逻辑不一致问题对提升Video-LLMs的性能至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 采用解释性驱动方法，分析并统计总结了导致时间逻辑不一致的潜在因素，发现跨模态注意力头无法有效区分不同时间戳的视频标记是主要原因。为此，提出Temporally Conditioned Attention Sharpening (TCAS)方法，基于注意力区分构建增强目标，优化注意力头的时间分辨率能力，从而提升模型的时间理解逻辑一致性。该方法直接干预注意力机制，增强其时间区分能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，TCAS方法显著增强了视频-语言模型的时间逻辑一致性；进一步分析表明，该方法改进了注意力头的时间区分能力，验证了初始假设。在一般视频时间接地任务中，方法也实现了性能提升，表明时间逻辑一致性是时间理解的关键因素，为模型改进提供了实证支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究通过TCAS方法有效解决了视频-语言模型中的时间逻辑不一致问题，提高了模型可靠性和性能；验证了时间逻辑一致性作为时间理解核心要素的重要性。方法不仅在特定问题上有效，还在一般任务中显示潜力，为未来视频-语言模型研究提供了新方向，可能需进一步探索更广泛的应用或模型适应性。

title: Hybrid Architectures for Language Models: Systematic Analysis and Design Insights
abstract: Recent progress in large language models demonstrates that hybrid architectures--combining self-attention mechanisms with structured state space models like Mamba--can achieve a compelling balance between modeling quality and computational efficiency, particularly for long-context tasks. While these hybrid models show promising performance, systematic comparisons of hybridization strategies and analyses on the key factors behind their effectiveness have not been clearly shared to the community. In this work, we present a holistic evaluation of hybrid architectures based on inter-layer (sequential) or intra-layer (parallel) fusion. We comprehensively evaluate these designs across multiple dimensions: language modeling and downstream task performance, long-context capabilities, scaling analysis, and training and inference efficiency. By investigating the core characteristics of their computational primitive, we identify the most critical elements for each hybridization strategy and further propose optimal design recipes for hybrid models. Our comprehensive analysis provides practical guidance and valuable insights for developing hybrid language models, facilitating the optimization of architectural configurations.

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统评估混合语言模型架构，分析层间和层内融合策略，提出优化设计配方以平衡建模质量与计算效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于混合架构（如结合自注意力机制与结构化状态空间模型Mamba）在语言模型中展现出质量和效率的平衡潜力，尤其在处理长上下文任务时能减少计算开销。然而，现有研究缺乏对混合策略的系统性比较和有效性关键因素的深入分析，导致设计盲目和优化困难，限制了混合模型的广泛应用。因此，本工作旨在填补这一空白，通过全面评估为社区提供实证指导和设计基准，推动更高效语言模型的发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法包括对混合架构进行整体评估，聚焦于层间（顺序）和层内（并行）两种融合策略。通过多个维度评估这些设计：语言建模性能、下游任务表现、长上下文处理能力、缩放特性以及训练和推理效率。核心是通过研究计算原语的核心特性，识别每个混合策略的关键元素，并推导出最优设计配方。技术路线涉及理论分析和实证实验，但具体数据集和模型架构摘要未明确说明，需进一步参考论文细节。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果包括确定了层间和层内融合策略的关键影响因素，并基于此提出了混合模型的最优设计配方，展示了这些架构在平衡建模质量和计算效率方面的潜力。通过综合评估，论文揭示了不同融合方式在长上下文任务和效率优化中的优势，但摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进数据，因此量化对比结果需依赖论文正文中的详细实验部分。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论指出，本研究的系统分析为开发混合语言模型提供了实用指导和宝贵见解，有助于优化架构配置，提升模型在长上下文任务中的性能。研究的意义在于推动了混合架构的理论和实践发展，为设计更高效的语言模型奠定了基础。潜在局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能包括扩展到更多模型变体或探索实际应用中的泛化能力。

title: Unlearning in Diffusion models under Data Constraints: A Variational Inference Approach
abstract: For a responsible and safe deployment of diffusion models in various domains, regulating the generated outputs from these models is desirable because such models could generate undesired, violent, and obscene outputs. To tackle this problem, recent works use machine unlearning methodology to forget training data points containing these undesired features from pre-trained generative models. However, these methods proved to be ineffective in data-constrained settings where the whole training dataset is inaccessible. Thus, the principal objective of this work is to propose a machine unlearning methodology that can prevent the generation of outputs containing undesired features from a pre-trained diffusion model in such a data-constrained setting. Our proposed method, termed as Variational Diffusion Unlearning (VDU), is a computationally efficient method that only requires access to a subset of training data containing undesired features. Our approach is inspired by the variational inference framework with the objective of minimizing a loss function consisting of two terms: plasticity inducer and stability regularizer. Plasticity inducer reduces the log-likelihood of the undesired training data points, while the stability regularizer, essential for preventing loss of image generation quality, regularizes the model in parameter space. We validate the effectiveness of our method through comprehensive experiments for both class unlearning and feature unlearning. For class unlearning, we unlearn some user-identified classes from MNIST, CIFAR-10, and tinyImageNet datasets from a pre-trained unconditional denoising diffusion probabilistic model (DDPM). Similarly, for feature unlearning, we unlearn the generation of certain high-level features from a pre-trained Stable Diffusion model trained on LAION-5B dataset.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种名为变分扩散遗忘（VDU）的方法，基于变分推理，在数据受限设置下高效地从预训练扩散模型中移除不良特征，确保安全部署。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在部署时可能生成暴力、色情等不良内容，因此需要控制其输出以确保安全性。机器遗忘技术被用于从预训练模型中遗忘包含不良特征的数据点，但在数据受限环境中，无法访问整个训练数据集，现有方法表现不佳。本研究旨在开发一种在数据约束下有效的遗忘方法，解决这一实际问题，以促进模型的负责任应用。
light_analysis.method: 提出的VDU方法基于变分推理框架，通过最小化包含塑性诱导器和稳定性正则器的损失函数实现遗忘。塑性诱导器减少不良数据点的对数似然，稳定性正则器在参数空间正则化模型以防止生成质量下降。该方法计算高效，仅需访问包含不良特征的训练数据子集。实验中使用MNIST、CIFAR-10、tinyImageNet数据集和预训练DDPM模型进行类遗忘，以及LAION-5B数据集和Stable Diffusion模型进行特征遗忘。
light_analysis.result: 论文通过综合实验验证了VDU方法在类遗忘和特征遗忘上的有效性。在类遗忘任务中，成功从DDPM模型中遗忘MNIST、CIFAR-10和tinyImageNet的指定类别；在特征遗忘中，从Stable Diffusion模型中遗忘LAION-5B的高阶特征。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升，但实验表明方法能有效防止不良内容生成，同时保持图像质量，在数据受限设置下优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了VDU方法，解决了数据受限下扩散模型遗忘的挑战，通过变分推理平衡遗忘和模型稳定性。学术上，扩展了机器遗忘在生成模型中的应用；实际上，提升了扩散模型的安全性，促进其负责任部署。局限性包括摘要未明确说明具体扩展性，未来工作可能包括优化算法效率、应用于更多数据集，并进一步验证实际场景中的效果。

title: KeySG: Hierarchical Keyframe-Based 3D Scene Graphs
abstract: In recent years, 3D scene graphs have emerged as a powerful world representation, offering both geometric accuracy and semantic richness. Combining 3D scene graphs with large language models enables robots to reason, plan, and navigate in complex human-centered environments. However, current approaches for constructing 3D scene graphs are semantically limited to a predefined set of relationships, and their serialization in large environments can easily exceed an LLM's context window. We introduce KeySG, a framework that represents 3D scenes as a hierarchical graph consisting of floors, rooms, objects, and functional elements, where nodes are augmented with multi-modal information extracted from keyframes selected to optimize geometric and visual coverage. The keyframes allow us to efficiently leverage VLMs to extract scene information, alleviating the need to explicitly model relationship edges between objects, enabling more general, task-agnostic reasoning and planning. Our approach can process complex and ambiguous queries while mitigating the scalability issues associated with large scene graphs by utilizing a hierarchical multi-modal retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipeline to extract relevant context from the graph. Evaluated across three distinct benchmarks, 3D object semantic segmentation, functional element segmentation, and complex query retrieval, KeySG outperforms prior approaches on most metrics, demonstrating its superior semantic richness and efficiency.
comment: Code and video are available at https://keysg-lab.github.io/

light_analysis.overview: KeySG提出了一种基于关键帧的层次3D场景图框架，通过优化几何和视觉覆盖及多模态信息增强，提升了语义丰富性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D场景图结合大型语言模型在机器人推理和规划中至关重要，但现有方法语义上受限于预定义关系集，序列化后易超出LLM的上下文窗口，导致在大型复杂环境中可扩展性差。因此，需要一种更通用、高效且能处理模糊查询的场景表示方法，以支持任务无关的智能决策。
light_analysis.method: KeySG将3D场景表示为层次图，包含楼层、房间、对象和功能元素节点，节点从关键帧中提取多模态信息，关键帧选择优化几何和视觉覆盖。利用视觉语言模型（VLM）直接从关键帧提取场景信息，避免显式建模对象间关系边。采用层次多模态检索增强生成（RAG）管道，从图中提取相关上下文，以处理复杂查询并缓解大规模场景图的扩展性问题。
light_analysis.result: 在三个基准测试中评估：3D对象语义分割、功能元素分割和复杂查询检索。KeySG在大多数指标上优于先前方法，展示了其语义丰富性和效率的优越性。摘要未提供具体数据，但结果表明该方法在提升场景表示的准确性和扩展性方面表现显著。
light_analysis.conclusion: KeySG通过层次图和关键帧技术，改善了3D场景图的语义表示和可扩展性，支持更通用的机器人推理和规划。其学术价值在于提供了一种结合多模态信息的新框架；应用价值在于促进复杂人类中心环境中的智能导航。未来工作可探索更多场景类型或集成其他先进模型。

title: CurES: From Gradient Analysis to Efficient Curriculum Learning for Reasoning LLMs
abstract: Curriculum learning plays a crucial role in enhancing the training efficiency of large language models (LLMs) on reasoning tasks. However, existing methods often fail to adequately account for variations in prompt difficulty or rely on simplistic filtering mechanisms to select prompt datasets within a narrow criterion range, resulting in significant computational waste. In this work, we approach the problem from the perspective of reinforcement learning gradient optimization, offering a systematic and theoretical investigation into how to improve the training efficiency of LLMs. We identify two key factors influencing training efficiency: the selection of training prompts and the allocation of rollout quantities across different prompts. Our theoretical analysis reveals that the sampling distribution of prompts dictates the convergence rate of gradient descent, while the allocation of the rollout quantity influences the consistency and stability of overall gradient updates. Based on these insights, we propose CurES, an efficient training method that accelerates convergence and employs Bayesian posterior estimation to minimize computational overhead. Experiments demonstrate that our CurES outperforms Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) by +3.30 points and +4.82 points with 1.5B and 7B models, respectively, and exceeds the best prior sample efficient methods by +2.12 points on average across eight math reasoning benchmarks. Additionally, CurES exhibits faster convergence compared to baselines, including GRPO.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出CurES方法，通过梯度分析和贝叶斯后验估计优化课程学习，显著提升大型语言模型在推理任务上的训练效率和收敛速度。
light_analysis.motivation: 课程学习在提升大型语言模型（LLM）于推理任务训练中的效率至关重要，但现有方法常忽视提示难度的变化，依赖简单过滤机制选择数据集，导致计算资源浪费和效率低下。本研究旨在从强化学习梯度优化角度，系统研究如何改进LLM训练效率，解决现有方法在适应性和准确性方面的不足，以减少训练过程中的不必要开销。
light_analysis.method: 论文从强化学习梯度优化视角出发，理论分析提示选择和rollout数量分配对LLM训练效率的影响，发现提示采样分布决定梯度下降收敛率，rollout分配影响梯度更新稳定性。基于此，提出CurES方法，利用贝叶斯后验估计优化提示采样和数量分配，加速收敛并最小化计算开销，实现高效课程学习。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，CurES在1.5B和7B参数LLM上优于Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)，分别提升+3.30和+4.82个点；在八个数学推理基准测试中，平均超过最佳现有样本效率方法+2.12个点，并展现出比基线（包括GRPO）更快的收敛速度。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本文主要贡献是通过梯度分析提出CurES方法，有效提升LLM推理训练效率和性能，提供了理论框架和实验验证，具有学术和实用价值。摘要未明确说明局限性和未来工作方向。

title: DiVeQ: Differentiable Vector Quantization Using the Reparameterization Trick
abstract: Vector quantization is common in deep models, yet its hard assignments block gradients and hinder end-to-end training. We propose DiVeQ, which treats quantization as adding an error vector that mimics the quantization distortion, keeping the forward pass hard while letting gradients flow. We also present a space-filling variant (SF-DiVeQ) that assigns to a curve constructed by the lines connecting codewords, resulting in less quantization error and full codebook usage. Both methods train end-to-end without requiring auxiliary losses or temperature schedules. In VQ-VAE image compression, VQGAN image generation, and DAC speech coding tasks across various data sets, our proposed methods improve reconstruction and sample quality over alternative quantization approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出DiVeQ及其变体SF-DiVeQ，通过重参数化技巧使向量量化可微分，实现无需辅助损失的端到端训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 向量量化在深度学习中广泛使用，但由于其硬分配性质，会阻断梯度流动，从而阻碍模型的端到端训练。现有方法常需依赖辅助损失或复杂温度调度来缓解此问题，这增加了训练的不稳定性和复杂性。因此，开发一种简单高效的可微分量化方法变得至关重要，以优化深度模型的训练过程并提升性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出DiVeQ方法，将量化过程视为添加误差向量来模拟量化失真，保持前向传递中的硬分配，同时在反向传播中允许梯度流动，实现可微分性。此外，引入了空间填充变体SF-DiVeQ，通过连接码字的曲线进行分配，减少量化误差并确保码书充分利用，避免了传统方法的限制。两种方法均采用重参数化技巧，无需额外损失函数或温度调度，简化了端到端训练流程，并在多种任务如VQ-VAE图像压缩中应用。
light_analysis.result: 在多个实验任务中，包括VQ-VAE图像压缩、VQGAN图像生成和DAC语音编码，使用不同数据集，DiVeQ和SF-DiVeQ在重建质量和样本生成效果上表现出显著提升，优于其他量化方法。摘要未提供具体数据如准确率百分比，但作者确认改进，展示了该方法在性能上的优势，尤其是在端到端训练场景中，减少了量化带来的失真问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了可微分向量量化框架DiVeQ和SF-DiVeQ，有效解决了梯度阻塞问题，支持简单高效的端到端训练。其学术价值在于引入了新颖的量化技术，促进了深度学习模型中的优化方法；实际应用价值体现在提升图像和语音处理任务的性能上，为相关领域提供了实用工具。未来工作可探索在更广泛模型中的扩展和改进，例如优化空间填充策略以进一步提高效率。

title: LEAF: Language-EEG Aligned Foundation Model for Brain-Computer Interfaces
abstract: Recent advances in electroencephalography (EEG) foundation models, which capture transferable EEG representations, have greatly accelerated the development of brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). However, existing approaches still struggle to incorporate language instructions as prior constraints for EEG representation learning, limiting their ability to leverage the semantic knowledge inherent in language to unify different labels and tasks. To address this challenge, we present LEAF, a foundation model for EEG--Language Alignment with Semantic Task Instruction and Querying. LEAF integrates task-aware semantic guidance to produce structured and linguistically aligned EEG embeddings, thereby enhancing decoding robustness and transferability. In the pretraining stage, we introduce a joint Spectral--Temporal Reconstruction (STR) framework that captures the coupled spectral rhythms and temporal dynamics of EEG signals. STR applies randomized spectral perturbation to enhance frequency robustness and uses two complementary temporal objectives to learn both contextual and sequential structure. In the EEG-Language alignment stage, we propose the Instruction-conditioned Q-Former (IQF). This query-based cross-attention transformer injects instruction embeddings into EEG tokens and achieves semantic alignment with textual label embeddings through learnable queries. We evaluate LEAF on 16 downstream datasets spanning motor imagery, emotion recognition, steady-state visual evoked potentials, covert speech, and healthcare tasks. LEAF achieves state-of-the-art performance on 12 of the 16 datasets and obtains the best average results across all five task categories. Importantly, our analyses reveal for the first time that explicit task instructions serve as semantic priors guiding EEG embeddings into coherent and linguistically grounded spaces. The code and pre-trained weights will be released.

light_analysis.overview: LEAF模型首次将语言指令作为语义先验整合到EEG表示学习中，实现EEG与语言的对齐，提升脑机接口的解码鲁棒性和可转移性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有EEG基础模型难以整合语言指令作为先验约束，无法有效利用语言语义知识统一不同标签和任务，这限制了脑机接口（BCI）在解码鲁棒性和跨任务转移性方面的提升。该问题至关重要，因为语义知识能增强EEG表示的可解释性和通用性，而当前方法忽略了语言指令的引导作用，导致任务解码能力受限和模型泛化不足。因此，研究旨在解决如何将语言语义先验融入EEG表示学习的挑战。
light_analysis.method: LEAF方法包括预训练阶段和EEG-语言对齐阶段。在预训练中，采用联合谱-时间重建（STR）框架，通过随机频谱扰动增强频率鲁棒性，并使用互补时间目标学习EEG信号的上下文和序列结构。对齐阶段引入指令条件Q-Former（IQF），这是一个基于查询的交叉注意力变换器，将任务指令嵌入注入EEG令牌，并通过可学习查询实现与文本标签嵌入的语义对齐。关键创新在于STR的频谱-时间耦合建模和IQF的指令感知对齐机制，模型架构涉及Transformer技术和自监督学习。
light_analysis.result: LEAF在16个下游数据集上进行评估，覆盖运动想象、情绪识别、稳态视觉诱发电位、隐蔽语音和医疗保健任务。结果显示，在12个数据集上达到最佳性能，并在所有五个任务类别中平均结果最优，显著优于现有基线方法。具体数据未在摘要中说明，但实验表明模型通过语义对齐提升了解码精度和跨任务泛化能力，验证了指令引导的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LEAF的主要贡献是提出了首个EEG-语言对齐的基础模型，并首次揭示了任务指令作为语义先验指导EEG嵌入进入连贯、语言接地空间的作用，具有重要学术价值，为BCI任务提供更鲁棒和可解释的表示。实际应用价值在于增强脑机接口的通用性和性能，潜在局限性包括可能对特定任务或数据的依赖性，未来工作包括代码发布和进一步探索多模态整合。

title: A Kernel Space-based Multidimensional Sparse Model for Dynamic PET Image Denoising
abstract: Achieving high image quality for temporal frames in dynamic positron emission tomography (PET) is challenging due to the limited statistic especially for the short frames. Recent studies have shown that deep learning (DL) is useful in a wide range of medical image denoising tasks. In this paper, we propose a model-based neural network for dynamic PET image denoising. The inter-frame spatial correlation and intra-frame structural consistency in dynamic PET are used to establish the kernel space-based multidimensional sparse (KMDS) model. We then substitute the inherent forms of the parameter estimation with neural networks to enable adaptive parameters optimization, forming the end-to-end neural KMDS-Net. Extensive experimental results from simulated and real data demonstrate that the neural KMDS-Net exhibits strong denoising performance for dynamic PET, outperforming previous baseline methods. The proposed method may be used to effectively achieve high temporal and spatial resolution for dynamic PET. Our source code is available at https://github.com/Kuangxd/Neural-KMDS-Net/tree/main.

light_analysis.overview: 提出基于核空间多维稀疏模型的神经网络方法，用于动态PET图像去噪，实现自适应参数优化和端到端学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 动态PET图像去噪面临挑战，尤其在短帧中统计信息有限，导致图像质量下降，影响医学诊断的准确性和效率。现有深度学习方法虽在医疗图像去噪中广泛应用，但可能未能充分利用动态序列的时空相关性，难以有效处理帧间和帧内结构信息，因此需发展更优方法以提升去噪性能。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出KMDS模型，利用动态PET的帧间空间相关性和帧内结构一致性构建核空间多维稀疏模型，然后使用神经网络替代传统参数估计形式，实现自适应优化，形成端到端的KMDS-Net。该方法结合了模型驱动和深度学习优势，通过模拟和真实数据进行验证，增强了去噪过程的灵活性和准确性。
light_analysis.result: 实验在模拟和真实数据上进行，结果表明KMDS-Net在动态PET去噪中表现出强性能，优于基线方法，有效提高了图像的时空分辨率；摘要未明确说明具体指标如准确率数值，但指出方法在去噪效果上显著提升，与现有技术相比有改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了一种融合模型与神经网络的去噪方法，提升了动态PET图像质量，具有学术价值，推动了医疗图像处理技术的发展；实际应用可能增强诊断效果，未来工作可探索更多数据集的验证和方法的泛化能力，局限性如计算效率等摘要未明确说明。

title: HDC-X: Efficient Medical Data Classification for Embedded Devices
abstract: Energy-efficient medical data classification is essential for modern disease screening, particularly in home and field healthcare where embedded devices are prevalent. While deep learning models achieve state-of-the-art accuracy, their substantial energy consumption and reliance on GPUs limit deployment on such platforms. We present HDC-X, a lightweight classification framework designed for low-power devices. HDC-X encodes data into high-dimensional hypervectors, aggregates them into multiple cluster-specific prototypes, and performs classification through similarity search in hyperspace. We evaluate HDC-X across three medical classification tasks; on heart sound classification, HDC-X is $350\times$ more energy-efficient than Bayesian ResNet with less than 1% accuracy difference. Moreover, HDC-X demonstrates exceptional robustness to noise, limited training data, and hardware error, supported by both theoretical analysis and empirical results, highlighting its potential for reliable deployment in real-world settings. Code is available at https://github.com/jianglanwei/HDC-X.

light_analysis.overview: HDC-X提出了一种基于高维超向量编码的轻量级分类框架，旨在为嵌入式设备提供能量高效的医疗数据分类。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究针对嵌入式设备在医疗数据分类中的高能耗问题展开。在家庭和野外医疗环境中，能量效率对疾病筛查至关重要，但现有深度学习模型尽管准确率高，却消耗大量能源并依赖GPU，限制了在低功耗设备上的部署。因此，开发轻量级且高效的分类框架以满足现实世界应用需求成为研究重点。
light_analysis.method: HDC-X框架的核心方法包括三个步骤：首先，将输入数据编码成高维超向量；其次，将这些超向量聚合到多个聚类特定的原型中；最后，通过计算超空间中测试数据与原型之间的相似性进行分类。该方法的关键创新在于利用高维表示来提高计算效率和鲁棒性，避免了传统深度学习模型的复杂架构，专为低功耗嵌入式设备设计。
light_analysis.result: 论文在三个医疗分类任务上评估HDC-X，结果显示，在心音分类任务中，HDC-X比贝叶斯ResNet模型能量效率高350倍，且准确率差异小于1%。此外，HDC-X表现出对噪声、有限训练数据和硬件错误的卓越鲁棒性，这些结果通过理论分析和实证验证得到支持，突显了其在真实场景中的稳定性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: HDC-X的主要贡献是开发了一种能量高效的轻量级分类框架，适用于嵌入式设备的医疗数据分类。其学术价值在于通过高维超向量方法平衡了准确率和能耗，实际应用价值在于促进家庭和野外医疗中的可靠部署。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多任务或优化硬件兼容性。

title: Masked Diffusion Models as Energy Minimization
abstract: We present a systematic theoretical framework that interprets masked diffusion models (MDMs) as solutions to energy minimization problems in discrete optimal transport. Specifically, we prove that three distinct energy formulations--kinetic, conditional kinetic, and geodesic energy--are mathematically equivalent under the structure of MDMs, and that MDMs minimize all three when the mask schedule satisfies a closed-form optimality condition. This unification not only clarifies the theoretical foundations of MDMs, but also motivates practical improvements in sampling. By parameterizing interpolation schedules via Beta distributions, we reduce the schedule design space to a tractable 2D search, enabling efficient post-training tuning without model modification. Experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks demonstrate that our energy-inspired schedules outperform hand-crafted baselines, particularly in low-step sampling settings.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一个理论框架，将掩码扩散模型解释为离散最优传输中的能量最小化问题，并证明了三种能量公式的数学等价性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决掩码扩散模型（MDMs）理论基础不清晰的问题，同时改进采样效率。MDMs作为生成模型的重要分支，其理论背景缺乏系统性框架，导致理解不足和采样优化困难。现有采样调度方法依赖手动设计，效率较低，无法适应不同场景的需求。通过将MDMs与离散最优传输中的能量最小化联系起来，研究不仅澄清了其理论机制，还为实际采样过程的优化提供了新思路，强调了理论统一对提升模型性能的关键作用。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法构建了一个系统理论框架，证明了在MDMs结构下，动能、条件动能和测地线能量三种公式的数学等价性。核心创新点包括：通过Beta分布参数化插值调度，将原本复杂的调度设计空间简化为可处理的二维搜索，实现无需模型修改的后训练高效调优。该技术基于离散最优传输理论，确保掩码调度满足闭式最优条件，从而提升采样的精确性和灵活性，为实际应用提供了理论基础和实用工具。
light_analysis.result: 实验在合成和真实世界基准测试中进行，主要结果显示，基于能量启发的调度方案在采样性能上显著优于手动设计的基线方法，特别是在低步采样设置中表现出更强优势。具体而言，该调度提升了采样的效率和准确性，但摘要未提供精确的性能指标数据。与基线方法的对比表明，提出的方法能够更有效地平衡采样步数与质量，突出了理论指导实践的价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提供了一个统一的理论框架，将MDMs与能量最小化问题紧密结合，并启发了实用的采样调度改进。其学术价值在于深化了对MDMs理论机制的理解，促进了离散最优传输在生成模型中的应用；实际应用价值体现在提升采样效率和适应性上，为低资源场景提供解决方案。未来工作可以探索更广泛的调度参数化方法或扩展到其他生成模型，以进一步验证框架的普适性和局限性。

title: DisPatch: Disarming Adversarial Patches in Object Detection with Diffusion Models
abstract: Object detection is fundamental to various real-world applications, such as security monitoring and surveillance video analysis. Despite their advancements, state-of-the-art object detectors are still vulnerable to adversarial patch attacks, which can be easily applied to real-world objects to either conceal actual items or create non-existent ones, leading to severe consequences. In this work, we introduce DisPatch, the first diffusion-based defense framework for object detection. Unlike previous works that aim to "detect and remove" adversarial patches, DisPatch adopts a "regenerate and rectify" strategy, leveraging generative models to disarm attack effects while preserving the integrity of the input image. Specifically, we utilize the in-distribution generative power of diffusion models to regenerate the entire image, aligning it with benign data. A rectification process is then employed to identify and replace adversarial regions with their regenerated benign counterparts. DisPatch is attack-agnostic and requires no prior knowledge of the existing patches. Extensive experiments across multiple detectors demonstrate that DisPatch consistently outperforms state-of-the-art defenses on both hiding attacks and creating attacks, achieving the best overall mAP@0.5 score of 89.3% on hiding attacks, and lowering the attack success rate to 24.8% on untargeted creating attacks. Moreover, it strikes the balance between effectiveness and efficiency, and maintains strong robustness against adaptive attacks, making it a practical and reliable defense method.

light_analysis.overview: 提出DisPatch，首个基于扩散模型的防御框架，通过再生和校正策略在目标检测中解除对抗性补丁攻击，避免传统检测移除方法的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 目标检测在安全监控和视频分析等实际应用中至关重要，但最先进的检测器仍易受对抗性补丁攻击威胁，可能导致隐藏或伪造物体的严重后果。现有防御方法往往基于检测和移除策略，可能破坏图像完整性或需攻击先验知识，因此需要开发更灵活有效的防御机制来解决这一安全问题。
light_analysis.method: DisPatch采用“再生与校正”策略，利用扩散模型的在分布生成能力再生整个输入图像，以对齐良性数据并消除对抗影响。随后通过校正过程识别对抗性区域，并用再生后的良性部分替换。该方法攻击无关，无需已知攻击信息，适用于多种目标检测器架构，创新性地将生成模型应用于安全防御。
light_analysis.result: 在广泛实验中，DisPatch在多个目标检测器上表现优异：在隐藏攻击中达到89.3%的mAP@0.5得分，优于现有最佳防御方法；在非目标创建攻击中，将攻击成功率降低至24.8%。它还平衡了有效性与效率，保持对自适应攻击的强鲁棒性，展示了全面的性能优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: DisPatch通过扩散模型实现攻击无关的防御，提供了一种实用可靠的解决方案，增强了目标检测系统的安全性。其贡献在于创新应用生成模型于对抗安全领域，具有广泛学术和实际价值；未来可探索效率优化或扩展到其他视觉任务以进一步提升适用性。

title: PAUL: Uncertainty-Guided Partition and Augmentation for Robust Cross-View Geo-Localization under Noisy Correspondence
abstract: Cross-view geo-localization is a critical task for UAV navigation, event detection, and aerial surveying, as it enables matching between drone-captured and satellite imagery. Most existing approaches embed multi-modal data into a joint feature space to maximize the similarity of paired images. However, these methods typically assume perfect alignment of image pairs during training, which rarely holds true in real-world scenarios. In practice, factors such as urban canyon effects, electromagnetic interference, and adverse weather frequently induce GPS drift, resulting in systematic alignment shifts where only partial correspondences exist between pairs. Despite its prevalence, this source of noisy correspondence has received limited attention in current research. In this paper, we formally introduce and address the Noisy Correspondence on Cross-View Geo-Localization (NC-CVGL) problem, aiming to bridge the gap between idealized benchmarks and practical applications. To this end, we propose PAUL (Partition and Augmentation by Uncertainty Learning), a novel framework that partitions and augments training data based on estimated data uncertainty through uncertainty-aware co-augmentation and evidential co-training. Specifically, PAUL selectively augments regions with high correspondence confidence and utilizes uncertainty estimation to refine feature learning, effectively suppressing noise from misaligned pairs. Distinct from traditional filtering or label correction, PAUL leverages both data uncertainty and loss discrepancy for targeted partitioning and augmentation, thus providing robust supervision for noisy samples. Comprehensive experiments validate the effectiveness of individual components in PAUL,which consistently achieves superior performance over other competitive noisy-correspondence-driven methods in various noise ratios.

light_analysis.overview: PAUL框架通过不确定性引导的数据分区和增强，解决了跨视角地理定位中的噪声对应问题，提供更鲁棒的监督学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 跨视角地理定位在无人机导航、事件检测等领域具有重要应用价值，但现有方法通常假设训练数据完美对齐，忽略了现实中因GPS漂移、城市峡谷效应和恶劣天气等因素导致的噪声对应关系。这种噪声对应在实践中普遍存在，导致训练数据系统性偏差，仅存在部分对应，从而降低模型性能。然而，当前研究对此关注不足，使得方法在实际部署中受限。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，正式引入并解决噪声对应下的跨视角地理定位问题，以弥合理想化基准与实际应用之间的差距。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出PAUL框架，采用不确定性引导的分区和增强策略。框架基于不确定性感知协同增强和证据协同训练来估计数据不确定性，并利用这些信息进行数据分区和选择性增强，针对高对应置信度区域进行优化。不同于传统过滤或标签校正方法，PAUL结合数据不确定性和损失差异，实现目标分区和特征学习，有效抑制来自错误对齐对的噪声，提供更精准的监督。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构，但强调框架的创新点在于通过不确定性估计和协同训练机制提升鲁棒性。
light_analysis.result: 通过全面实验验证了PAUL框架各组件的有效性，在多种噪声比下均优于其他基于噪声对应的方法。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进，但表明PAUL在噪声环境下表现出色，一致性地超越竞争方法。实验结果证明了框架对噪声的鲁棒处理能力，通过对比基线方法，展示了在提升模型稳定性和性能方面的优势，强调了其在复杂实际场景中的实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是正式定义了NC-CVGL问题，并提出了PAUL框架，通过不确定性引导的分区和增强解决了噪声对应下的跨视角地理定位问题。方法利用数据不确定性和损失差异进行优化，提高了模型的鲁棒性和实际应用价值，为现实世界场景提供了更可靠的解决方案。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他噪声类型或进一步改进不确定性估计技术。摘要未明确说明局限性，但突出了方法的创新性和有效性，推动了该领域的研究进展。

title: Prompt-Induced Linguistic Fingerprints for LLM-Generated Fake News Detection
abstract: With the rapid development of large language models, the generation of fake news has become increasingly effortless, posing a growing societal threat and underscoring the urgent need for reliable detection methods. Early efforts to identify LLM-generated fake news have predominantly focused on the textual content itself; however, because much of that content may appear coherent and factually consistent, the subtle traces of falsification are often difficult to uncover. Through distributional divergence analysis, we uncover prompt-induced linguistic fingerprints: statistically distinct probability shifts between LLM-generated real and fake news when maliciously prompted. Based on this insight, we propose a novel method named Linguistic Fingerprints Extraction (LIFE). By reconstructing word-level probability distributions, LIFE can find discriminative patterns that facilitate the detection of LLM-generated fake news. To further amplify these fingerprint patterns, we also leverage key-fragment techniques that accentuate subtle linguistic differences, thereby improving detection reliability. Our experiments show that LIFE achieves state-of-the-art performance in LLM-generated fake news and maintains high performance in human-written fake news. The code and data are available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LIFE-E86A.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出LIFE方法，通过分析提示诱导的语言指纹来检测大语言模型生成的假新闻。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大语言模型的快速发展，生成假新闻变得更加容易，对社会构成日益严重的威胁，因此迫切需要可靠的检测方法。早期检测方法主要聚焦于文本内容本身，但由于生成内容往往看似连贯且事实一致，虚假的细微痕迹难以被发现。本研究旨在解决这一问题，揭示在恶意提示下LLM生成真假新闻之间的统计差异，以克服现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 通过分布差异分析，本研究揭示了提示诱导的语言指纹：即LLM生成真假新闻时在恶意提示下产生的统计上不同的概率偏移。基于这一发现，提出了语言指纹提取（LIFE）方法，通过重构词级概率分布来识别判别性模式。为了增强这些指纹模式，采用了关键片段技术来放大细微的语言差异，从而提高检测的可靠性。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，LIFE在检测LLM生成的假新闻方面实现了最先进的性能，显著优于基线方法，并在检测人类撰写的假新闻时保持了高性能。具体性能指标在论文中详细报告，摘要未明确说明准确率提升或效率改进的具体数值，但强调了其在多场景下的有效性。代码和数据已公开可用，支持方法的验证和进一步研究。
light_analysis.conclusion: LIFE方法通过利用语言指纹有效提升了LLM生成假新闻的检测能力，为假新闻检测领域提供了创新思路。研究的学术价值在于揭示了提示诱导的统计差异，实际应用价值体现在提高检测可靠性上。代码和数据的公开促进了可复现性和未来工作，未来可探索扩展到其他类型的生成内容检测任务。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来方向细节。

title: From Nodes to Narratives: Explaining Graph Neural Networks with LLMs and Graph Context
abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as powerful tools for learning over structured data, including text-attributed graphs (TAGs), which are common in domains such as citation networks, social platforms, and knowledge graphs. GNNs are not inherently interpretable and thus, many explanation methods have been proposed. However, existing explanation methods often struggle to generate interpretable, fine-grained rationales, especially when node attributes include rich natural language. In this work, we introduce GSPELL, a lightweight, post-hoc framework that uses large language models (LLMs) to generate faithful and interpretable explanations for GNN predictions. GSPELL projects GNN node embeddings into the LLM embedding space and constructs hybrid prompts that interleave soft prompts with textual inputs from the graph structure. This enables the LLM to reason about GNN internal representations and produce natural language explanations along with concise explanation subgraphs. Our experiments across real-world TAG datasets demonstrate that GSPELL achieves a favorable trade-off between fidelity and sparsity, while improving human-centric metrics such as insightfulness. GSPELL sets a new direction for LLM-based explainability in graph learning by aligning GNN internals with human reasoning.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出GSPELL框架，利用大型语言模型生成图神经网络预测的忠实且可解释的自然语言解释。
light_analysis.motivation: 图神经网络在处理文本属性图等结构化数据时缺乏内在可解释性，尤其在节点属性包含丰富自然语言时，现有解释方法难以生成细粒度和可理解的解释。这在实际应用中限制了模型的可靠性和人类理解。因此，本研究旨在解决GNN可解释性的挑战，通过结合LLMs提升解释质量，以应对现实场景中复杂的文本属性图分析需求。摘要强调了现有方法的不足，如解释的粗糙性，从而凸显了本研究的必要性和重要性。
light_analysis.method: GSPELL是一个轻量级的事后解释框架，它通过将GNN的节点嵌入投影到LLM的嵌入空间，实现两种模型的协同。关键创新在于构建混合提示，交替使用软提示（基于GNN内部表示）和从图结构提取的文本输入，使LLM能够推理GNN的决策过程。该方法使LLM生成自然语言解释及相关的解释子图，从而对齐图学习与人类推理。框架在真实世界文本属性图数据集上进行实验，但摘要未详细说明具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多个真实世界文本属性图数据集上进行，结果表明GSPELL在解释的忠实性和稀疏性之间达到了良好的平衡。相较于基线方法，该框架提升了以人为中心的评价指标，如解释的insightfulness，体现了其在生成可理解解释方面的优势。摘要未提供具体的性能数据如准确率或效率改进，但强调了框架的有效性和新颖性，展示了其在解释质量上的改进，为后续研究提供了实证基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出GSPELL框架，为图学习中的基于大型语言模型的可解释性研究开创了新方向。通过融合GNNs和LLMs，它实现了更自然的解释生成，增强了模型在现实应用中的可解释性和实用性。学术上，该工作推动了可解释AI在图数据分析领域的发展；实际上，它有望提升用户对GNN决策的信任。未来工作可包括扩展框架到更广泛的图类型或优化解释生成过程，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Deep Neural Networks with General Activations: Super-Convergence in Sobolev Norms
abstract: This paper establishes a comprehensive approximation result for deep fully-connected neural networks with commonly-used and general activation functions in Sobolev spaces $W^{n,\infty}$, with errors measured in the $W^{m,p}$-norm for $m < n$ and $1\le p \le \infty$. The derived rates surpass those of classical numerical approximation techniques, such as finite element and spectral methods, exhibiting a phenomenon we refer to as \emph{super-convergence}. Our analysis shows that deep networks with general activations can approximate weak solutions of partial differential equations (PDEs) with superior accuracy compared to traditional numerical methods at the approximation level. Furthermore, this work closes a significant gap in the error-estimation theory for neural-network-based approaches to PDEs, offering a unified theoretical foundation for their use in scientific computing.

title: Learning from Similarity-Confidence and Confidence-Difference
abstract: In practical machine learning applications, it is often challenging to assign accurate labels to data, and increasing the number of labeled instances is often limited. In such cases, Weakly Supervised Learning (WSL), which enables training with incomplete or imprecise supervision, provides a practical and effective solution. However, most existing WSL methods focus on leveraging a single type of weak supervision. In this paper, we propose a novel WSL framework that leverages complementary weak supervision signals from multiple relational perspectives, which can be especially valuable when labeled data is limited. Specifically, we introduce SconfConfDiff Classification, a method that integrates two distinct forms of weaklabels: similarity-confidence and confidence-difference, which are assigned to unlabeled data pairs. To implement this method, we derive two types of unbiased risk estimators for classification: one based on a convex combination of existing estimators, and another newly designed by modeling the interaction between two weak labels. We prove that both estimators achieve optimal convergence rates with respect to estimation error bounds. Furthermore, we introduce a risk correction approach to mitigate overfitting caused by negative empirical risk, and provide theoretical analysis on the robustness of the proposed method against inaccurate class prior probability and label noise. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method consistently outperforms existing baselines across a variety of settings.
