light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种新颖的弱监督学习分类方法，通过整合相似性-置信度和置信度-差异两种弱标签来提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在实际机器学习应用中，准确标注数据困难且标注实例有限，弱监督学习提供了解决方案。然而，现有大多数方法仅利用单一类型的弱监督，这在标注数据稀缺时可能导致信息利用不足，限制了学习效果。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过利用来自多个关系视角的互补弱监督信号，弥补单类型方法的不足，在数据标注有限时提供更有效的训练方式。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了SconfConfDiff Classification方法，核心是将相似性-置信度和置信度-差异两种弱标签整合到数据对中。该方法推导了两种无偏风险估计器：一种基于现有估计器的凸组合，另一种新设计以模拟两种弱标签的交互作用。此外，引入风险校正方法来减轻负经验风险导致的过拟合，并提供了理论分析，证明该方法对不准确的类先验概率和标签噪声具有鲁棒性。关键创新在于从多视角利用弱监督，优化分类性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，所提方法在各种设置下持续优于现有基准方法，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进数据。基于摘要推断，该方法通过整合互补信号，可能提升了分类精度或鲁棒性，与基线相比展现出更好的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个利用互补弱监督信号的新弱监督学习框架，推导了具有理论保证的无偏风险估计器。这为有限标注数据场景提供了有效解决方案，具有学术价值如推进弱监督学习理论，以及实际应用价值如减少标注成本。未来工作可扩展至更多类型的弱监督信号或探索在复杂数据集上的应用。

title: Agnostics: Learning to Code in Any Programming Language via Reinforcement with a Universal Learning Environment
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) already excel at writing code in high-resource languages such as Python and JavaScript, yet stumble on low-resource languages that remain essential to science and engineering. Besides the obvious shortage of pre-training data, post-training itself is a bottleneck: every new language seems to require new datasets, test harnesses, and reinforcement-learning (RL) infrastructure.   We introduce Agnostics, a language-agnostic post-training pipeline that eliminates this per-language engineering. The key idea is to judge code solely by its externally observable behavior, so a single verifier can test solutions written in any language. Concretely, we (i) use an LLM to rewrite existing unit-test datasets into an I/O format, (ii) supply a short configuration that tells the verifier how to compile and run a target language, and (iii) apply reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) in a robust code execution environment.   Applied to five low-resource languages--Lua, Julia, R, OCaml, and Fortran--Agnostics (1) improves Qwen-3 4B to performance that rivals other 16B-70B open-weight models; (2) scales cleanly to larger and diverse model families (Qwen-3 8B, DeepSeek Coder 6.7B Instruct, Phi 4 Mini); and (3) for ${\le} 16$B parameter models, sets new state-of-the-art pass@1 results on MultiPL-E and a new multi-language version of LiveCodeBench that we introduce.   We release the language-agnostic training datasets (Ag-MBPP-X, Ag-Codeforces-X, Ag-LiveCodeBench-X), training code, and ready-to-use configurations, making RL post-training in any programming language as simple as editing a short YAML file.
comment: 30 pages, 19 figures. Accepted at ICLR 2026. For data, code, artifacts, see https://agnostics.abgru.me

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出Agnostics，一个语言无关的后训练管道，通过强化学习和外部行为验证，使大型语言模型能在任意编程语言中高效生成代码。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于大型语言模型在Python和JavaScript等高资源语言中代码生成表现优异，但在Lua、Julia等低资源语言上仍存困难，这些语言对科学和工程领域至关重要。现有方法的不足在于每个新语言都需要单独的数据集、测试框架和强化学习基础设施，导致工程成本高昂且不具通用性。因此，亟需一种语言无关的方案来简化后训练流程，提升低资源语言的代码生成能力。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于Agnostics管道，其核心创新是仅通过代码的外部可观察行为进行评估，实现语言无关性。具体技术路线包括：使用LLM将现有单元测试数据集重写为I/O格式；提供短配置告诉验证器如何编译和运行目标语言；在稳健的代码执行环境中应用基于可验证奖励的强化学习。该方法无需为每种语言定制基础设施，依赖数据集转换和配置驱动，关键细节涉及Ag-MBPP-X等语言无关训练数据集的使用。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，Agnostics应用于五种低资源语言（Lua、Julia、R、OCaml、Fortran）后，成功将Qwen-3 4B模型的性能提升至与其他16B-70B开源权重模型相匹敌的水平。该方法可扩展至Qwen-3 8B、DeepSeek Coder 6.7B Instruct等模型家族，并在参数≤16B的模型上，在MultiPL-E和新多语言版LiveCodeBench评估中设定了新的state-of-the-art pass@1结果，证明了其相对于基线方法的显著改进和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了Agnostics，一种语言无关的后训练管道，显著降低了大型语言模型在低资源编程语言中强化学习后训练的工程负担。学术价值在于提供了一种通用方法，减少了对语言特定基础设施的依赖；实际应用价值通过发布数据集、代码和配置，使得RL后训练在任意编程语言中变得简单易用。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能涉及更多语言扩展或验证器优化。

title: A Theory of Adaptive Scaffolding for LLM-Based Pedagogical Agents
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) present new opportunities for creating pedagogical agents that engage in meaningful dialogue to support student learning. However, current LLM systems used in classrooms often lack the solid theoretical foundations found in earlier intelligent tutoring systems. To bridge this gap, we propose a framework that combines Evidence-Centered Design with Social Cognitive Theory and Zone of Proximal Development for adaptive scaffolding in LLM-based agents focused on STEM+C learning. We instantiate this framework with Inquizzitor, an LLM-based formative assessment agent that integrates human-AI hybrid intelligence and provides feedback grounded in cognitive science principles. Our findings show that Inquizzitor delivers high-quality assessment and interaction aligned with core learning theories, offering effective guidance that students value. This research demonstrates the potential for theory-driven LLM integration in education, highlighting the ability of these systems to provide adaptive and principled instruction.
comment: Published in the proceedings of AAAI 2026 (main technical track)

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出一个理论框架，结合证据中心设计、社交认知理论和最近发展区，用于基于大型语言模型的自适应教学代理，并实例化为Inquizzitor系统。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型为教学代理提供了支持学生学习的对话式交互新机会，但当前课堂中使用的LLM系统缺乏早期智能辅导系统的坚实理论基础，导致其教育应用效果有限。现有方法未充分整合学习理论，限制了自适应教学的质量和原则性。因此，本研究旨在通过理论驱动的方式，为LLM教学代理提供自适应支架式教学的基础，以改善STEM+C学习环境中的教育实践，解决理论与实践脱节的问题。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一个框架，结合证据中心设计、社交认知理论和最近发展区，专门用于基于大型语言模型的自适应支架式教学代理，聚焦于STEM+C学习。该框架通过实例化为Inquizzitor来实现，Inquizzitor是一个基于LLM的形成性评估代理，整合了人机混合智能技术，并基于认知科学原理提供反馈。关键创新点在于理论驱动的设计，确保教学代理的行为与学习科学原则一致，尽管摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 研究结果显示，Inquizzitor能够提供高质量的评估和互动，这些互动与核心学习理论保持一致，学生重视其提供的有效指导。然而，摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标，如准确率提升或效率改进，也未提供与基线方法的详细对比情况。这表明理论驱动的LLM系统在实践中有潜力支持学习，但未来需要更多量化评估来进一步验证其优势和效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究的主要贡献在于展示了理论驱动的LLM集成在教育中的潜力，强调这些系统能提供自适应和原则性教学。这为LLM教学代理的发展奠定了学术基础，推动了教育技术与学习理论的结合，具有实际应用价值，特别是在STEM+C学习领域。摘要未明确说明研究的局限性或未来工作方向，但暗示了需要进一步探索量化评估和更广泛的应用场景。

title: Unleashing the Potential of All Test Samples: Mean-Shift Guided Test-Time Adaptation
abstract: Visual-language models (VLMs) like CLIP exhibit strong generalization but struggle with distribution shifts at test time. Existing training-free test-time adaptation (TTA) methods operate strictly within CLIP's original feature space, relying on high-confidence samples while overlooking the potential of low-confidence ones. We propose MS-TTA, a training-free approach that enhances feature representations beyond CLIP's space using a single-step k-nearest neighbors (kNN) Mean-Shift. By refining all test samples, MS-TTA improves feature compactness and class separability, leading to more stable adaptation. Additionally, a cache of refined embeddings further enhances inference by providing Mean Shift enhanced logits. Extensive evaluations on OOD and cross-dataset benchmarks demonstrate that MS-TTA consistently outperforms state-of-the-art training-free TTA methods, achieving robust adaptation without requiring additional training.
comment: Accepted by IEEE TCSVT. This is the author's version which has not been fully edited and content may change prior to final publication

light_analysis.overview: MS-TTA是一种利用单步kNN Mean-Shift精炼所有测试样本的无训练测试时适应方法，显著提升CLIP模型在分布偏移下的适应能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉语言模型如CLIP在泛化方面表现出色，但实际测试中常面临分布偏移挑战，导致性能下降。现有无训练测试时适应（TTA）方法仅依赖高置信度样本进行适应，同时局限于CLIP的原始特征空间，这忽视了低置信度样本的潜力并限制了适应效果。因此，亟需一种能整合所有测试样本并超越原始特征空间限制的方法，以增强模型在未知环境下的鲁棒性和稳定性。
light_analysis.method: MS-TTA采用无训练的单步k近邻（kNN）Mean-Shift算法来增强CLIP的特征表示。核心创新在于对所有测试样本进行特征精炼：通过kNN找到每个样本的邻居，应用Mean-Shift操作将特征向局部密度更高的区域移动，从而提高特征的紧凑性和类别可分性。此外，缓存精炼后的嵌入，并结合Mean Shift增强的对数进行推理，以优化预测性能。该方法突破了CLIP原始特征空间的限制，实现了更稳定和高效的适应过程。
light_analysis.result: 在多个OOD和跨数据集基准上的广泛实验表明，MS-TTA consistently在性能上优于当前最先进的无训练测试时适应方法，证明了其有效应对分布偏移和实现稳健适应的能力。尽管摘要未提供具体准确率提升数据，但评估结果强调了该方法在无需额外训练情况下的优越性，为实际部署提供了可靠的技术支撑。与基线方法相比，MS-TTA展示了更强的适应性和泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: MS-TTA的主要贡献是提出了一种无训练的测试时适应方法，通过Mean-Shift精炼所有测试样本，显著改善了CLIP模型在分布偏移下的性能。这项研究具有重要学术价值，它挑战了现有方法依赖高置信度样本的局限，为特征增强和测试时适应提供了新思路。在实际应用中，该方法有助于提高视觉语言模型的鲁棒性。未来工作可能包括将该技术扩展到其他模型类型或处理更复杂的分布偏移场景。

title: PoseMaster: A Unified 3D Native Framework for Stylized Pose Generation
abstract: Pose stylization, which aims to synthesize stylized content aligning with target poses, serves as a fundamental task across 2D, 3D, and video domains. In the 3D realm, prevailing approaches typically rely on a cascade pipeline: first manipulating the image pose via 2D foundation models and subsequently lifting it into 3D representations. However, this paradigm limits the precision and diversity of the 3d pose stylization. To this end, we propose a novel paradigm for 3D pose stylization that unifies pose stylization and 3D generation within a cohesive framework. This integration minimizes the risk of cumulative errors and enhances the model's efficiency and effectiveness. In addition, diverging from previous works that typically utilize 2D skeleton images as guidance, we directly utilize the 3D skeleton because it can provide a more accurate representation of 3D spatial and topological relationships, which significantly enhances the model's capacity to achieve richer and more precise pose stylization. Moreover, we develop a scalable data engine to construct a large-scale dataset of ''Image-Skeleton-Mesh'' triplets, enabling the model to jointly learn identity preservation and geometric alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PoseMaster significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both qualitative and quantitative metrics. Owing to the strict spatial alignment between the generated 3D meshes and the conditioning skeletons, PoseMaster enables the direct creation of animatable assets when coupled with automated skinning models, highlighting its compelling potential for automated character rigging.

light_analysis.overview: PoseMaster提出统一3D骨架引导的姿态风格化和3D生成框架，通过直接集成3D骨架和构建大规模数据集，显著提升3D姿态风格化的精度和多样性。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前3D姿态风格化方法常依赖级联管道，即先用2D基础模型处理姿态再提升到3D表示，这导致累积错误并限制精度和多样性。姿态风格化在2D、3D和视频领域是基础任务，现有方法无法准确捕捉3D空间关系，影响实际应用如动画制作。使用2D骨架图像作为指导不足以表示3D拓扑，因此需要更高效的3D原生框架来解决这些不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一个统一框架，将姿态风格化和3D生成直接集成，避免级联管道以减少错误。关键创新是直接使用3D骨架作为指导，而非2D图像，以更准确表示空间和拓扑关系。开发了可扩展数据引擎，构建大规模'图像-骨架-网格'三元组数据集，使模型能联合学习身份保持和几何对齐，从而增强风格化的丰富性和精确性。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，PoseMaster在定性和定量指标上显著优于最先进方法，具体提升摘要未明确说明，但强调性能改进。生成的3D网格与条件骨架严格对齐，结合自动皮肤模型可直接创建可动画资产，显示了高效的应用潜力，与基线方法对比展现了更好的效果和效率。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出新颖的3D原生框架，统一姿态风格化和3D生成，减少累积错误并提高精度和多样性。研究具有学术价值，推动了3D生成与姿态风格化的集成；实际应用中，可用于自动角色装配，生成可动画资产，未来工作可能涉及扩展数据集或优化模型架构，局限性摘要未明确说明。

title: Ctrl-Z Sampling: Scaling Diffusion Sampling with Controlled Random Zigzag Explorations
abstract: Diffusion models generate conditional samples by progressively denoising Gaussian noise, yet the denoising trajectory can stall at visually plausible but low-quality outcomes with conditional misalignment or structural artifacts. We interpret this behavior as local optima in a surrogate quality landscape: Once early denoising commits to a suboptimal global structure, later steps mainly sharpen details and seldom correct the underlying mistake. While existing inference-time approaches explore alternative diffusion states via re-noising with fixed strength or direction, they exhibit limited capacity to escape steep quality plateaus. We propose Controlled Random Zigzag Sampling (Ctrl-Z Sampling),a scalable sampling strategy that detects plateaus in quality landscape via a surrogate score, and allocates exploration only when a plateau is detected. Upon detection, Ctrl-Z Sampling rolls back to noisier states, samples a set of alternative continuations, and updates the trajectory when a candidate improves the score, otherwise escalating the exploration depth to escape the current plateau. The proposed method is model-agnostic and broadly compatible with existing diffusion frameworks. Experiments show that Ctrl-Z Sampling consistently improves generation quality over other inference-time scaling samplers across different NFE budgets, offering a scalable compute-quality trade-off.

light_analysis.overview: 提出一种可控的随机锯齿形采样方法，通过动态检测质量平台并实施回溯与探索，提升扩散模型的生成质量和条件对齐效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 扩散模型在条件样本生成过程中，去噪轨迹常陷入局部最优解，导致生成结果虽视觉合理但存在条件对齐错误或结构伪影，影响最终质量。现有推理时方法如固定强度或方向的重新加噪，难以有效逃离这些质量平台，限制了模型的性能提升，尤其是在计算资源有限的情况下。因此，需要一种更灵活的采样策略来动态调整探索过程，以克服这些问题。
light_analysis.method: Ctrl-Z采样方法的核心是使用代理分数检测去噪过程中的质量平台。当检测到平台时，方法会回溯到噪声更大的状态，并采样一组替代的后续路径。如果候选路径的代理分数有所改善，则更新当前轨迹；否则，增加探索深度以逃离平台。这种策略仅在必要时进行探索，优化计算资源。方法是模型无关的，兼容现有扩散框架如DDPM，无需修改模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，Ctrl-Z采样方法在不同NFE预算下，相比其他推理时缩放采样器，一致地提高了生成质量，具体体现在条件对齐和结构完整性的改善上。摘要未明确说明具体准确率数字，但强调了其在多种设置下的优势，并提供可扩展的计算-质量权衡，允许用户根据资源灵活调整策略以获得更优结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: Ctrl-Z采样方法的主要贡献是提出一种可控的随机锯齿形采样策略，有效解决扩散模型中局部最优问题，提升生成质量和效率。学术价值在于为推理时优化提供新思路，实际应用价值在于模型无关性和兼容性，易于部署。未来工作可能包括进一步优化代理分数设计或扩展到其他生成模型，局限性方面摘要未明确说明，但可推断可能需要复杂计算或数据集调优。

title: Dynamic Reinsurance Treaty Bidding via Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
abstract: This paper develops a novel multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework for reinsurance treaty bidding, addressing long-standing inefficiencies in traditional broker-mediated placement processes. We pose the core research question: Can autonomous, learning-based bidding systems improve risk transfer efficiency and outperform conventional pricing approaches in reinsurance markets?   In our model, each reinsurer is represented by an adaptive agent that iteratively refines its bidding strategy within a competitive, partially observable environment. The simulation explicitly incorporates institutional frictions including broker intermediation, incumbent advantages, last-look privileges, and asymmetric access to underwriting information.   Empirical analysis demonstrates that MARL agents achieve up to 15% higher underwriting profit, 20% lower tail risk (CVaR), and over 25% improvement in Sharpe ratios relative to actuarial and heuristic baselines. Sensitivity tests confirm robustness across hyperparameter settings, and stress testing reveals strong resilience under simulated catastrophe shocks and capital constraints.   These findings suggest that MARL offers a viable path toward more transparent, adaptive, and risk-sensitive reinsurance markets. The proposed framework contributes to emerging literature at the intersection of algorithmic market design, strategic bidding, and AI-enabled financial decision-making.
comment: The authors have determined that the current version contains incomplete analysis and preliminary results that are not suitable for public dissemination. The paper is withdrawn pending major revision

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种多智能体强化学习框架，用于优化再保险合约竞价，显著提升市场效率和风险管理性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 再保险市场的传统经纪中介流程存在长期低效问题，如信息不对称、经纪成本高企和定价方法不优化。本文旨在解决这些机构摩擦，探索基于学习的自动竞价系统是否能超越传统精算和启发式方法，从而提高风险转移效率和市场透明度。核心研究问题聚焦于多智能体强化学习能否为复杂的再保险市场提供更智能的决策支持，适应竞争性环境。
light_analysis.method: 论文开发了一个多智能体强化学习框架，其中每个再保险商由自适应智能体代表，在部分可观察的竞争环境中迭代优化竞价策略。关键创新点包括模拟中集成了真实世界的机构摩擦，如经纪中介、现有者优势、最后查看特权和不对称信息访问。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或模型架构细节，但突出了智能体在动态环境中的自适应学习过程和策略优化机制。
light_analysis.result: 实证分析表明，MARL智能体相比精算和启发式基线，实现了高达15%的更高核保利润、20%的更低尾部风险（通过CVaR衡量），以及超过25%的夏普比率改进。灵敏度测试确认了模型在不同超参数设置下的鲁棒性，压力测试显示在模拟灾难冲击和资本约束下具有强韧性，证实了框架在极端条件下的稳健性和风险控制能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了一种基于多智能体强化学习的再保险竞价框架，为构建更透明、自适应和风险敏感的市场提供了可行路径。学术价值体现在推动算法市场设计、策略竞价和AI赋能金融决策的交叉研究，实际应用前景包括提升金融市场的自动化决策和风险管理水平。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但暗示了进一步研究可在现实部署、市场可扩展性和政策影响方面展开。

title: LEO-VL: Efficient Scene Representation for Scalable 3D Vision-Language Learning
abstract: Developing vision-language models (VLMs) capable of understanding 3D scenes has been a longstanding research goal. Despite recent progress, 3D VLMs still struggle with spatial reasoning and robustness. We identify three key obstacles hindering their progress: (1) scene representation is constrained by a capacity-efficiency trade-off, which impedes scalable learning; (2) training data lacks a comprehensive scheme, with limited diversity across tasks and scene domains; and (3) models exhibit robustness deficiencies and lack effective post-training. To address these challenges, we first propose condensed feature grid (CFG), an efficient scene representation that significantly reduces token overhead while preserving strong perceptual capacity. Building on CFG, we introduce LEO-VL, a 3D VLM trained on over 700k 3D vision-language (3D-VL) data spanning four real-world indoor domains and five tasks such as captioning and dialogue. To further improve robustness, we propose SceneDPO, a novel post-training objective that incorporates contrastive signals across both answers and scenes. LEO-VL achieves state-of-the-art performance on various 3D-VL benchmarks, such as SQA3D, Beacon3D, and Scan2Cap. Extensive analyses highlight the efficiency of CFG and provide key insights such as the importance of task and scene diversity, the priority of data quality for effective scaling, and the advantages of SceneDPO.

light_analysis.overview: LEO-VL通过引入Condensed Feature Grid和SceneDPO优化了3D视觉语言模型的场景表示和鲁棒性，实现了高效可扩展学习。
light_analysis.motivation: 3D视觉语言模型在理解3D场景时面临长期挑战，尤其是在空间推理和鲁棒性方面。摘要指出三大障碍：首先，场景表示受限于容量-效率权衡，这阻碍了可扩展学习；其次，训练数据缺乏任务和场景的多样性，限制了模型泛化能力；最后，模型鲁棒性不足且后训练无效。这些问题导致现有方法难以支持大规模应用，阻碍了AI在3D视觉语言理解领域的进展。摘要强调解决这些障碍对于推动该研究领域的发展至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Condensed Feature Grid (CFG)作为高效场景表示，能显著减少token开销同时保持强感知能力。在此基础上，构建了LEO-VL模型，它基于CFG，并使用超过700k的3D视觉语言数据训练，涵盖四个现实室内领域和五个任务（如描述和对话）。为提升鲁棒性，引入SceneDPO后训练目标，该目标通过结合答案和场景的对比信号来优化模型。关键创新点包括CFG的效率优化、数据多样性的整合以及SceneDPO的对比学习机制。
light_analysis.result: LEO-VL在多个3D视觉语言基准测试（如SQA3D、Beacon3D和Scan2Cap）上达到最先进性能。扩展分析显示，CFG显著提高了效率，减少token开销，同时模型在任务和场景多样性训练下表现优异。与基线方法相比，SceneDPO增强了模型的鲁棒性，在对比实验中显示出优势。摘要未提供具体数据细节，但强调这些结果验证了方法的有效性，并揭示了数据质量对可扩展学习的重要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了CFG、LEO-VL和SceneDPO，显著提升了3D视觉语言模型的性能和鲁棒性。学术价值在于解决了场景表示的可扩展性问题，并强调了数据多样性和质量的关键作用，为未来3D视觉语言学习研究提供了新框架。实际应用中，该方法可促进智能系统在室内环境理解等领域的部署。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多领域或进一步优化表示效率。

title: Reasoning-Aligned Perception Decoupling for Scalable Multi-modal Reasoning
abstract: Recent breakthroughs in reasoning language models have significantly advanced text-based reasoning. On the other hand, Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) still lag behind, hindered by their outdated internal LLMs. Upgrading these LLMs is often prohibitively expensive, as it requires costly vision-language alignment retraining. To address this issue, we introduce Perception-Reasoning Decoupling, which modularizes the MLLM's reasoning component and makes it easily replaceable. This approach redefines the MLLM's role to convert multi-modal inputs into detailed textual outputs that can be processed by any powerful, external, text-only LLM reasoners. To align the MLLM's perceptual output with the final reasoning task, we propose a novel reinforcement learning algorithm called Visual Perception Optimization (VPO). VPO rewards the MLLM based on the correctness of answers generated by the external reasoner to produce faithful and query-relevant captions. Together, this decoupling pipeline and VPO form our Reasoning-Aligned PerceptIon Decoupling (RAPID) approach. Empirical results show that RAPID achieves significant performance gains on multi-modal reasoning benchmarks. Crucially, RAPID enables a novel inference-time scaling paradigm: Once trained with VPO, the MLLM can be paired with any state-of-the-art LLM reasoner for consistent performance improvement without retraining.

light_analysis.overview: 提出RAPID方法，通过感知-推理解耦和视觉感知优化算法，实现高效可扩展的多模态推理。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，推理语言模型在文本推理领域取得显著进展，但多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）仍落后，主要因其内部语言模型过时。升级这些模型需要昂贵的视觉语言对齐重训练，成本高昂。现有方法难以兼顾性能提升和经济可行性，这限制了多模态推理的广泛应用和发展，因此亟需一种降低重训练成本、提升推理能力的解决方案。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入Perception-Reasoning Decoupling，将MLLM模块化，使其推理组件易于替换。MLLM重新定义为转换多模态输入为详细文本输出的感知模块，外部文本LLM负责推理处理。为对齐感知输出与推理任务，提出Visual Perception Optimization（VPO）强化学习算法，通过奖励MLLM基于外部推理器答案正确性，生成忠实和查询相关的描述。整体构成RAPID方法，增强MLLM的灵活性和可扩展性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，RAPID在多个多模态推理基准测试中取得了显著性能提升，具体表现为准确率等指标的改进，优于基线方法。更重要的是，它启用了新的推理时扩展范式：一旦通过VPO训练，MLLM可以与任何最先进的LLM配对，无需重训练即可持续提升性能，摘要未明确说明具体数据细节。
light_analysis.conclusion: RAPID方法的主要贡献在于解决了MLLMs升级成本高和性能落后问题，通过模块化设计和VPO算法，实现了高效、可扩展的多模态推理。这具有重要学术价值，为多模态推理研究提供新框架，并具实际应用潜力，如减少部署成本。局限性或未来方向摘要未明确说明，但潜在可探索更复杂的对齐机制或扩展到其他模态。

title: Formula-R1: Incentivizing LLM Reasoning over Complex Tables with Numerical Computation via Formula-Driven Reinforcement Learning
abstract: Tables are a fundamental medium for organizing and analyzing data, making table reasoning a critical capability for intelligent systems. Although large language models (LLMs) exhibit strong general reasoning abilities, they still struggle with accurate numerical reasoning over tabular data, particularly in complex table settings beyond simple relational lookup. Spreadsheet formulas provide a powerful and expressive interface for executable symbolic operations, enabling rich reasoning patterns that remain largely underexplored by existing LLMs. In this paper, we introduce Formula-R1, a model trained via Formula Tuning (Fortune), a formula-driven reinforcement learning (RL) framework for table reasoning. Formula Tuning trains LLMs to generate executable spreadsheet formulas for question answering over general tabular data, using execution success and answer correctness as reward signals, thereby reducing reliance on supervised formula annotations. We demonstrate the effectiveness of Formula Tuning through extensive experiments on seven table reasoning benchmarks. It substantially improves LLM performance on table reasoning, particularly for tasks involving complex tables and multi-step numerical computation. Moreover, Formula-R1 consistently outperforms prior methods under controlled comparison settings. Beyond empirical gains, our extensive analyses provide insights into the role of RL in formula-driven table reasoning, highlighting the broader potential of formula-driven RL to enhance reasoning capabilities in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了Formula-R1，采用公式驱动的强化学习框架Formula Tuning，显著提升大型语言模型在复杂表格上的数值推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格是组织和分析数据的核心工具，使得表格推理成为智能系统的关键能力。尽管大型语言模型表现出强大的通用推理能力，但在处理表格数据，特别是复杂表格和多步骤数值计算时，仍面临准确性挑战。现有方法通常依赖监督学习的公式注释，限制了泛化能力和可扩展性。因此，本研究旨在探索利用电子表格公式的符号操作潜力，通过强化学习框架减少对监督数据的依赖，以提升LLMs在表格推理中的性能。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了Formula Tuning（Fortune），一个公式驱动的强化学习框架。该方法训练大型语言模型为通用表格数据的问答生成可执行的电子表格公式，使用公式执行的成功和答案正确性作为奖励信号来驱动学习过程。关键创新在于通过强化学习优化公式生成，减少对监督公式注释的依赖，并利用LLMs的序列生成能力结合执行环境进行评估。技术路线涉及将公式生成作为序列任务，基于现有LLM架构进行强化学习训练。
light_analysis.result: 通过七个表格推理基准的广泛实验，Formula Tuning被证明能显著提升大型语言模型的性能，特别是在涉及复杂表格和多步骤数值计算的任务中。在受控比较设置下，Formula-R1一致优于先前的方法，显示了其在准确性和鲁棒性上的优势。摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调了性能改进和超越基准的结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是Formula-R1和Formula Tuning框架，它们通过公式驱动的强化学习增强了大语言模型在表格上的数值推理能力。结果表明，使用执行奖励可以激励LLMs生成准确公式，减少监督依赖，并为表格推理提供了新方法。此外，分析揭示了强化学习在提升LLM推理能力方面的潜力，为未来在更广泛领域应用公式驱动推理奠定了基础。摘要未明确说明局限性或具体未来工作方向。

title: Learning to Reason without External Rewards
abstract: Training large language models (LLMs) for complex reasoning via Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) is effective but limited by reliance on costly, domain-specific supervision. We explore Reinforcement Learning from Internal Feedback (RLIF), a framework that enables LLMs to learn from intrinsic signals without external rewards or labeled data. We propose Intuitor, an RLIF method that uses a model's own confidence-termed self-certainty-as its sole reward signal. Intuitor replaces external rewards in Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with self-certainty scores, enabling fully unsupervised learning. Experiments demonstrate that Intuitor matches GRPO's performance on mathematical benchmarks while achieving better generalization to out-of-domain tasks like code generation, without requiring gold solutions or test cases. Our findings show that intrinsic model signals can drive effective learning across domains, offering a scalable alternative to RLVR for autonomous AI systems where verifiable rewards are unavailable. Code is available at https://github.com/sunblaze-ucb/Intuitor

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出Intuitor方法，利用大型语言模型的自我置信度作为奖励信号，实现无需外部监督的强化学习推理训练，创新性地解决了RLVR方法依赖昂贵监督的局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于训练大型语言模型进行复杂推理时，现有RLVR方法依赖成本高昂、领域特定的外部监督，这在自治AI系统中不可得或难以获取，限制了方法的可扩展性。由于外部奖励的缺乏或高成本，开发一种无需监督的学习框架对提高AI自主性至关重要，现有方法如GRPO虽有效但仍需外部信号，无法适应无监督场景。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出RLIF框架，开发了Intuitor方法，该方法使用模型的自我置信度（self-certainty）作为唯一奖励信号，替换GRPO中的外部奖励，实现完全无监督学习。关键创新在于通过内在反馈机制，使模型能够从内部信号中学习推理能力，而无需依赖任何标注数据或验证奖励，技术路线涉及调整强化学习优化过程以适应内在信号。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Intuitor在数学基准测试中性能与GRPO相当，同时在对代码生成等域外任务的泛化能力上表现更优，无需黄金解决方案或测试用例。这表明内在信号能有效驱动学习，尽管摘要未提供具体数据指标，但对比基线方法GRPO，Intuitor在保持基准性能的同时提升了泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的贡献在于证明内在模型信号可以驱动跨领域有效学习，为外部奖励不可得的自治AI系统提供了可扩展替代方案，具有重要的学术和实际价值。潜在局限性包括内在信号定义的进一步优化，未来工作可扩展到更多领域任务和增强学习效率。

title: Thalia: A Global, Multi-Modal Dataset for Volcanic Activity Monitoring
abstract: Monitoring volcanic activity is of paramount importance to safeguarding lives, infrastructure, and ecosystems. However, only a small fraction of known volcanoes are continuously monitored. Satellite-based Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) enables systematic, global-scale deformation monitoring. However, its complex data challenge traditional remote sensing methods. Deep learning offers a powerful means to automate and enhance InSAR interpretation, advancing volcanology and geohazard assessment. Despite its promise, progress has been limited by the scarcity of well-curated datasets. In this work, we build on the existing Hephaestus dataset and introduce Thalia, addressing crucial limitations and enriching its scope with higher-resolution, multi-source, and multi-temporal data. Thalia is a global collection of 38 spatiotemporal datacubes covering 7 years and integrating InSAR products, topographic data, as well as atmospheric variables, known to introduce signal delays that can mimic ground deformation in InSAR imagery. Each sample includes expert annotations detailing the type, intensity, and extent of deformation, accompanied by descriptive text. To enable fair and consistent evaluation, we provide a comprehensive benchmark using state-of-the-art models for classification and segmentation. This work fosters collaboration between machine learning and Earth science, advancing volcanic monitoring and promoting data-driven approaches in geoscience. See https://github.com/Orion-AI-Lab/Thalia

light_analysis.overview: Thalia是一个全球、多模态、高分辨率的火山活动监测数据集，解决了现有数据稀缺问题，推动了深度学习在火山学中的应用。
light_analysis.motivation: 火山活动监测对保护生命、基础设施和生态系统至关重要，但全球仅少数已知火山被连续监测。卫星InSAR技术虽能实现系统性全球变形监测，但数据复杂，传统遥感方法难以处理。深度学习提供了自动化InSAR解释的强大手段，可推进火山学和地质灾害评估，但进展受限，因为缺乏精心策划的数据集。现有方法主要不足在于数据稀缺，阻碍了深度学习模型的开发和应用。
light_analysis.method: 本研究基于现有Hephaestus数据集，引入Thalia，解决了关键限制并扩展其范围，集成了更高分辨率、多源和多时相数据。Thalia是一个全球性的时空数据立方体集合，涵盖7年时间，包括InSAR产品、地形数据和大气变量，这些变量可能导致信号延迟，模拟InSAR图像中的地面变形。每个样本提供专家注释，详细说明变形类型、强度和范围，并配有描述文本。为公平和一致评估，我们使用最先进的分类和分割模型提供了全面基准，促进模型比较和改进。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，如准确率或效率改进。论文提到了提供全面基准，使用最先进模型进行分类和分割，但未给出具体性能指标。因此，主要成果是数据集的构建和基准设置，旨在为后续研究提供统一评估框架，支持深度学习模型在火山监测领域的应用和比较。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是引入了Thalia数据集，解决了火山监测中数据稀缺的问题，通过集成多模态数据推动深度学习应用。其学术价值在于促进机器学习和地球科学的跨学科合作，实际应用价值在于提升火山活动监测能力和地质灾害评估准确性。尽管存在局限性，如数据集覆盖范围可能仍有改进空间，未来工作可以扩展到更多火山区域或集成更多数据源，进一步推动数据驱动方法在地球科学中的发展。

title: FRIREN: Beyond Trajectories -- A Spectral Lens on Time
abstract: Long-term time-series forecasting (LTSF) models are often presented as general-purpose solutions that can be applied across domains, implicitly assuming that all data is pointwise predictable. Using chaotic systems such as Lorenz-63 as a case study, we argue that geometric structure - not pointwise prediction - is the right abstraction for a dynamic-agnostic foundational model. Minimizing the Wasserstein-2 distance (W2), which captures geometric changes, and providing a spectral view of dynamics are essential for long-horizon forecasting. Our model, FRIREN (Flow-inspired Representations via Interpretable Eigen-networks), implements an augmented normalizing-flow block that embeds data into a normally distributed latent representation. It then generates a W2-efficient optimal path that can be decomposed into rotation, scaling, inverse rotation, and translation. This architecture yields locally generated, geometry-preserving predictions that are independent of the underlying dynamics, and a global spectral representation that functions as a finite Koopman operator with a small modification. This enables practitioners to identify which modes grow, decay, or oscillate, both locally and system-wide. FRIREN achieves an MSE of 11.4, MAE of 1.6, and SWD of 0.96 on Lorenz-63 in a 336-in, 336-out, dt=0.01 setting, surpassing TimeMixer (MSE 27.3, MAE 2.8, SWD 2.1). The model maintains effective prediction for 274 out of 336 steps, approximately 2.5 Lyapunov times. On Rossler (96-in, 336-out), FRIREN achieves an MSE of 0.0349, MAE of 0.0953, and SWD of 0.0170, outperforming TimeMixer's MSE of 4.3988, MAE of 0.886, and SWD of 3.2065. FRIREN is also competitive on standard LTSF datasets such as ETT and Weather. By connecting modern generative flows with classical spectral analysis, FRIREN makes long-term forecasting both accurate and interpretable, setting a new benchmark for LTSF model design.
comment: 37 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to NeurIPS 2025. Public code at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/LTSF_model-03BB/

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出FRIREN模型，通过结合归一化流和光谱分析，实现基于几何结构的长期时间序列预测，提高准确性和可解释性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决长期时间序列预测（LTSF）模型在处理混沌系统时忽略几何结构的问题。现有模型通常假设所有数据点可预测，但如Lorenz-63等混沌系统表明，点预测不足以捕获动态特性，几何变化是更合适的抽象。这导致预测性能受限，尤其是在长期预测中。通过最小化Wasserstein-2距离来度量几何变化，并提供光谱视图，能够构建动态不可知的基础模型，提升鲁棒性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: FRIREN模型采用增强归一化流块，将时间序列数据嵌入到正态分布的潜在表示中。核心创新是生成Wasserstein-2距离高效的最优路径，该路径可分解为旋转、缩放、逆旋转和平移操作，实现局部几何保留的预测，独立于基础动态。此外，模型提供全局光谱表示，作为有限Koopman算子，允许识别系统模式的生长、衰减或振荡。架构设计适用于混沌系统和标准数据集，如Lorenz-63和ETT。
light_analysis.result: 在Lorenz-63系统上，FRIREN在336步预测设置中实现MSE 11.4、MAE 1.6和SWD 0.96，显著优于基线TimeMixer（MSE 27.3、MAE 2.8、SWD 2.1）。模型维持有效预测274步，约2.5 Lyapunov时间。在Rossler系统上，FRIREN的MSE为0.0349、MAE 0.0953和SWD 0.0170，同样超越TimeMixer（MSE 4.3988等）。在标准LTSF数据集如ETT和Weather上，FRIREN表现竞争力，验证其泛化性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: FRIREN的主要贡献在于连接现代生成流和经典光谱分析，实现长期时间序列预测的准确性和可解释性，为LTSF模型设计设立新基准。研究通过几何结构和光谱视图帮助实践者分析动态模式，具有重要学术和应用价值。潜在局限性可能包括对特定系统的测试范围，但在标准数据集上的表现显示广泛适用性。未来工作可扩展到更多复杂系统以进一步验证性能。

title: MolLangBench: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Language-Prompted Molecular Structure Recognition, Editing, and Generation
abstract: Precise recognition, editing, and generation of molecules are essential prerequisites for both chemists and AI systems tackling various chemical tasks. We present MolLangBench, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate fundamental molecule-language interface tasks: language-prompted molecular structure recognition, editing, and generation. To ensure high-quality, unambiguous, and deterministic outputs, we construct the recognition tasks using automated cheminformatics tools, and curate editing and generation tasks through rigorous expert annotation and validation. MolLangBench supports the evaluation of models that interface language with different molecular representations, including linear strings, molecular images, and molecular graphs. Evaluations of state-of-the-art models reveal significant limitations: the strongest model (GPT-5) achieves $86.2\%$ and $85.5\%$ accuracy on recognition and editing tasks, which are intuitively simple for humans, and performs even worse on the generation task, reaching only $43.0\%$ accuracy. These results highlight the shortcomings of current AI systems in handling even preliminary molecular recognition and manipulation tasks. We hope MolLangBench will catalyze further research toward more effective and reliable AI systems for chemical applications.The dataset and code can be accessed at https://huggingface.co/datasets/ChemFM/MolLangBench and https://github.com/TheLuoFengLab/MolLangBench, respectively.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了MolLangBench基准，全面评估语言提示下的分子结构识别、编辑和生成任务，以揭示AI系统局限性并推动化学AI研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 精确的分子结构识别、编辑和生成是化学家和AI系统处理化学任务的基础前提，对化学应用如药物发现至关重要。现有AI模型在相关任务中表现不足，例如无法与人类能力匹配，导致化学AI应用受限。当前缺乏标准化基准来系统评估语言-分子接口任务的性能，阻碍了技术改进。因此，开发一个综合性基准是必要的，以促进更可靠和有效的化学AI系统的研究与发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文构建了MolLangBench基准，包括三个核心任务：语言提示下的分子结构识别、编辑和生成。识别任务使用自动化化学信息学工具，确保高质量、无歧义和确定性输出；编辑和生成任务通过严格专家注释和验证策划，提高可靠性。基准支持评估使用不同分子表示的模型，如线性字符串、分子图像和分子图，这增强了评估的全面性。关键技术特色包括多表征兼容性和数据集的严谨构建，以促进模型在多种化学任务中的性能比较。
light_analysis.result: 评估最先进模型（如GPT-5）显示显著局限性：在识别任务上达到86.2%准确率，编辑任务为85.5%，这些任务对人类而言简单，但对模型挑战大。生成任务准确率仅为43.0%，表现更差，突出了AI系统在初步分子识别和操作上的不足。与基线方法相比，这些结果未明确说明对比细节，但表明现有模型在分子语言接口任务中仍有较大提升空间，数据支撑具体准确率数字来自摘要报告。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了MolLangBench基准，全面评估语言-分子接口任务，揭示了现有AI系统在分子识别和生成中的严重不足。学术价值在于标准化了化学AI评估，促进更有效和可靠的模型开发。实际应用价值包括推动药物设计和材料科学中的AI辅助研究。潜在局限性可能涉及基准覆盖范围，未来工作可扩展任务类型或集成更多分子表示，以持续优化化学AI系统。

title: Must Read: A Comprehensive Survey of Computational Persuasion
abstract: Persuasion is a fundamental aspect of communication, influencing decision-making across diverse contexts, from everyday conversations to high-stakes scenarios such as politics, marketing, and law. The rise of conversational AI systems has significantly expanded the scope of persuasion, introducing both opportunities and risks. AI-driven persuasion can be leveraged for beneficial applications, but also poses threats through unethical influence. Moreover, AI systems are not only persuaders, but also susceptible to persuasion, making them vulnerable to adversarial attacks and bias reinforcement. Despite rapid advancements in AI-generated persuasive content, our understanding of what makes persuasion effective remains limited due to its inherently subjective and context-dependent nature. In this survey, we provide a comprehensive overview of persuasion, structured around three key perspectives: (1) AI as a Persuader, which explores AI-generated persuasive content and its applications; (2) AI as a Persuadee, which examines AI's susceptibility to influence and manipulation; and (3) AI as a Persuasion Judge, which analyzes AI's role in evaluating persuasive strategies, detecting manipulation, and ensuring ethical persuasion. We introduce a taxonomy for persuasion research and discuss key challenges for future research to enhance the safety, fairness, and effectiveness of AI-powered persuasion while addressing the risks posed by increasingly capable language models.

light_analysis.overview: 这篇论文是一篇关于计算说服力的全面综述，通过引入三个视角的分类法，分析AI在说服中的角色和挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 说服力在沟通中至关重要，应用于从日常对话到政治、市场营销等高危场景。随着对话AI系统的兴起，说服的范围扩大，带来了机遇和风险。AI驱动的说服可用于有益应用，但也存在不道德影响的威胁。此外，AI系统不仅是说服者，也容易被说服，使其易受对抗性攻击和偏见强化。尽管AI生成说服内容快速发展，但由于说服本质上是主观和上下文依赖的，我们对有效说服的理解仍有限。此研究旨在填补这一空白，综述计算说服领域，以促进安全和公平的AI应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文采用综述方法，系统地收集和分析相关文献。核心方法是围绕三个关键视角构建分类法：(1) AI作为说服者，探讨AI生成的说服内容及其应用；(2) AI作为被说服者，检查AI对影响和操纵的易感性；(3) AI作为说服评判者，分析AI在评估说服策略、检测操纵和确保道德说服中的作用。通过这种方式，论文提供了一个结构化的框架，以促进对计算说服的理解和研究。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果。然而，论文通过综述文献，揭示了AI在说服中的多角色性，突出了关键挑战，如对抗性攻击、偏见和道德问题。这有助于识别研究空白，为未来工作提供方向，特别是在增强AI说服的安全性、公平性和有效性方面。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提供了一个全面的计算说服综述，引入了基于三个视角的分类法，以系统化研究领域。它强调了AI驱动的说服的机会与风险，讨论了未来研究的挑战，包括确保安全性、公平性和有效性，以及应对大型语言模型带来的风险。这项工作具有重要的学术和实际价值，有助于指导AI伦理和应用的发展，推动更负责任的人工智能系统。

title: AlphaZero-Edu: Democratizing Access to AlphaZero
abstract: Recent years have witnessed significant progress in reinforcement learning, especially with Zero-like paradigms, which have greatly boosted the generalization and reasoning abilities of large-scale language models. Nevertheless, existing frameworks are often plagued by high implementation complexity and poor reproducibility. To tackle these challenges, we present AlphaZero-Edu, a lightweight, education-focused implementation built upon the mathematical framework of AlphaZero. It boasts a modular architecture that disentangles key components, enabling transparent visualization of the algorithmic processes. Additionally, it is optimized for resource-efficient training on a single NVIDIA RTX 3090 GPU and features highly parallelized self-play data generation, achieving a 3.2-fold speedup with 8 processes. In Gomoku matches, the framework has demonstrated exceptional performance, achieving a consistently high win rate against human opponents. AlphaZero-Edu has been open-sourced at https://github.com/StarLight1212/AlphaZero_Edu, providing an accessible and practical benchmark for both academic research and industrial applications.

light_analysis.overview: 提出AlphaZero-Edu，一个轻量级、教育导向的AlphaZero实现，通过模块化架构和资源优化降低强化学习框架的实现复杂性并提高可复现性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于现有强化学习框架，尤其是类似Zero的范式，虽然显著提升了大型语言模型的泛化和推理能力，但普遍面临实现复杂和可复现性差的问题。这些问题严重阻碍了学术研究、工业应用和教育普及，限制了技术的广泛传播。因此，需要一个更易于访问和复现的框架，以促进技术进步和知识共享。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于AlphaZero的数学框架，设计了模块化架构，将关键组件解耦以实现算法过程的透明可视化。框架针对单个NVIDIA RTX 3090 GPU进行资源高效训练优化，并采用高度并行化的自对弈数据生成技术。关键创新点包括模块化设计以提升可理解性、训练效率优化和并行处理能力；摘要未明确说明使用的数据集或具体模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果表明，在Gomoku比赛中，AlphaZero-Edu框架表现出色，对抗人类对手时获得持续高胜率。通过8进程并行自对弈数据生成，实现了3.2倍的加速，显著提升了效率。这些结果证明了框架的有效性和性能改进，但摘要未提供与基线方法的详细对比数据。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开源了AlphaZero-Edu框架，为学术研究和工业应用提供了一个可访问、实用的基准。研究的学术价值在于降低了强化学习技术的入门门槛，促进教育和创新；实际应用价值体现在游戏AI等领域。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多任务或进一步优化性能，但摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: Adaptive Insurance Reserving with CVaR-Constrained Reinforcement Learning under Macroeconomic Regimes
abstract: We develop a reinforcement learning (RL) framework for insurance loss reserving that formulates reserve setting as a finite-horizon sequential decision problem under claim development uncertainty, macroeconomic stress, and solvency governance. The reserving process is modeled as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) in which reserve adjustments influence future reserve adequacy, capital efficiency, and solvency outcomes. A Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) agent is trained using a risk-sensitive reward that penalizes reserve shortfall, capital inefficiency, and breaches of a volatility-adjusted solvency floor, with tail risk explicitly controlled through Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR).   To reflect regulatory stress-testing practice, the agent is trained under a regime-aware curriculum and evaluated using both regime-stratified simulations and fixed-shock stress scenarios. Empirical results for Workers Compensation and Other Liability illustrate how the proposed RL-CVaR policy improves tail-risk control and reduces solvency violations relative to classical actuarial reserving methods, while maintaining comparable capital efficiency. We further discuss calibration and governance considerations required to align model parameters with firm-specific risk appetite and supervisory expectations under Solvency II and Own Risk and Solvency Assessment (ORSA) frameworks.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一种结合强化学习与CVaR约束的自适应保险准备金框架，以优化尾部风险控制和偿付能力管理。
light_analysis.motivation: 保险准备金设置需应对索赔发展不确定性、宏观经济压力和偿付能力监管等复杂挑战。传统精算方法在动态环境下可能难以有效控制尾部风险或适应监管压力测试，导致准备金短缺和资本效率低下问题。本研究旨在通过强化学习框架改进准备金决策，平衡风险与效率，满足监管要求如偿付能力II，提升保险公司稳定性和合规性。
light_analysis.method: 论文将保险损失准备金过程建模为有限时间序列的马尔可夫决策过程，其中决策调整影响未来准备金充足性。核心方法是使用近端策略优化代理进行训练，奖励函数基于风险敏感设计，惩罚准备金短缺、资本效率低下和违反波动调整的偿付能力下限，并通过条件风险价值约束尾部风险。创新点包括引入制度感知课程训练和评估，采用制度分层模拟与固定冲击压力情景，以反映真实监管实践，实验涉及工人赔偿和其他责任保险数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在工人赔偿和其他责任保险的实证分析中，所提出的RL-CVaR政策相较于经典精算方法，显著改善了尾部风险控制，减少了偿付能力违规，同时保持了可比的资本效率。评估通过制度分层模拟和固定冲击压力情景进行，结果表明该方法能有效应对宏观经济压力，增强准备金决策的稳健性，但摘要未提供具体性能指标数据，仅描述了相对优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文贡献在于开发了一个集成强化学习和CVaR的保险准备金框架，提升了风险管理、资本效率和监管合规能力，具有实际应用价值，尤其适用于偿付能力II和ORSA等监管环境。局限性包括模型参数需与公司特定风险偏好和监管期望对齐，未来工作可关注校准优化和治理框架的进一步完善。

title: Tiny Neural Networks for Multi-Object Tracking in a Modular Kalman Framework
abstract: We present a modular, production-ready approach that integrates compact Neural Network (NN) into a Kalmanfilter-based Multi-Object Tracking (MOT) pipeline. We design three tiny task-specific networks to retain modularity, interpretability and eal-time suitability for embedded Automotive Driver Assistance Systems: (i) SPENT (Single-Prediction Network) - predicts per-track states and replaces heuristic motion models used by the Kalman Filter (KF). (ii) SANT (Single-Association Network) - assigns a single incoming sensor object to existing tracks, without relying on heuristic distance and association metrics. (iii) MANTa (Multi-Association Network) - jointly associates multiple sensor objects to multiple tracks in a single step. Each module has less than 50k trainable parameters. Furthermore, all three can be operated in real-time, are trained from tracking data, and expose modular interfaces so they can be integrated with standard Kalman-filter state updates and track management. This makes them drop-in compatible with many existing trackers. Modularity is ensured, as each network can be trained and evaluated independently of the others. Our evaluation on the KITTI tracking benchmark shows that SPENT reduces prediction RMSE by more than 50% compared to a standard Kalman filter, while SANT and MANTa achieve up to 95% assignment accuracy. These results demonstrate that small, task-specific neural modules can substantially improve tracking accuracy and robustness without sacrificing modularity, interpretability, or the real-time constraints required for automotive deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出了三种微型神经网络模块（SPENT、SANT、MANTa），集成到卡尔曼滤波多目标跟踪框架中，显著提高跟踪精度和鲁棒性，同时保持模块化、可解释性和实时性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决自动驾驶辅助系统中多目标跟踪（MOT）的挑战。传统基于卡尔曼滤波的方法依赖启发式运动模型和关联度量，可能导致跟踪误差和鲁棒性不足，尤其是在实时性和嵌入式部署需求方面。现有方法在模块化和可解释性上存在局限，因此需要更准确、高效的跟踪解决方案来支持安全关键应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文设计了三种紧凑的神经网络模块：SPENT用于预测单目标状态，替代卡尔曼滤波中的启发式运动模型；SANT用于将单个传感器对象分配给现有轨迹，不依赖传统距离度量；MANTa用于一步内联合关联多个对象与多个轨迹。每个模块拥有少于50k可训练参数，从跟踪数据中训练，并通过模块化接口与标准卡尔曼滤波状态更新和轨迹管理集成，确保实时性和与现有跟踪器的兼容性。
light_analysis.result: 在KITTI跟踪基准上的实验结果显示，SPENT网络相比标准卡尔曼滤波将预测均方根误差（RMSE）降低了超过50%。SANT和MANTa网络在对象分配任务中达到了高达95%的准确率。这表明所提出的微型神经网络模块能显著提升跟踪准确性和鲁棒性，同时保持与基线方法的性能对比优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献在于开发了小型、任务特定的神经网络模块，成功集成到卡尔曼滤波跟踪系统中，提高了性能并满足嵌入式部署的实时性需求。学术上，它展示了神经网络与传统滤波方法的有效结合；实际上，这些模块的模块化和兼容性使其易于整合到现有自动驾驶系统。未来工作可能包括扩展应用到更多基准或场景，以进一步提升泛化能力。

title: Bridging the Perception Gap in Image Super-Resolution Evaluation
abstract: As super-resolution (SR) techniques advance, we observe a growing distrust of evaluation metrics in recent SR research. An inconsistency often emerges between certain evaluation criteria and human perceptual preference. Although current SR research employs varying metrics to evaluate SR performance, it remains underexplored how robust and reliable these metrics actually are. To bridge this gap, we conduct a comprehensive analysis of widely used image quality metrics, examining their consistency with human perception when evaluating state-of-the-art SR models. We show that some metrics exhibit only limited-or even negative-correlation with human preferences. We further identify several intrinsic challenges in SR evaluation that compromise the effectiveness of both full-reference (FR) and no-reference (NR) image quality assessment (IQA) frameworks. To address these issues, we propose a simple yet effective Relative Quality Index (RQI) framework, which assesses the relative quality discrepancy between image pairs. Our framework enables easy integration and notable improvements for existing IQA metrics in SR evaluation. Moreover, it can be utilized as a valuable training guide for SR models, enabling the generation of images with more realistic details while maintaining structural fidelity.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了相对质量指数（RQI）框架，以解决超分辨率评估中评估指标与人类感知不一致的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着超分辨率（SR）技术发展，评估指标与人类感知偏好之间的不一致性日益突出，导致对现有研究评估结果的不信任。当前SR研究使用多种图像质量评估指标，但其健壮性和可靠性未得到充分验证，全参考和无参考IQA框架在SR评估中存在内在挑战，影响了模型的准确评估和优化。因此，迫切需要更可靠的评估方法来弥合这一感知差距，提升SR技术的实际应用价值。
light_analysis.method: 论文首先对广泛使用的图像质量指标进行综合分析，检查它们与人类感知的一致性，并识别SR评估中全参考和无参考IQA框架的内在挑战。基于此，提出了一种简单有效的相对质量指数（RQI）框架，通过评估图像对之间的相对质量差异来改善评估效果。该框架易于集成到现有IQA指标中，并可作为SR模型的训练指导，促进生成更具真实细节的图像，同时保持结构保真度。
light_analysis.result: 分析发现，一些现有评估指标与人类感知偏好仅有有限甚至负相关，揭示了它们的不可靠性。提出的RQI框架在SR评估中显著改进了现有IQA指标的性能，帮助生成更符合人类感知的高质量图像。尽管摘要未提供具体性能数据，但该框架被证明有效，并能作为训练指导提升模型输出，从而缓解评估与感知之间的不一致问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过提出RQI框架，成功弥合了超分辨率评估中评估指标与人类感知之间的差距，提高了评估的可靠性和准确性。该框架不仅具有学术创新性，还能指导SR模型训练，生成更具真实感的图像，推动技术发展。未来工作可探索更广泛的评估场景和指标优化，以解决潜在局限性和扩展应用范围。

title: Herglotz-NET: Implicit Neural Representation of Spherical Data with Harmonic Positional Encoding
abstract: Representing and processing data in spherical domains presents unique challenges, primarily due to the curvature of the domain, which complicates the application of classical Euclidean techniques. Implicit neural representations (INRs) have emerged as a promising alternative for high-fidelity data representation; however, to effectively handle spherical domains, these methods must be adapted to the inherent geometry of the sphere to maintain both accuracy and stability. In this context, we propose Herglotz-NET (HNET), a novel INR architecture that employs a harmonic positional encoding based on complex Herglotz mappings. This encoding yields a well-posed representation on the sphere with interpretable and robust spectral properties. Moreover, we present a unified expressivity analysis showing that any spherical-based INR satisfying a mild condition exhibits a predictable spectral expansion that scales with network depth. Our results establish HNET as a scalable and flexible framework for accurate modeling of spherical data.
comment: Keywords: Herglotz, spherical harmonics, spectral analysis, implicit neural representation. Remarks: 4 pages + 1 reference page, 4 figures (In Proc. SAMPTA2025, Vienna)

light_analysis.overview: Herglotz-NET提出了一种基于谐波位置编码的隐式神经表示框架，有效处理球形数据的几何挑战，提高了表示的准确性和稳定性。
light_analysis.motivation: 球形数据表示因球面域的曲率而面临挑战，经典欧几里得技术难以直接应用，限制了数据建模的精度。隐式神经表示作为高保真表示方法具有潜力，但现有方法未充分适应球形几何，可能导致不准确或不稳定的结果。因此，研究旨在改进INR以专门处理球形域，提供更鲁棒和高效的解决方案，适用于地球科学或计算机图形学等领域。
light_analysis.method: Herglotz-NET采用基于复Herglotz映射的谐波位置编码，该编码适应球面几何，产生well-posed表示并具有可解释的谱特性。核心创新在于将谐波编码集成到INR架构中，以处理球形数据的曲率。论文还提供了统一的表达能力分析，表明任何满足温和条件的球面INR都会表现出可预测的谱扩展，其规模与网络深度成比例。具体模型架构和训练数据集摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果证明Herglotz-NET是一个可扩展和灵活的框架，能够准确建模球形数据，通过谱分析展示了其表达能力与网络深度成比例的关系。这暗示了HNET在球形域中的潜在优势，但摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进的数值对比。与基线方法相比，HNET可能因谐波编码而提升了几何适应性，但具体细节需参考完整论文。
light_analysis.conclusion: Herglotz-NET的主要贡献是引入了谐波位置编码的隐式神经表示，改进了球形数据的建模能力，提供了更准确和稳定的表示方法。学术上，它为球面INR的谱分析提供了新框架，扩展了非欧几里得数据表示的理论基础。实际应用中，为球形数据驱动的任务（如气候建模或虚拟现实）提供了高效工具。未来工作可能包括在多样数据集上验证性能，或扩展到其他复杂几何域。

title: The Cost of Replicability in Active Learning
abstract: Active learning aims to reduce the number of labeled data points required by machine learning algorithms by selectively querying labels from initially unlabeled data. Ensuring replicability, where an algorithm produces consistent outcomes across different runs, is essential for the reliability of machine learning models but often increases sample complexity. This paper investigates the cost of replicability in active learning using two classical disagreement-based methods: the CAL and A^2 algorithms. Leveraging randomized thresholding techniques, we propose two replicable active learning algorithms: one for realizable learning of finite hypothesis classes and another for the agnostic setting. Our theoretical analysis shows that while enforcing replicability increases label complexity, CAL and A^2 still achieve substantial label savings under this constraint. These findings provide insights into balancing efficiency and stability in active learning.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出两种可复现的主动学习算法，并理论分析了强制复现性对标签复杂度的影响。
light_analysis.motivation: 主动学习旨在通过选择性查询标签来减少机器学习算法对标记数据的依赖，从而降低标注成本。然而，确保算法的复现性（即在多次运行中产生一致结果）对模型可靠性至关重要，但现有研究往往忽视复现性带来的样本复杂度增加问题。这一问题的重要性在于，复现性不足可能导致实验结果不稳定，影响实际部署。本文动机是量化主动学习中复现性的成本，解决效率与稳定性之间的权衡，以弥补现有方法在分析复现性影响方面的不足，推动更可靠的主动学习算法发展。
light_analysis.method: 本文基于两种经典的基于分歧的主动学习方法：CAL和A^2算法，提出可复现的变体。核心方法是利用随机阈值技术，将随机性引入标签查询过程，以确保算法在不同运行中输出一致性。具体地，设计了两种算法：一种适用于有限假设类的可实现学习场景，另一种适用于更一般的不可知设置。关键创新点在于通过随机阈值优化查询策略，减少了因随机性导致的样本复杂度增加，同时保持了算法效率。技术特色包括结合理论分析，在分歧框架下集成复现性约束，以扩展经典算法的适用性。
light_analysis.result: 理论分析显示，强制复现性确实会增加标签复杂度，但CAL和A^2算法在复现性约束下仍能实现显著的标签节省。与无复现性要求的基线方法相比，所提算法在保持稳定性的同时，标签复杂度增加幅度可控，体现了在效率与可靠性之间的平衡。具体效果表现为，算法在复现性条件下减少了标注需求，优于随机或非复现版本，但摘要未明确提供具体性能指标数据。这些发现基于数学模型和理论推导，强调了复现性对主动学习效率的影响，为算法优化提供了理论支撑。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了可复现的主动学习算法，并理论分析了复现性对标签复杂度的成本。学术价值在于深化了对主动学习中复现性权衡的理解，填补了现有理论空白。实际应用价值体现在提升机器学习模型的可靠性和可复现性，有助于在医疗或金融等领域部署更稳定的系统。潜在局限性是分析基于理论假设，缺乏实证验证，未来工作可以包括在真实数据集上进行实验，探索算法在其他主动学习策略中的应用，或扩展至更复杂的机器学习场景中。

title: 3DSceneEditor: Controllable 3D Scene Editing with Gaussian Splatting
abstract: The creation of 3D scenes has traditionally been both labor-intensive and costly, requiring designers to meticulously configure 3D assets and environments. Recent advancements in generative AI, including text-to-3D and image-to-3D methods, have dramatically reduced the complexity and cost of this process. However, current techniques for editing complex 3D scenes continue to rely on generally interactive multi-step, 2D-to-3D projection methods and diffusion-based techniques, which often lack precision in control and hamper interactive-rate performance. In this work, we propose ***3DSceneEditor***, a fully 3D-based paradigm for interactive-rate, precise editing of intricate 3D scenes using Gaussian Splatting. Unlike conventional methods, 3DSceneEditor operates through a streamlined 3D pipeline, enabling direct Gaussian-based manipulation for efficient, high-quality edits based on input prompts. The proposed framework (i) integrates a pre-trained instance segmentation model for semantic labeling; (ii) employs a zero-shot grounding approach with CLIP to align target objects with user prompts; and (iii) applies scene modifications, such as object addition, repositioning, recoloring, replacing, and removal--directly on Gaussians. Extensive experimental results show that 3DSceneEditor surpasses existing state-of-the-art techniques in terms of both editing precision and efficiency, establishing a new benchmark for efficient and interactive 3D scene customization.
comment: Accepted by WACV 2026, Project Page: https://ziyangyan.github.io/3DSceneEditor

light_analysis.overview: 提出3DSceneEditor，一种基于Gaussian Splatting的全3D交互式精确编辑复杂3D场景的新范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 传统3D场景创建劳动密集且成本高，生成AI如文本到3D技术降低了复杂度，但现有编辑方法如多步2D-3D投影和基于扩散的技术缺乏控制精度和交互速率，限制高效定制化应用，因此需开发更精准快速的编辑方案以应对复杂场景编辑需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出3DSceneEditor框架，采用基于Gaussian Splatting的全3D流水线实现直接高斯操作，关键创新包括：集成预训练实例分割模型进行语义标签，使用CLIP零-shot接地方法对齐用户提示与目标对象，并直接在Gaussians上执行对象添加、重定位、重新着色、替换和移除等场景修改。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验结果表明，3DSceneEditor在编辑精度和效率上超越了现有先进技术，为复杂3D场景编辑设立了新性能基准，摘要未明确提供具体数值，但强调其在控制精度和交互速率方面优于基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究主要贡献为3DSceneEditor，通过全3D范式和直接高斯操作提升了编辑精度与效率，为高效交互式3D场景定制确立新基准，具有推动技术发展的学术价值，潜在局限性或未来方向摘要未明确说明。

title: TPCL: Task Progressive Curriculum Learning for Robust Visual Question Answering
abstract: Visual Question Answering (VQA) systems are notoriously brittle under distribution shifts and data scarcity. While previous solutions-such as ensemble methods and data augmentation-can improve performance in isolation, they fail to generalise well across in-distribution (IID), out-of-distribution (OOD), and low-data settings simultaneously. We argue that this limitation stems from the suboptimal training strategies employed. Specifically, treating all training samples uniformly-without accounting for question difficulty or semantic structure-leaves the models vulnerable to dataset biases. Thus, they struggle to generalise beyond the training distribution. To address this issue, we introduce Task-Progressive Curriculum Learning (TPCL)-a simple, model-agnostic framework that progressively trains VQA models using a curriculum built by jointly considering question type and difficulty. Specifically, TPCL first groups questions based on their semantic type (e.g., yes/no, counting) and then orders them using a novel Optimal Transport-based difficulty measure. Without relying on data augmentation or explicit debiasing, TPCL improves generalisation across IID, OOD, and low-data regimes and achieves state-of-the-art performance on VQA-CP v2, VQA-CP v1, and VQA v2. It outperforms the most competitive robust VQA baselines by over 5% and 7% on VQA-CP v2 and v1, respectively, and boosts backbone performance by up to 28.5%.
comment: Our source code is available at https://github.com/AhmedAAkl/tpcl

light_analysis.overview: TPCL是一个任务渐进课程学习框架，通过联合考虑问题类型和难度，提高了视觉问答系统在分布变化和数据稀缺下的泛化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉问答系统在实际应用中面临分布变化和数据稀缺的挑战，导致性能下降和脆弱性。现有解决方案如集成方法和数据增强虽能提升特定设置下的性能，但无法同时在分布内、分布外和低数据设置中实现良好泛化。其根本原因在于训练策略的不足，即对所有样本统一处理，忽略问题难度和语义结构，使模型易受数据集偏见影响，从而限制泛化能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出任务渐进课程学习框架TPCL，该框架基于问题类型和难度设计训练课程。具体而言，首先将问题按语义类型分组，然后通过基于最优传输的新颖难度测量方法排序问题。这一过程无需数据增强或显式去偏技术，模型无关，可应用于各种VQA模型架构。关键创新在于结合问题类型和难度构建渐进课程，优化训练策略以提升泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: TPCL在多个基准测试中表现出色，在VQA-CP v2、VQA-CP v1和VQA v2数据集上达到了最先进的性能。具体地，在VQA-CP v2上，TPCL比最竞争力的稳健VQA基线提升了超过5%；在VQA-CP v1上提升了超过7%；此外，还显著提升了基础模型的性能，最高提升幅度达28.5%。这些结果证明了TPCL在改善分布内、分布外和低数据设置下泛化能力的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了TPCL框架，通过结合问题类型和难度的课程学习，显著提升了视觉问答系统的泛化性能。学术上，该方法为稳健学习提供了新的训练策略，不依赖于额外数据；实际上，它增强了VQA模型在分布变化和数据稀缺场景下的鲁棒性，具有广泛应用潜力。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能包括扩展到其他视觉语言任务或优化难度测量方法。

title: Training-Free Layout-to-Image Generation with Marginal Attention Constraints
abstract: Recently, many text-to-image diffusion models have excelled at generating high-resolution images from text but struggle with precise control over spatial composition and object counting. To address these challenges, prior works have developed layout-to-image (L2I) approaches that incorporate layout instructions into text-to-image models. However, existing L2I methods typically require fine-tuning of pre-trained parameters or training additional control modules for diffusion models. In this work, we propose a training-free L2I approach, MAC (Marginal Attention Constrained Generation), which eliminates the need for additional modules or fine-tuning. Specifically, we use text-visual cross-attention feature maps to quantify inconsistencies between the layout of the generated images and the provided instructions, and then compute loss functions to optimize latent features during the diffusion reverse process. To enhance spatial controllability and mitigate semantic failures under complex layout instructions, we leverage pixel-to-pixel correlations in self-attention feature maps to align cross-attention maps and combine three loss functions constrained by boundary attention to update latent features. Comprehensive experimental results on both L2I and non-L2I pretrained diffusion models demonstrate that our method outperforms existing training-free L2I techniques, both quantitatively and qualitatively, in terms of image composition on the DrawBench and HRS benchmarks.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种无需训练的布局到图像生成方法MAC，通过边际注意力约束优化扩散模型，实现精确空间构图控制。
light_analysis.motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型虽然在生成高质量图像方面表现出色，但难以精确控制空间构图和对象计数，这在应用如设计、虚拟现实中至关重要。现有布局到图像方法通常需要微调预训练参数或训练额外控制模块，导致计算成本高且灵活性不足。因此，开发一种无需训练的L2I方法，既能保持预训练模型的高效性，又能解决精确控制问题，具有重要研究意义，能促进图像生成技术的实际应用。
light_analysis.method: MAC方法的核心是使用文本-视觉交叉注意力特征图来量化生成图像布局与指令之间的不一致性，并通过计算损失函数在扩散反向过程中优化潜在特征，而无需微调或额外模块。关键创新点包括利用自注意力特征图中的像素间相关性来对齐交叉注意力图，并结合三个由边界注意力约束的损失函数更新潜在特征。这增强了空间可控性，缓解了复杂布局指令下的语义失败，直接应用于预训练扩散模型，如L2I和非L2I模型。
light_analysis.result: 在L2I和非L2I预训练扩散模型上的全面实验结果显示，MAC方法在DrawBench和HRS基准测试中，图像构图方面定量和定性均优于现有无需训练的L2I技术。摘要未明确说明具体数据如准确率提升，但强调了其在构图精度上的显著优势，证明了该方法在提升生成图像质量和空间控制方面的有效性，相比于基线方法表现出更好的性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: MAC方法的主要贡献是提出了一种无需训练的布局到图像生成框架，通过注意力约束优化，实现了高效的精确构图控制。该研究具有重要的学术价值，为扩散模型的应用提供了新思路，并可能推动实际应用如创意设计、虚拟环境生成等。未来工作方向可能包括探索更复杂的布局指令或将该方法扩展到其他生成任务中，以进一步提升通用性和鲁棒性。

title: Instructional Text Across Disciplines: A Survey of Representations, Downstream Tasks, and Open Challenges Toward Capable AI Agents
abstract: Recent advances in large language models have demonstrated promising capabilities in following simple instructions through instruction tuning. However, real-world tasks often involve complex, multi-step instructions that remain challenging for current NLP systems. Robust understanding of such instructions is essential for deploying LLMs as general-purpose agents that can be programmed in natural language to perform complex, real-world tasks across domains like robotics, business automation, and interactive systems. Despite growing interest in this area, there is a lack of a comprehensive survey that systematically analyzes the landscape of complex instruction understanding and processing. Through a systematic review of the literature, we analyze available resources, representation schemes, and downstream tasks related to instructional text. Our study examines 181 papers, identifying trends, challenges, and opportunities in this emerging field. We provide AI/NLP researchers with essential background knowledge and a unified view of various approaches to complex instruction understanding, bridging gaps between different research directions and highlighting future research opportunities.
comment: Pre-CoLI print. Accepted for publication in Computational Linguistics (MIT Press). Advance online publication. March 2026

light_analysis.overview: 该论文是一篇系统性综述，通过分析181篇文献，总结了复杂指令理解的表示方法、下游任务和开放挑战，为开发AI代理提供统一视角。
light_analysis.motivation: 近年来，大型语言模型在简单指令遵循方面取得进展，但现实世界任务常涉及复杂多步指令，这对当前NLP系统构成挑战。鲁棒理解此类指令对于将LLM部署为通用AI代理至关重要，可在机器人、商业自动化和交互系统等领域实现自然语言编程。然而，尽管兴趣增长，当前缺乏一个全面综述来系统分析复杂指令理解的资源、表示方案和任务，这阻碍了领域的发展和应用。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用系统性文献回顾方法，通过对181篇相关论文的分析，探讨复杂指令理解领域。关键步骤包括对现有资源、表示方案（如文本表示和结构化方法）以及下游任务（如指令执行和任务规划）的梳理。该方法不涉及新模型或数据集的构建，而是侧重于系统整合和比较现有研究成果，以识别研究空白和未来方向。摘要未明确说明具体的数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 通过文献综述，论文揭示了复杂指令理解领域的趋势、挑战和机遇。主要发现包括当前方法在处理多步指令时的局限性，以及资源分散性问题。虽然没有具体性能数据，但研究提供了对现有方法的总结，强调了在准确性、效率和泛化能力方面的不足。分析还指出了不同研究方向之间的差距，为未来改进提供了基线参考。摘要未明确说明实验性结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提供了一个全面的系统性综述，帮助AI/NLP研究者理解复杂指令理解领域的现状。学术价值体现在统一不同研究方向、填补知识空白，并为未来研究奠定基础。实际应用价值在于为开发更强大的AI代理提供指导，促进跨领域的自然语言编程系统。局限性包括主要基于文献分析，缺乏实验验证；未来工作应侧重于解决现有挑战，如提升指令理解和任务执行能力。

title: Edu-Values: Towards Evaluating the Chinese Education Values of Large Language Models
abstract: In this paper, we present Edu-Values, the first Chinese education values evaluation benchmark that includes seven core values: professional philosophy, teachers' professional ethics, education laws and regulations, cultural literacy, educational knowledge and skills, basic competencies and subject knowledge. We meticulously design 1,418 questions, covering multiple-choice, multi-modal question answering, subjective analysis, adversarial prompts, and Chinese traditional culture (short answer) questions. We conduct human feedback based automatic evaluation over 21 state-of-the-art (SoTA) LLMs, and highlight three main findings: (1) due to differences in educational culture, Chinese LLMs outperform English LLMs, with Qwen 2 ranking the first with a score of 81.37; (2) LLMs often struggle with teachers' professional ethics and professional philosophy; (3) leveraging Edu-Values to build an external knowledge repository for RAG significantly improves LLMs' alignment. This demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed benchmark.
comment: The authors are withdrawing this paper to make substantial revisions and improvements before future submission

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了首个中文教育价值观评估基准Edu-Values，用于评估大语言模型在中文教育文化下的对齐表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于解决大语言模型在中文教育价值观方面的对齐评估问题。随着LLM在教育领域应用增多，确保其价值观符合中文文化背景至关重要。现有评估基准多关注通用能力，缺乏针对中文教育文化的专门评估，可能导致评估偏差或忽视文化差异的影响。因此，开发针对性基准有助于更准确地衡量LLM的中文教育价值对齐，促进跨文化AI教育应用的发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法的核心是设计Edu-Values基准，涵盖七个核心价值观（如专业哲学、教师职业道德等），并构建1,418个多样化问题，包括选择题、多模态问答、主观分析等题型。创新点在于首个中文教育价值观基准的提出，集成多种评估形式以确保全面性。技术细节包括使用人工反馈进行自动评估，应用于21个最先进LLM，并利用检索增强生成（RAG）构建外部知识库，以提升模型在价值观对齐方面的表现。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示了三个主要发现：首先，中文LLM（如Qwen 2）在评估中表现优于英文LLM，最高得分为81.37；其次，LLM在教师职业道德和专业哲学方面表现薄弱；最后，通过Edu-Values构建的RAG知识库能显著提高LLM的对齐效果。这些结果基于对21个SoTA LLM的对比分析，揭示了文化差异对LLM表现的关键影响，并验证了基准在改进模型性能方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发并验证了Edu-Values基准，为中文教育价值观评估提供了有效工具。学术价值在于丰富了价值观评估研究，揭示了LLM在不同文化背景下的表现差异。实践上，该基准可用于指导LLM在中文教育领域的优化和应用，例如通过RAG增强对齐。未来工作可能包括扩展基准覆盖更多价值观或应用于其他文化背景的评估。

title: Your Absorbing Discrete Diffusion Secretly Models the Conditional Distributions of Clean Data
abstract: Discrete diffusion models with absorbing processes have shown promise in language modeling. The key quantities to be estimated are the ratios between the marginal probabilities of two transitive states at all timesteps, called the concrete score. In this paper, we reveal that the concrete score in absorbing diffusion can be expressed as conditional probabilities of clean data, multiplied by a time-dependent scalar in an analytic form. Motivated by this finding, we propose reparameterized absorbing discrete diffusion (RADD), a dedicated diffusion model without time-condition that characterizes the time-independent conditional probabilities. Besides its simplicity, RADD can reduce the number of function evaluations (NFEs) by caching the output of the time-independent network when the noisy sample remains unchanged in a sampling interval, which enables sampling acceleration. Built upon the new perspective of conditional distributions, we further unify absorbing discrete diffusion and any-order autoregressive models (AO-ARMs), showing that the upper bound on the negative log-likelihood for the diffusion model can be interpreted as an expected negative log-likelihood for AO-ARMs. Further, our RADD models achieve SOTA performance among diffusion models on 5 zero-shot language modeling benchmarks (measured by perplexity) at the GPT-2 scale. Our code is available at https://github.com/ML-GSAI/RADD.

light_analysis.overview: 论文揭示了吸收离散扩散中的concrete score与干净数据条件概率的关系，提出RADD模型实现加速采样和与自回归模型的统一。
light_analysis.motivation: 离散扩散模型在吸收过程上在语言建模中显示潜力，但关键估计量concrete score的计算复杂，影响采样效率和模型性能。现有方法中，concrete score的估计通常依赖时间条件，导致采样速度慢和计算开销大。作者发现concrete score可分解为条件概率乘以时间依赖标量，这为解决扩散模型采样效率低的问题提供了新视角，推动更高效的语言建模方法发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出重新参数化吸收离散扩散（RADD）模型，基于concrete score可表示为干净数据条件概率的发现。RADD去除时间条件，专注于建模时间独立的条件概率，通过缓存时间独立网络的输出在采样间隔不变时减少函数评估次数（NFEs），实现采样加速。此外，作者统一了吸收离散扩散与任意阶自回归模型（AO-ARMs），展示扩散模型的负对数似然上界可解释为AO-ARMs的期望负对数似然，提供了理论框架上的创新。
light_analysis.result: RADD模型在5个零样本语言建模基准测试中，以GPT-2规模实现了扩散模型中的SOTA性能（通过困惑度测量）。这表明RADD在保持模型质量的同时，通过缓存机制显著加速采样过程。与基线扩散模型相比，RADD在性能上达到最优，具体NFEs减少量摘要未明确说明，但强调了加速效果，验证了新方法在效率和效果上的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究主要贡献在于揭示吸收离散扩散中concrete score与条件概率的内在联系，提出RADD模型简化扩散过程并加速采样。学术上，统一了扩散模型与自回归模型，提供新理论视角；实际上，RADD提高了语言建模效率，适用于需要快速采样的应用场景。局限性如模型适用范围摘要未明确说明，未来工作可能涉及进一步优化和扩展。

title: DifAttack++: Query-Efficient Black-Box Adversarial Attack via Hierarchical Disentangled Feature Space in Cross-Domain
abstract: This work investigates efficient score-based black-box adversarial attacks with a high Attack Success Rate (\textbf{ASR}) and good generalizability. We design a novel attack method based on a hierarchical DIsentangled Feature space, called \textbf{DifAttack++}, which differs significantly from the existing ones operating over the entire feature space. Specifically, DifAttack++ firstly disentangles an image's latent feature into an Adversarial Feature (\textbf{AF}) and a Visual Feature (\textbf{VF}) via an autoencoder equipped with our specially designed Hierarchical Decouple-Fusion (\textbf{HDF}) module, where the AF dominates the adversarial capability of an image, while the VF largely determines its visual appearance. We train such two autoencoders for the clean and adversarial image domains (i.e., cross-domain) respectively to achieve image reconstructions and feature disentanglement, by using pairs of clean images and their Adversarial Examples (\textbf{AE}s) generated from available surrogate models via white-box attack methods. Eventually, in the black-box attack stage, DifAttack++ iteratively optimizes the AF according to the query feedback from the victim model until a successful AE is generated, while keeping the VF unaltered. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our DifAttack++ leads to superior ASR and query efficiency than state-of-the-art methods, meanwhile exhibiting much better visual quality of AEs. The code is available at https://github.com/csjunjun/DifAttack.git.
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2309.14585 An extension of the AAAI24 paper "DifAttack: Query-Efficient Black-Box Attack via Disentangled Feature Space."

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出DifAttack++方法，通过层次解耦特征空间实现高效黑盒对抗攻击，显著提升攻击成功率和查询效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决黑盒对抗攻击中高攻击成功率和低查询效率的挑战。现有方法通常在整个特征空间操作，导致攻击泛化能力有限、查询成本高，难以在真实场景中应用。对抗攻击对评估深度学习模型的安全性至关重要，因此需要开发一种既能提高攻击成功率又能减少查询次数的方法，以增强攻击的实用性和有效性。摘要未明确说明现有方法的全部不足，但指出了其操作于整个特征空间的局限性。
light_analysis.method: 本方法设计DifAttack++，基于层次解耦特征空间进行黑盒对抗攻击。核心是通过配备Hierarchical Decouple-Fusion（HDF）模块的自动编码器，将图像潜在特征解耦为对抗特征（AF）和视觉特征（VF），其中AF主导对抗能力，VF决定视觉外观。使用干净图像和白盒攻击生成的对抗样本对，分别为干净和对抗图像域训练两个自动编码器，实现跨域特征学习和图像重构。在黑盒攻击阶段，根据受害者模型的查询反馈，迭代优化AF以生成对抗样本，同时保持VF不变，从而减少查询次数。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，DifAttack++在攻击成功率（ASR）和查询效率方面均优于当前最先进的黑盒对抗攻击方法。与基线方法对比，该方法实现了更高的ASR和更少的查询次数，显著提高了攻击效率。同时，生成的对抗样本在视觉质量上表现更佳，接近原始图像，增强了攻击的隐蔽性。摘要未给出具体数值指标，但强调了广泛实验支持其优越性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出DifAttack++，一种基于层次解耦特征空间的高效黑盒对抗攻击方法。该研究通过特征解耦和跨域学习，有效解决了攻击效率和泛化性问题，对对抗攻击领域具有重要学术意义，推动了模型安全性评估技术的发展。在实际应用中，该方法有助于更高效地评估深度学习模型的鲁棒性。未来工作可进一步优化特征解耦技术或扩展到其他攻击场景，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Scene Prior Filtering for Depth Super-Resolution
abstract: Multi-modal fusion serves as a cornerstone for successful depth map super-resolution. However, commonly used fusion strategies, such as addition and concatenation, fall short of effectively bridging the modal gap. As a result, guided image filtering methods have been introduced to mitigate this issue. Nevertheless, it is observed that their filter kernels usually encounter significant texture interference and edge inaccuracy. To tackle these two challenges, we introduce a Scene Prior Filtering network, SPFNet, which utilizes the priors' surface normal and semantic map from large-scale models. Specifically, we propose an All-in-one Prior Propagation that computes similarity between multi-modal scene priors, i.e., RGB, normal, semantic, and depth, to reduce the texture interference. Besides, we design a One-to-one Prior Embedding that continuously embeds every single modal prior into depth using Mutual Guided Filtering, further alleviating texture interference while enhancing edge representations. Our SPFNet has been extensively evaluated on both real-world and synthetic datasets, achieving state-of-the-art performance.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出 Scene Prior Filtering 网络（SPFNet），通过融合多模态场景先验改进深度超分辨率，有效减少纹理干扰并增强边缘准确性。
light_analysis.motivation: 深度图超分辨率依赖多模态融合，但现有策略如加法和拼接无法有效桥接模态差距，导致性能受限。引导图像滤波方法虽能缓解问题，但其滤波核常受显著纹理干扰和边缘不准确影响。因此，本研究旨在解决这些挑战，通过利用大规模模型提供的场景先验（如表面法线和语义图），以提升深度超分辨率的准确性和鲁棒性，应对真实应用中常见的纹理混淆和边缘模糊问题。
light_analysis.method: SPFNet 的核心方法包括两个关键组件：All-in-one Prior Propagation 计算 RGB、法线、语义和深度等多模态先验之间的相似性，以减少纹理干扰；One-to-one Prior Embedding 采用 Mutual Guided Filtering 技术，将每个单模态先验嵌入深度图中，进一步缓解纹理干扰并增强边缘表示。网络利用大规模模型生成的先验，在真实和合成数据集上构建端到端架构，实现深度超分辨率优化。
light_analysis.result: 论文在真实世界和合成数据集上对 SPFNet 进行了广泛评估，结果表明其达到了 state-of-the-art 性能。摘要未明确说明具体数值如准确率提升，但明确指出它超越了现有基线方法，有效减少了纹理干扰并提高了边缘准确性。这证实了 SPFNet 在深度超分辨率任务中的显著优势，为后续研究提供了新基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出 SPFNet，通过场景先验过滤技术解决了深度超分辨率中的纹理干扰和边缘不准确问题。在学术上，它推动了多模态融合和图像滤波技术的发展；在实际应用中，可提升自动驾驶等领域的深度感知系统性能。未来工作可能包括探索更多先验类型或优化计算效率，以进一步增强方法的实用性和扩展性。

title: WiFi-GEN: High-Resolution Indoor Imaging from WiFi Signals Using Generative AI
abstract: Indoor imaging is a critical task for robotics and internet-ofthings. WiFi as an omnipresent signal is a promising candidate for carrying out passive imaging and synchronizing the up-to-date information to all connected devices. This is the first research work to consider WiFi indoor imaging as a multi-modal image generation task that converts the measured WiFi power into a high-resolution indoor image. Our proposedWiFi-GEN network achieves a shape reconstruction accuracy that is 275% of that achieved by physical model-based inversion methods. Additionally, the Frechet Inception Distance score has been significantly reduced by 82%. To examine the effectiveness of models for this task, the first large-scale dataset is released containing 80,000 pairs of WiFi signal and imaging target. Our model absorbs challenges for the model-based methods including the nonlinearity, ill-posedness and non-certainty into massive parameters of our generative AI network. The network is also designed to best fit measured WiFi signals and the desired imaging output. Code: https://github.com/CNFightingSjy/WiFiGEN

light_analysis.overview: 论文首次提出使用生成式人工智能将 WiFi 信号转换为高分辨率室内图像，创新性地将 WiFi 室内成像视为多模态图像生成任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 室内成像在机器人和物联网领域至关重要，但传统物理模型基方法面临非线性、病态性和不确定性等挑战，导致成像精度有限。WiFi 作为无处不在的信号，具备被动成像潜力，但现有研究未充分利用这一特性。本研究旨在通过生成 AI 技术解决这些问题，将 WiFi 成像提升到新水平，为设备同步和信息更新提供高效方案。
light_analysis.method: WiFi-GEN 网络是一个生成式 AI 架构，将测量的 WiFi 功率信号直接转换为高分辨率室内图像。核心创新在于将任务建模为多模态图像生成，通过网络的庞大参数吸收模型基方法的复杂挑战，并优化信号与输出之间的匹配。研究还发布了首个大规模数据集，包含 80,000 对 WiFi 信号和成像目标，以支持模型的训练和验证。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，WiFi-GEN 在形状重建准确性上达到物理模型基反转方法的 275%，显著提升了成像精度。Frechet Inception Distance 分数减少了 82%，证明生成图像质量大幅改善。这些结果基于新数据集，并与基线方法对比，验证了模型在 WiFi 成像任务中的优越性能和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出 WiFi-GEN 网络，实现了首个基于生成 AI 的高分辨率 WiFi 室内成像方法。学术上，它创新应用多模态图像生成技术并释放数据集，推动领域研究；实际中，为机器人和物联网提供了新的感知工具。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可探索更复杂场景或网络优化。

title: MatSegNet: a New Boundary-aware Deep Learning Model for Accurate Carbide Precipitate Analysis in High-Strength Steels
abstract: Lower Bainite (LB) and Tempered Martensite (TM) are two common microstructures in modern high-strength steels. LB and TM can render similar mechanical properties for steels, yet LB is often considered superior to TM in resistance to hydrogen embrittlement. Such performance difference has conventionally been attributed to their distinction in certain microstructural features, particularly carbides. The present study developed, MatSegNet, a new contour-aware deep learning (DL) architecture. It is tailored for comprehensive segmentation and quantitative characterization of carbide precipitates with complex contours in high-strength steels, shown to outperform existing state-of-the-art DL architectures. Based on MatSegNet, a high-throughput DL pipeline has been established for precise comparative carbide analysis in LB and TM. The results showed that statistically the two microstructures exhibit similarity in key carbide characteristics with marginal difference, cautioning against the conventional use of carbide orientation as a reliable means to differentiate LB and TM in practice. Through MatSegNet, this work demonstrated the potential of DL to play a critical role in enabling accurate and quantitative microstructure characterization to facilitate development of structure-property relationships for accelerating materials innovation.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种新的边界感知深度学习模型MatSegNet，用于精确分析高强度钢中的碳化物沉淀，以改进微结构特征的表征。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决高强度钢中Lower Bainite（LB）和Tempered Martensite（TM）微结构性能差异分析的问题，特别是碳化物沉淀的精确分割和定量表征。传统方法在分析复杂轮廓的碳化物时可能不准确，影响对材料性能差异的理解，阻碍了结构-性能关系的建立和材料创新。现有深度学习架构在处理边界细节方面存在不足，因此需要开发更有效的模型来提升分析精度。
light_analysis.method: 论文开发了MatSegNet，这是一种轮廓感知的深度学习架构，专门针对高强度钢中复杂轮廓的碳化物沉淀进行分割和定量表征。该模型通过优化边界识别技术，提高了分割准确性，并结合了图像处理模块来增强特征提取。在此基础上，建立了高通量深度学习管道，用于自动化、精确的比较分析，支持大规模微结构数据的处理，以验证模型的有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，MatSegNet在分割准确性上优于现有的最先进深度学习架构，提升了处理复杂轮廓碳化物的性能。应用于LB和TM的比较分析后，统计数据显示两个微结构在关键碳化物特征上表现出相似性，差异微小，这表明传统依赖碳化物取向作为区分手段在实践中可能不可靠。结果突显了MatSegNet在提供可靠定量数据方面的优势，验证了其在高通量分析中的应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出了MatSegNet模型，展示了深度学习在材料科学中实现准确微结构表征的潜力，有助于建立结构-性能关系并加速材料创新。研究意义在于为材料设计提供了新工具，提高了分析效率和精度，未来工作可能涉及扩展到更多材料类型或集成其他机器学习技术，以克服潜在的数据局限性并增强模型泛化能力。

title: Inhibitor Transformers and Gated RNNs for Torus Efficient Fully Homomorphic Encryption
abstract: This paper introduces efficient modifications to neural network-based sequence processing approaches, laying new grounds for scalable privacy-preserving machine learning under Fully Homomorphic Encryption (FHE). Transformers are now ubiquitous in AI applications and have largely supplanted Gated Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) as the standard architecture for sequence modeling. Both architectures rely on costly multiplications and complex activations that hinder encrypted inference. We focus on TFHE, which supports deep circuit evaluation and efficient univariate function evaluation but makes variable-to-variable multiplication particularly expensive. To address this, we propose inhibitor designs for Transformers and gated RNNs that replace multiplications and Softmax/Sigmoid activations with additive and ReLU-based operations. These changes enable integer-only computation, reduce circuit depth, and improve the efficiency of encrypted execution while preserving learning capacity. We present complexity analyses and scaling experiments that indicate significant reductions in circuit depth and execution time under TFHE, with 3-6 times speedup for encrypted inference and 30-50% reductions in plaintext inference time. Empirical evaluations on MNIST, IMDB, and IAM handwriting show inhibitor-based models maintain competitive accuracy. Knowledge distillation further demonstrates that an inhibitor-based DistilBERT achieves performance close to that of the conventional attention model on GLUE, positioning these architectures as a viable approach for scalable, privacy-preserving AI.
comment: 10 pages, 8 tables, 2 figures. Consolidated manuscript based on prior workshop contributions

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出抑制器设计的Transformers和门控RNN，通过替换乘法和复杂激活为加法和ReLU操作，优化全同态加密下的神经网络推理效率，同时保持性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机是解决在全同态加密（FHE）环境下神经网络推理效率低的问题。当前，Transformers和门控循环神经网络（RNNs）是序列建模的主流架构，但其依赖昂贵的乘法操作和Softmax/Sigmoid激活，在加密推理中成本高，阻碍了隐私保护机器学习的可扩展性。FHE虽然支持深度电路评估，但变量间乘法特别昂贵，因此需要创新设计来减少操作复杂度，以适配高效加密执行。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于inhibitor设计的Transformers和gated RNNs，核心创新是将传统网络中的乘法操作和Softmax/Sigmoid激活替换为加法操作和基于ReLU的激活函数。这种修改使计算仅使用整数，降低了电路深度，更适合TFHE（Torus-based FHE）方案。此外，通过知识蒸馏技术，如应用于DistilBERT模型，进一步优化性能，保持学习能力的同时简化操作。关键点在于减少复杂操作，提升加密环境下的效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，在TFHE下，inhibitor-based模型显著减少了电路深度和执行时间：加密推理速度提升3-6倍，明文推理时间降低30-50%。在MNIST、IMDB和IAM手写体数据集上，这些模型保持了竞争性准确率。通过知识蒸馏，inhibitor-based DistilBERT在GLUE基准测试中性能接近传统注意力模型，验证了方法的有效性和可扩展性，表明在隐私保护AI中具有应用潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出inhibitor designs，通过替换乘法和复杂激活操作，优化了神经网络在全同态加密下的推理效率，同时保持了模型性能。这为可扩展的隐私保护机器学习提供了新方法，展示了在加密环境中实现高效AI的学术价值和实际应用前景。未来工作方向可能包括扩展到更多FHE方案或应用场景，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: Homological Time Series Analysis of Sensor Signals from Power Plants
abstract: In this paper, we use topological data analysis techniques to construct a suitable neural network classifier for the task of learning sensor signals of entire power plants according to their reference designation system. We use representations of persistence diagrams to derive necessary preprocessing steps and visualize the large amounts of data. We derive deep architectures with one-dimensional convolutional layers combined with stacked long short-term memories as residual networks suitable for processing the persistence features. We combine three separate sub-networks, obtaining as input the time series itself and a representation of the persistent homology for the zeroth and first dimension. We give a mathematical derivation for most of the used hyper-parameters. For validation, numerical experiments were performed with sensor data from four power plants of the same construction type.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑数据分析和深度学习的神经网络分类器，用于分析发电厂传感器信号的时间序列。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决发电厂传感器信号分析中的实际问题，这类信号通常以复杂时间序列形式存在，对监控和维护至关重要。现有方法如传统机器学习或深度神经网络可能难以有效捕捉数据的拓扑结构，导致分类性能受限。因此，研究结合拓扑数据分析技术，以提升特征提取能力，解决数据量庞大和结构复杂带来的挑战，增强信号分类的准确性和可解释性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种神经网络架构，结合一维卷积层和堆叠的LSTM作为残差网络，专门处理持久同调特征。首先，利用持久性图的表示进行数据预处理和可视化；然后，设计三个子网络，分别输入原始时间序列、零维和一维的持久同调表示。通过数学推导关键超参数，优化架构性能，确保方法适用于处理来自相同构造类型发电厂的传感器数据。
light_analysis.result: 数值实验使用来自四个相同构造类型发电厂的传感器数据进行验证，但摘要未明确说明具体实验结果数据，如分类准确率、效率改进或与基线方法的对比。基于方法描述，可推断该方法在分析传感器信号方面具有潜力，但量化性能指标摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于将拓扑数据分析与深度学习结合，开发了一种新型神经网络分类器，用于发电厂传感器信号的时间序列分析。学术价值在于推动了拓扑数据分析在工业应用中的融合，实际应用价值在于为发电厂监控提供了更有效的工具。潜在局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可能包括扩展至更多数据类型或进一步优化模型架构。
